name: Bill Olson
subject: Closing days- Huck endorses Olson!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmyg8EU4uF6OuRU&b=svofraawEjbGrY3DrpIssQ

Hi Peter,

If you're taking on a Pelosi clone like Darren Soto, how do you close?

You close with the most well-known Christian Republican in Florida, Gov. Mike Huckabee!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative veteran and fighter who dominated my primary and willwin on Tuesday with the support of Mike Huckabee and Trump supporters everywhere

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmyg8EU4uF6OuRU&b=svofraawEjbGrY3DrpIssQ
!

I am proud to accept the endorsement of Mike Huckabee here in the closing days- and hundreds of residents in my district joined us at rallies today!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmyg8EU4uF6OuRU&b=svofraawEjbGrY3DrpIssQ

Here's an update on the status of our race:

-Trump has closed the gap among early voters in my district and we should pull ahead by Election Day.

-Election Day votes should be heavily pro-Trump and pro-Olson.

-I am firing up Christians around my district to go make a difference and replace a pro-abortion liberal with a pro-life veteran: me!

-All of our recent polling shows a tie or me opening up a small lead.

I am surging late just like Trump is. Help me put us both over the top here in the closing days!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmyg8EU4uF6OuRU&b=svofraawEjbGrY3DrpIssQ

I am NOT a progressive. I'm not a Pelosi leftist. I'm a pro-life, pro-gun conservative who is a normal guy, not a Swamper!

THIS RACE WILL BE CLOSE. If we win this, Trump will probably win Florida. Join my 4,000 patriots who donated to me so I can flip this district! I need your help to beat Soto and Pelosi!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmyg8EU4uF6OuRU&b=svofraawEjbGrY3DrpIssQ

Trump is in the fight of his life- and so is America! The coalition behind us is impressive. I can win this swing district because Trump is overperforming among ALL Floridians.

I need your help to deliver a BIG win on Tuesday!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmyg8EU4uF6OuRU&b=svofraawEjbGrY3DrpIssQ

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmyg8EU4uF6OuRU&b=svofraawEjbGrY3DrpIssQ
today? Our "Get out the vote" expenditures are critical. Your help will be critical toward funding those programs!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmyg8EU4uF6OuRU&b=svofraawEjbGrY3DrpIssQ

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmyg8EU4uF6OuRU&b=svofraawEjbGrY3DrpIssQ

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmyg8EU4uF6OuRU&b=svofraawEjbGrY3DrpIssQ
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hmyg8EU4uF6OuRU&b=svofraawEjbGrY3DrpIssQ
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

body:
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=b5698d62da2bec2b7bbeb6e02b5b6f905ade976927d5ab32cec6f179b7cd7d4194c6ff4a6b0dc9ac23ee1e89a7e288dd0cfc486c396b4b37

We’ll get right to the point, Friend.

President Trump has done more in 47 months than Joe Biden did in 47 years. The Trump-Pence administration has accomplished more than anyone thought possible:
- MASSIVE tax cuts
- Renegotiated the failed NAFTA and passed the USMCA
- Rebuilt our Nation’s military
- Decimated ISIS
- The wall is being FINISHED

name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Did you see this from Steve Scalise?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
Join Scalise on Team Fitzgerald No images? [Click here](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-e-xtuihhl-ahkdjtlkr-h/) Dear Peter,Did you see this from Rep. Steve Scalise? It's a perfect reminder of the stakes ahead of us... **and that we still have an election to win first!** Take a look, take a moment to chip in, and let's WIN this Tuesday!-Scott\----------------------------- [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xtuihhl-ahkdjtlkr-r/) Dear Peter,I'm emailing you because I need **your help, TODAY, **to make sure **Scott Fitzgerald **wins his election next week to join me in Congress!Take it from me, if you care about the future of our country and fighting the liberals in Congress,** we need your support right away! ** [Join Steve Scalise - $10](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xtuihhl-ahkdjtlkr-y/) [Join Steve Scalise - $20](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-xtuihhl-ahkdjtlkr-j/) As the **Republican Whip** , I know how important it is to have reliable, principled Conservatives in power in Washington. I know that Scott Fitzgerald is a fighter, and he knows what it takes to get results. We're going to need Conservative leaders like Scott for the battles ahead of us with **Nancy Pelosi, AOC, and the Radical Left** pushing the **Green New Deal, Socialized healthcare, tax hikes** , and so much worse!I'm counting on YOU to make sure **Scott Fitzgerald** is exactly where we need him - _fighting for Wisconsin in Congress._**Can I count on you?** Congressman Steve Scalise
Republican Whip

name: Joe
subject: fwd: We're almost there.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Hampshire Republican State Committee
body:
| Derek, wanted to make sure you saw this email from Friday. We are so close to securing victory up and down the ballot on Tuesday, but [_we need the resources to cross the finish line._](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTQ1MjI4NjExODIzMzQzMTc5JmM9dDV2NyZlPTE5MjgmYj00NDQyMjg3NzgmZD1lNnc3cjBp.42gf8u0QxWp_1k6gx94osM0NW81ayG-9GMNysEpL6rk) Please consider donating today to help us flip the House, Senate and Executive Council on Tuesday: [_https://secure.anedot.com/new-hampshire-republican-state-committee/takebacknh_](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTQ1MjI4NjExODIzMzQzMTc5JmM9dDV2NyZlPTE5MjgmYj00NDQyMjg3OTYmZD1jMW01cDBu.TgXF2EULURR5oPbwW9uGAuuz7WC379IJX7LEWXGXsrM) Best, Joe |
---
Derek, we are almost there.
Polls released by the University of New Hampshire yesterday are now showing that we are on the verge of **FLIPPING** the New Hampshire House, Senate, and Executive Council.

As the polls show our hard work paying off, we can't give up now. We need to continue to mobilize our voters and get out the vote over these next 4 days in order to ensure we have something to celebrate on Tuesday night. [_Your donation today will empower us to increase our GOTV and persuasion efforts_](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTQ1MjI4NjExODIzMzQzMTc5JmM9dDV2NyZlPTE5MjgmYj00NDQyMjg4MzImZD1tOHE0Zzl3.OED9ychcEbd7IIZNHeRaineNZMI8kcnaPPUsfGdNJhw) between now and election day and enable us to take back the New Hampshire House, Senate, and Executive Council.

We have all put a lot into this effort since the Democrats took over the General Court and Executive Council in 2018. Republicans have testified at countless committee meetings, rallied around Governor Chris Sununu's vetoes, organized new town committees, recruited a new and bold field of candidates, and have made record setting voter contacts. Campaigns across the state, up and down the ballot, have knocked on doors and made phone calls. The NHGOP has invested more this year than ever before in targeted digital and mail programs in strategic ways to get out the vote and support Republicans up and down the ballot. It's been a long two years, but victory is now clearly in our sights.
Now is not the time to rest on our laurels. These polls might make us feel good today but nothing will feel better than securing our victory next week. There is so much at stake on Tuesday and we need to make sure we can get our candidates across the finish line. Our candidates and committees are doing everything they can to win up and down the ballot on election day, but [_your donation today will help the NHGOP increase our efforts over these truly critical next few days._](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTQ1MjI4NjExODIzMzQzMTc5JmM9dDV2NyZlPTE5MjgmYj00NDQyMjg4NTYmZD1jMHQxejlr.u_kNMcFVOkF8oFyVKGEz8jhYJ4KSUC28h9_8Ky_rOpI)
[_Donate today and help New Hampshire Republicans finish the job of taking back New Hampshire._](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTQ1MjI4NjExODIzMzQzMTc5JmM9dDV2NyZlPTE5MjgmYj00NDQyMjg4NzEmZD10NmgwbDVw.yZVcU0O-U3gucjdLZUOHvrUmNqAPXv3TjG41g-LAqiw)
\- Team NHGOP
[ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTQ1MjI4NjExODIzMzQzMTc5JmM9dDV2NyZlPTE5MjgmYj00NDQyMjg4ODkmZD1sM2E0azh0.SLha1EiAASZgbT-_TLW1bVX7gWzD4GGuS0gIdYBwHzg)
---
[ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTQ1MjI4NjExODIzMzQzMTc5JmM9dDV2NyZlPTE5MjgmYj00NDQyMjg5MDcmZD1kNXI0dzFn.s9ufeCvhOi43GNTle2e2D7-ck7_vr85CTyKWfYoprVM)
---
[ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTQ1MjI4NjExODIzMzQzMTc5JmM9dDV2NyZlPTE5MjgmYj00NDQyMjg5MjgmZD1oMGQ1bzJx.m8xcylIxeypTvObbhs2dtnFBWrpOlmhs6ReQwI59XaM)
---

_P.S. We are so close to electing Republican Majorities to the New Hampshire House, Senate, and Executive Council, completely flipping the New Hampshire State House in the Republican column and giving Governor Chris Sununu a team he can work with in Concord.[_Donate securely today to ensure the NHGOP has every available resource to secure victory on Tuesday._](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTQ1MjI4NjExODIzMzQzMTc5JmM9dDV2NyZlPTE5MjgmYj00NDQyMjg5OTEmZD1wNWY3ZDV2.52ff3Mj2o-0F69D5zykJ9cP3dXiTg9efPmG6UlDaz3Q)

As Speaker, I know how critical it is that Democrats WIN the House _and_ the Presidency.

Don Bacon has been declared the most vulnerable Republican in Congress.

She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8c7/77d4c309/223c14c2/26358e5e/811011729/VEsEBQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8c7/77d4c309/223c14c2/26358e59/811011729/VEsEBA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8c7/77d4c309/223c14c2/26358e58/811011729/VEsEBw/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: ICYMI: On proving people wrong
body:
At the beginning of the campaign, as I excitedly told people I was running, I encountered a variety of responses. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/3b24010566af/on-proving-people-wrong-3912102?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| I wanted to make sure you saw the email I sent you earlier today about how we've spent the last 14 months proving the naysayers wrong, and how we need your help to prove them wrong on election night! Check it out below 👇 and [chip in to help us finish strong!](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=281a520c77&e=140a9b81e7)
---
| | At the beginning of the campaign, as I excitedly told people I was running, I encountered a variety of responses. Many of them matched my enthusiasm, but plenty of them didn’t. And unfortunately, the one that sticks out most in my mind was the powerful woman in a position of authority, the woman deeply engaged in politics, who looked at me, scoffed, and said, “Why?”

The reasons are many and mostly ideological -- we need better representation, someone who is going to serve the people of IL-16 and set an open-hearted, sincere, and wildly passionate example. We need someone who’s going to fight doggedly for the people of this district, someone who will give themselves to this work.

**But I’d be lying if I said I wasn’t also running on that proving-them-wrong energy. Every step of the way, people have been telling me “no.” **

First: No, that district was drawn for a Republican. It’s unwinnable. Then: No, your opponent isn’t the most offensive member of the House. Then: No, the data doesn’t show a path to victory. Then: No, you’re not raising enough money. No, the Senate is our priority. You haven’t paid your dues. You didn’t kiss any rings. You’re not moderating your message enough. You’re not well-behaved enough. You’re not...enough. _**Enough. **_ Help me prove them wrong. Again. And once I’m elected, let’s keep doing it. Again and again and again. [I know you’re with me. Show me.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=f91d53a06f&e=140a9b81e7) Dani
---
| [Donate](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=c274ae004b&e=140a9b81e7 "Donate")
---
| | | | | | | [](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=bf847a1cf3&e=140a9b81e7)
---
| | [](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=bee8b3f536&e=140a9b81e7)
---

Dani for IllinoisPO Box 1671La Salle, IL 61301-3671

name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Hunt For Congress Weekly Update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Election Day is just 1 day away and I want to take a moment to thank you and the many Team Hunt volunteers who have been working around the clock to get us across the finish line on November 3rd. Since the day Emily and I decided to launch my campaign for Congress, our first priority has been to serve the needs of our community and to give the 7th District a voice in Congress. The outpouring of support we've received over the past 19 months shows us our message is resonating with families throughout Houston and that they're ready to send a new leader to Washington.

I'd like to thank the awesome Team Hunt volunteers who showed up yesterday morning to help us reach voters in the district. Without your hard work and enthusiasm, our progress to date would not have been possible. Stay focused and engaged and I believe we can will on Tuesday!

I hope you will join Congressman Michael McCaul and me tomorrow evening to rally voters in the 7th District! In order to win on Tuesday, we need as many voters as possible to go to the polls and vote. If you haven't voted yet, I urge you to do so on Tuesday!

While we are in the final stretch, there is still more you can do to help us win on Tuesday. If you are able, I encourage you to sign up for our final Get Out The Vote Day of Action. You can do so by completing _**[this form](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=bc71df072f8c43c5ad31b58ae9868aef&_e=ZKMjWeMCkOLuA83tD1Mai62M6YoaYgYsSoAzQEuCbLY05nRoy6ZFmcK-OtY-TlSpmhqtvyToMnDpgFmTvQHKY9pbIDte6wypHIJY-x3d5oXfIKWe8H4NWNH77dNe6DQ_T5I25CNQZFj6AqGGVcbLKaPgMdOdth8u2kitWH99Mrc6-B-KxFYLoDhXNnbNXStuNQm9x2HkVLIqbdiSfNmVSKAosCxeyYVVQ2PlBG_PUM4wQ4KgRJJCpV1M88y2D6pEOK37TLqNYfOE60C_KZv3F1yg_9FJae6Ov-4bLrU0k9xVMYvOTSadIDj3z8UtqbtkxdWDc9baqhVq4FbLUY52rL3URgiLYB3uCsO4cNN3iEo%3D)**_ or by emailing info@wesleyfortexas.com. Help us make sure we get as many voters to the polls as possible! You can lend a hand by block walking, phone banking, or text banking. We are down to the wire and your participation makes a difference! Join Team Hunt and help us get out the vote.

As we head into Election Day, Team Hunt has had a great week mobilizing support in the 7th District. On Monday, I had the honor of joining OilField 360 to discuss issues important to the district and our vision for the future. As we work to rebuild our economy, we must empower our oil and gas industry and allow them innovated and advance. Our recovery must be guided by our entrepreneurs and industry leaders, not Washington bureaucrats. You can find the full podcast episode [here](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=bc71df072f8c43c5ad31b58ae9868aef&_e=ZKMjWeMCkOLuA83tD1Mai0FZOuMGkFZBeamQKfm0hmk8pjrxxQ-JFtkmNOuSTjrTnUeZqdIu3jZ-7wMNDvDE0fbvL9eGUlS39MOYJ9AhedCJwQpgDUfQeJeih6dh8GyNffemKA_3KQ6X0XgD9XURQy4gmyg1-lUEG-WkJZZ3i6iVxjGoCgjw1oZF3WZNgYJeTBQMqRXiPvDazedcvd2sn1DK7v3jW76pH6Xar1whrLt-idbDAu8DWfB1xi5f1An-7legYPz6rHtCBImMeLn4ES4dzVdA8xGPSiQlIx_RjSuW_suoQmgtkB0Xd3tODFpCT_i1JXD0Mmfzu-DiVM8J1DHCw7EMUCEAYpe0myqtIJN6TX7JbSGstFGRywKyWjYEhdNUheJliazxIpkxKCRQojEr8hLsO3rr8MRbMJ_EQdNkio-FxLALd5ESY3VVPTrswjW1zNIThCU_R6LuLOdkonXLFd6Hgn6GPvHVVp-SZWE%3D).

On Wednesday, I had the honor of joining Governor Greg Abbott, Senator John Cornyn, and leaders throughout the state of Texas to show support for our law enforcement and sign the Back the Blue pledge. The brave men and women of our law enforcement put their lives on the line every day to keep our neighborhoods safe. Any steps we take to reform our police departments must balance the needs of our officers and our citizens, because we are stronger when we act together. In Congress, I will wholeheartedly oppose any efforts to defund our police, and where my opponent has failed to lead on this issue, I will ensure Houston has the representation it deserves.

On Friday, I had the honor of joining Congressman Dan Crenshaw and leaders from oil and gas companies here in Houston to rally behind our energy industry. When we talk about the oil and gas industry here in Houston, we're talking about a sector that employs more than 250,000 Houstonians, puts food on the table for millions of Texas families, funds our schools, and enables Houston to thrive. In order to bounce back from the coronavirus, we must allow our energy companies to take the lead. I am confident that any advancements in affordability, efficiency, and reliability in our energy sector will stem from our entrepreneurs and business leaders. In Congress, I will fight tirelessly against Nancy Pelosi and Democrats working to end this vital industry.

Election Day is around the corner and I hope you will join Emily and me to celebrate on Election Night! The festivities will begin at 7:00pm this Tuesday at Kirby Ice House in Memorial. If you'd like to attend, please RSVP to info@wesleyfortexas.com. We hope to see you there!

I am still in awe of the support our campaign has received from individuals all across the 7th District. I will continue to work every day to earn your trust and support and to ensure that Houston has the advocate it deserves in Washington. Thank you for choosing to be on Team Hunt.

Sincerely,
Wesley

****[CONTRIBUTE](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=bc71df072f8c43c5ad31b58ae9868aef&_e=ZKMjWeMCkOLuA83tD1Mai-0X5bgM7dSrRiOl2iXk4QbNBtRlIVNrjFFnkLG1xCfbxE7vIBzXxEzouFRgQ2FD6AJzsxR4SnMKlCmegTKKLMN2pm4zbyrDwsRlyN4IOtGgpPFTN5KsuG4mSZk8TVIqGA0bqVblVpHskzsYXRUQoMj7onR6SgyYUkJUXhfkejovpSnwdJ0BYAwRve3WexpPxfj_y9f8Vbu-cedQ4Mi55tq3KLPP-I_YzVekrkepMTe2woj7Ct2U57hT9OxoSOCtKrC9zTe7KmqJPGjJ3vnmJKs%3D)****
---

---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Click here to [unsubscribe](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_s=bc71df072f8c43c5ad31b58ae9868aef&_t=IX3WX7xVRBVumteIKIIuqF68RJF41C48-M7AFwlaintLKFNgaICwndwbGFCzWlnLjkJQEqJMre2ZFK9q0_f6bPUUW8xipOs9y3OCbv03q312n_9uLQAa8JeGv0Ic_RoG1gwcp1EYroYzwAKV7EqpEpaO_ZQS9f8e8vwGdrIyoxU%3D).

On Friday, I had the honor of joining Congressman Dan Crenshaw and leaders from oil and gas companies here in Houston to rally behind our energy industry. When we talk about the oil and gas industry here in Houston, we're talking about a sector that employs more than 250,000 Houstonians, puts food on the table for millions of Texas families, funds our schools, and enables Houston to thrive. In order to bounce back from the coronavirus, we must allow our energy companies to take the lead. I am confident that any advancements in affordability, efficiency, and reliability in our energy sector will stem from our entrepreneurs and business leaders. In Congress, I will fight tirelessly against Nancy Pelosi and Democrats working to end this vital industry. Election Day is around the corner and I hope you will join Emily and me to celebrate on Election Night! The festivities will begin at 7:00pm this Tuesday at Kirby Ice House in Memorial. If you'd like to attend, please RSVP to info@wesleyfortexas.com. We hope to see you there! I am still in awe of the support our campaign has received from individuals all across the 7th District. I will continue to work every day to earn your trust and support and to ensure that Houston has the advocate it deserves in Washington. Thank you for choosing to be on Team Hunt. Sincerely, Wesley **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Steve Chabot Press
subject: ICYMI: Choose prosperity over dangerous policies
body:
By any measure, 2020 has been a challenging year for everyone – not just here, but across the globe. But, as Americans always do, we’re finding ways t
No images? [Click here](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jkhhkdyd-kujkulhluu-d/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhhkdyd-kujkulhluu-r/)
## **Chabot: Choose prosperity over dangerous policies**
Steve Chabot, Opinion contributor[Cincinatti.com](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhhkdyd-kujkulhluu-y/), October 31 2020 By any measure, 2020 has been a challenging year for everyone - not just here, but across the globe. But, as Americans always do, we're finding ways to persevere, even in the face of unprecedented obstacles.No challenge has been greater than the COVID-19 pandemic. Faced with a novel virus we didn't even know existed a year ago, we had to act quickly to find a way to slow the spread of the virus.Significant portions of our economy were shut down to deal with the virus' initial onslaught, and give medical professionals time to learn more about treating it. Those critical efforts likely saved hundreds of thousands of lives.But the economic impact of the pandemic required swift action from Congress to help the American people survive this unprecedented period in our history. Fortunately, we acted quickly, and in a bipartisan manner, to enact three major pieces of legislation to: increase testing capacity; provide health care providers the resources they needed to treat patients and protect their staffs; send billions to local governments to help them confront the virus; and provide relief directly to the American people.As the top Republican on the House Small Business Committee, I worked closely with Democratic Chairwoman Nydia Velazquez from New York, and our Senate counterparts, to help small businesses survive the pandemic. The result, the Paycheck Protection Program (PPP), has helped save millions of jobs across the country. In the 1st Congressional District, more small businesses received loans (over 17,000) for more money (nearly $3 billion), and most importantly, we saved more jobs (256,000) than any other district in Ohio.The program's been extremely successful, but our small businesses need additional support. That's why I've been pushing to reopen the program, place a greater emphasis on the smallest of small businesses, and allow a second loan to those businesses still struggling to survive. It is why I've visited more then 70 small businesses in recent weeks, to listen to their concerns, learn how we can improve the PPP program and see what else I can do to help. Especially, with the recent surge in COVID-19 cases, we need to make sure small business owners have the support they need to make it through this crisis.The good news is the economy is rebounding. Millions of jobs lost early in the pandemic have come back, and the economy grew by a robust 7.4% in the third quarter. We still have a ways to go, but we're exceeding many expectations as we rebuild from the initial shock of the pandemic.Obviously, the other major challenge we face is improving police-community relations following the inexcusable and horrific death of George Floyd in Minnesota. In response, I introduced common-sense reforms to improve police-community relations, help weed out any bad apples in the police force, and make our neighborhoods safer.That's why I've been endorsed by the Cincinnati Fraternal Order of Police (FOP), and the Democratic Sheriff of Hamilton County, Jim Neil. They know I'll work with both police, and community leaders, to make sure our neighborhoods are safe, and every citizen, regardless of race or ethnicity, is treated with respect by the police.My opponent, on the other hand, would make our neighborhoods less safe. She refused to condemn efforts to defund our police, would get rid of cash bail, and she'd allow police officers to be sued for simply doing their jobs.Further, she hampered our COVID-19 response by running up a $2.7 million deficit at the Cincinnati Board of Health and embroiled the board in an "unethical" hiring scandal.And she'd crush our economy by supporting the radical Green New Deal, which would cost $93 trillion, kill millions of American jobs, and even pay people who refuse to work. Shockingly, she has repeatedly declared that "nothing else matters" - even as our communities battle a pandemic.And so in this election, the choice is clear. We can choose my opponent's dangerous agenda, and head down the path towards higher taxes, job-killing socialist programs, and more crime in our communities.Or we can focus on defeating COVID-19, continuing to restore American prosperity, standing up for our small businesses and making our communities safer for every family. If you agree these should be our priorities and that our elected leaders should focus on delivering results for you, I'd appreciate your vote. | [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhhkdyd-kujkulhluu-j/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhhkdyd-kujkulhluu-t/)| [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jkhhkdyd-kujkulhluu-i/)
---|---|---
Chabot for Congress, P.O. Box 54461, Cincinnati, OH 45254
You are receiving this email because of your connection to our cause. If you receive this email in error, please use the unsubscribe link below and remove yourself from future mailings.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jerry?=
subject: I was on Abby Johnson's Podcast - Check it out!
body:
Hi Friends! I was a guest on Abby Johnson's Podcast - Politely Rude. Check it out! | | | |
---
| **Listen to my appearance on Abby Johnson's Podcast!**
---
| | |
---
| **Hi Friends! I had at the privilege to be a guest on Abby Johnson's Podcast, "Politely Rude", recently. We talked about standing up for truth & justice, having courage, and why men should stand up against abortion. Check it out!

Abby Johnson is a former Planned Parenthood clinic director that resigned to be a Pro-Life advocate. Abby is frequently seen on national news networks, she recently spoke at the Republican National Convention, she travels the globe, has authored a nationally best selling book, and founded the organization “And Then There Were None”. The recent movie “Unplanned” was about her amazing story.

Click the Blue Podcast Link button below to listen, and email me with any of your thoughts.****

Also, I had the chance to see Jim Oberweis at a recent #WalkAway event, and see Jeanne Ives when I was walking door to door for her campaign. (Pictures below).

God bless you.

#BeBold
-Jerry Evans**

**_Please check out my [website](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=17e1be45c6&e=b78e7c4d40) to learn more about me and [my vision](https://JerryEvansIL.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=5b630adf46d0f4acc3511961b&id=b1b422c3f3&e=b78e7c4d40) for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey._**

clean_body: Hi Friends! I was a guest on Abby Johnson's Podcast - Politely Rude. Check it out! | | | | | Listen to my appearance on Abby Johnson's Podcast! | | | | Hi Friends! I had at the privilege to be a guest on Abby Johnson's Podcast, "Politely Rude", recently. We talked about standing up for truth & justice, having courage, and why men should stand up against abortion. Check it out! Abby Johnson is a former Planned Parenthood clinic director that resigned to be a Pro-Life advocate. Abby is frequently seen on national news networks, she recently spoke at the Republican National Convention, she travels the globe, has authored a nationally best selling book, and founded the organization “And Then There Were None”. The recent movie “Unplanned” was about her amazing story. Click the Blue Podcast Link button below to listen, and email me with any of your thoughts. Also, I had the chance to see Jim Oberweis at a recent #WalkAway event, and see Jeanne Ives when I was walking door to door for her campaign. (Pictures below). God bless you. #BeBold -Jerry Evans Please check out my to learn more about me and for our country, and follow me one of my social media accounts to keep up with my journey. | "Podcast Link" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2020 - Jerry Evans for Illinois, All rights reserved. name: Roger Misso
subject: Fwd: $29,671 to HOLD THE HOUSE and FLIP THE SENATE! Show these 29 veteran and military family candidates that we have their backs!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

One of the great honors of my life is to work with my friend, former Pennsylvania Congressman, and 32nd Under Secretary of the Army Patrick Murphy at Taking the Hill. So I wanted to bump his last E-mail of the election cycle to the top of your inbox!

**[Can you chip in here? We could use every last cent so that our candidates can win with confidence tomorrow!](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q1EPVQvBZsPMSnYSVxcDt0bYmIcH53y9gQjvuR5Pck8=/74a6LH0wWxHvyjPLQAXexp9-llwzOlVyBm7l2bW0oPM=)**

[_**We are just $29,671 short of our fundraising goal for the cycle**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q1EPVQvBZsPMSnYSVxcDt0bYmIcH53y9gQjvuR5Pck8=/74a6LH0wWxHvyjPLQAXexp9-llwzOlVyBm7l2bW0oPM=), and I don't want to let Patrick down. Your contribution goes to paying the final bills for our 11 US Senate and 18 US House candidates - all veterans and military family candidates for integrity for Congress in tough races! Thank you so much - can't wait to celebrate these victories with you.

Yours in service,
Roger

Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q1EPVQvBZsPMSnYSVxcDt0bYmIcH53y9gQjvuR5Pck8=/jrwAp5fUx3eJtKe2S7vVTbzYsMjhLYiIikQRHqgl08I=)
[@RogerMissoCNY](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q1EPVQvBZsPMSnYSVxcDt0bYmIcH53y9gQjvuR5Pck8=/p8rOT3uLziv5krZH0wIab2cXk0MMbNgGuWzHNBhgwNw=)

\-----Begin Forwarded Message-----
**From: **HON Patrick J. Murphy
**Subject: **Show our 29 veteran candidates that we have their backs to HOLD THE HOUSE and FLIP THE SENATE!
**Date: **Oct 31, 2020

Peter,

As a former member of Congress and Under Secretary of the Army under President Obama, folks are asking me how they can help hold the House and flip the Senate in these final days. Here's what I tell them:

[**_Support our candidates at Taking the Hill!_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q1EPVQvBZsPMSnYSVxcDt0bYmIcH53y9gQjvuR5Pck8=/74a6LH0wWxHvyjPLQAXexp9-llwzOlVyBm7l2bW0oPM=)

At Taking the Hill, we support veterans and military family members of integrity running for Congress in tough races. Today, [we are proud to support 11 US Senate and 18 US House candidates](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q1EPVQvBZsPMSnYSVxcDt0bYmIcH53y9gQjvuR5Pck8=/74a6LH0wWxHvyjPLQAXexp9-llwzOlVyBm7l2bW0oPM=) \- and if _they_ win, _we_ win. In the Senate, we support candidates like Amy McGrath, Mark Kelly, Theresa Greenfield, Cal Cunningham, and Raphael Warnock. In the House, we support candidates like Jackie Gordon, Amy Kennedy, Gina Ortiz Jones, Dan Feehan, and Conor Lamb. You can view our full slate [here](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q1EPVQvBZsPMSnYSVxcDt0bYmIcH53y9gQjvuR5Pck8=/74a6LH0wWxHvyjPLQAXexp9-llwzOlVyBm7l2bW0oPM=).

But here's the thing: [**_our candidates need your help._**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q1EPVQvBZsPMSnYSVxcDt0bYmIcH53y9gQjvuR5Pck8=/74a6LH0wWxHvyjPLQAXexp9-llwzOlVyBm7l2bW0oPM=) We need to raise $35,000 in the next 48 hours to keep our candidates on the air in crucial battleground states, to help them reach voters and bring as many people to the polls as possible.

We are matching EVERY contribution dollar-for-dollar between now and Election Day. So here's my last ask of this election cycle: [**_Can you chip in today to support these honorable candidates - and can you forward this E-mail to others in your network who can chip in, too?_**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q1EPVQvBZsPMSnYSVxcDt0bYmIcH53y9gQjvuR5Pck8=/74a6LH0wWxHvyjPLQAXexp9-llwzOlVyBm7l2bW0oPM=)

I am so proud of these candidates. I am so proud of those of you reading this message. And I am so proud of our country. Together, we will hold the House and flip the Senate. Together, WE WILL WIN.

In solidarity,

Honorable Patrick J. Murphy
[@PatrickMurphyPA](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q1EPVQvBZsPMSnYSVxcDt0bYmIcH53y9gQjvuR5Pck8=/9qncDLL9bkXko5rvbOXsnf-UNvAhtuyD-K5MUm8gqdQ=)

PS - If you have some spare time after you've chipped in, make sure to [sign up to make phone calls for these candidates](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q1EPVQvBZsPMSnYSVxcDt0bYmIcH53y9gQjvuR5Pck8=/cWdt9clWfng_ftGYQKaGJ3YaciE0uzj8JlqKMSBHlR0=) and [Joe Biden](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q1EPVQvBZsPMSnYSVxcDt0bYmIcH53y9gQjvuR5Pck8=/V2OI5Ddxbrg2MBqiYQFEpfXHsmdXj7rWXpRC6ngx0fc=)!

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
---
Taking The Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/Q1EPVQvBZsPMSnYSVxcDt0bYmIcH53y9gQjvuR5Pck8=/oN6sjTTgFdTNlkJXuJDqG2KHi9pRz7_Wa3Vi28_4sl8=).

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Citizens Fund
subject: Election Day Tomorrow! Week of November 2nd Action Items
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND
body:
| |
---
Thank you for everything you’ve done this year, and please make sure to pray for our country!

In light of Election Day on Tuesday, not knowing what the rest of the week may hold, and everyone working around the clock the last couple of months, we have fewer action items planned this week. However, keep an eye on your email in case anything urgent pops up (i.e. there could be action items related to election follow up if there are problems). And, if nothing comes up, enjoy a restful week!

_Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it._
|
---
Supreme Court Action
If you haven’t yet, please sign and share our petition to oppose the left’s efforts to pack the Supreme Court. Now that Judge Barrett is Justice Barrett, the next fight on the horizon is protecting the Supreme Court and our constitutional liberties.
[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzA3LTI5MWJkZTVkNzVmZTRmNDY4YTQ3YTg5NzBkMDNlZGFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly9ob2xkdGhlbmluZS5hY3QudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvP21pZD00MjkxNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=RkPhlcSb8naYeQoH6JsxSQ)
|
---
Get Out the Vote Action
**VOTE!!!**
Do not forget to vote! Whether you are voting in person or you got an absentee or mail-in ballot, you MUST vote! And be sure to help anyone you know that may need a ride to the polls or help finding out where to vote, or where to turn in their ballots. Text your Trump-friendly friends and family and ask them if they have voted yet, and if not, what you can do to help them get it done.
**Text or call voters on Monday and Tuesday**
The Democrats are still texting and calling voters, so we’d better still be doing it too!

_Text Messaging:_
1. **To get started go to:[tpp.us/txt](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzA3LTI5MWJkZTVkNzVmZTRmNDY4YTQ3YTg5NzBkMDNlZGFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kL3RleHQydm90ZS8_bWlkPTQyOTE2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=sJmBk3-2E2N8xUCvcXKzSQ) **– fill out the very short form and press the “Start Texting” button! We recommend using your phone to sign up as you will be using your phone to do the text messaging.

2. **You will get a text message after you’ve signed up.** Click the link on your cell phone and you’ll be moved through the process. Once you send a text to the voter, go back to your browser (on your cell phone) to send the next text.

**If you need additional instructions[you can look through this guide](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzA3LTI5MWJkZTVkNzVmZTRmNDY4YTQ3YTg5NzBkMDNlZGFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly90cHAtcmVzb3VyY2VzLnMzLmFtYXpvbmF3cy5jb20vZG9jdW1lbnRzLzIwMjBQMlBUZXh0aW5nSW5zdHJ1Y3Rpb25zLnBkZj9taWQ9NDI5MTYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=r7E5WFTr954OGSyoy2wSjw).** But it is very easy to sign up and start texting voters now. You can text voters every day until 8:30pm ET.

_Phone Banking:_
If you are interested in calling voters, we are near the deadline of making those calls. **[Please fill out this form](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzA3LTI5MWJkZTVkNzVmZTRmNDY4YTQ3YTg5NzBkMDNlZGFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3AMw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kL3BhdHJpb3Rwcm9qZWN0Lz9taWQ9NDI5MTYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=CfnETEr2aIW33_U7WC_rzA) and we will get you plugged in! **
|
---
Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again
Week of November 2nd

Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children.

**This week, we are continuing last week’s lesson about voting. If you didn’t vote last week, and you are able, take your kids or grandkids with you when you vote or show them your ballot at home. **

Last week, we recommended this article/report from The Heritage Foundation, [“Preventing ‘The Tyranny of the Majority’”](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzA3LTI5MWJkZTVkNzVmZTRmNDY4YTQ3YTg5NzBkMDNlZGFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANA%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGVyaXRhZ2Uub3JnL2NvbnNlcnZhdGlzbS9jb21tZW50YXJ5L3ByZXZlbnRpbmctdGhlLXR5cmFubnktdGhlLW1ham9yaXR5P21pZD00MjkxNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=SWLL2sfJ5cDNP5hg6eUnoQ) to help you in your discussion with your kids and grandkids about our voting system. Depend on their ages, you might need to read it and distill the ideas into something simpler, or if they’re older, you can both read it and then discuss.

We also recommended talking about honesty and integrity and why it is so important to make sure our elections are fair and honest. This discussion may be especially important if your children or grandchildren are in public schools where teachers or other students are promoting universal mail-in ballots. You’ll want to make sure that your children understand why universal mail-in ballots are such a grave threat to our republic. [This is a great PragerU video](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzA3LTI5MWJkZTVkNzVmZTRmNDY4YTQ3YTg5NzBkMDNlZGFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANQ%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cucHJhZ2VydS5jb20vdmlkZW8vaG93LXRvLXN0ZWFsLWFuLWVsZWN0aW9uLW1haWwtaW4tYmFsbG90cy8_bWlkPTQyOTE2JmlkPVQxOG85TG5ldWpIaGs5MVFRUQ&K=vHiDNW3enk4N6WS7CqQB3A) on universal mail-in voting that could help you build a firm foundation about election integrity with your kids or grandkids.
|
---
Thank you!

In liberty,

Jenny Beth
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzA3LTI5MWJkZTVkNzVmZTRmNDY4YTQ3YTg5NzBkMDNlZGFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANg%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kL2RvbmF0ZT9taWQ9NDI5MTYmaWQ9VDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR&K=Qimlj_5Av-6rKUi6T3yM9A)
|
---
[ ](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.org/c/6/?T=NDkxMDk0ODk%3AMDItYjIwMzA3LTI5MWJkZTVkNzVmZTRmNDY4YTQ3YTg5NzBkMDNlZGFm%3AZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20%3AVDE4bzlMbmV1akhoazkxUVFR%3AZmFsc2U%3ANw%3A%3AaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cudGVhcGFydHlwYXRyaW90cy5vcmcvY2l0aXplbnNmdW5kP21pZD00MjkxNiZpZD1UMThvOUxuZXVqSGhrOTFRUVE&K=RiYdJrS-KIagCLRKn4YoAQ)

clean_body: | | Thank you for everything you’ve done this year, and please make sure to pray for our country! In light of Election Day on Tuesday, not knowing what the rest of the week may hold, and everyone working around the clock the last couple of months, we have fewer action items planned this week. However, keep an eye on your email in case anything urgent pops up (i.e. there could be action items related to election follow up if there are problems). And, if nothing comes up, enjoy a restful week! Note: in order to share the links below, simply open the link, and copy the URL address, and then paste it wherever it is that you are sharing it. | Supreme Court Action If you haven’t yet, please sign and share our petition to oppose the left’s efforts to pack the Supreme Court. Now that Judge Barrett is Justice Barrett, the next fight on the horizon is protecting the Supreme Court and our constitutional liberties. | Get Out the Vote Action VOTE!!! Do not forget to vote! Whether you are voting in person or you got an absentee or mail-in ballot, you MUST vote! And be sure to help anyone you know that may need a ride to the polls or help finding out where to vote, or where to turn in their ballots. Text your Trump-friendly friends and family and ask them if they have voted yet, and if not, what you can do to help them get it done. Text or call voters on Monday and Tuesday The Democrats are still texting and calling voters, so we’d better still be doing it too! Text Messaging: 1. To get started go to: – fill out the very short form and press the “Start Texting” button! We recommend using your phone to sign up as you will be using your phone to do the text messaging. 2. You will get a text message after you’ve signed up. Click the link on your cell phone and you’ll be moved through the process. Once you send a text to the voter, go back to your browser (on your cell phone) to send the next text. If you need additional instructions. But it is very easy to sign up and start texting voters now. You can text voters every day until 8:30pm ET. Phone Banking: If you are interested in calling voters, we are near the deadline of making those calls. and we will get you plugged in! | Make Real Civics Education a Priority Again Week of November 2nd Keep an eye out every week for a new activity or book or lesson to bring real civics back to our children. This week, we are continuing last week’s lesson about voting. If you didn’t vote last week, and you are able, take your kids or grandkids with you when you vote or show them your ballot at home. Last week, we recommended this article/report from The Heritage Foundation, to help you in your discussion with your kids and grandkids about our voting system. Depend on their ages, you might need to read it and distill the ideas into something simpler, or if they’re older, you can both read it and then discuss. We also recommended talking about honesty and integrity and why it is so important to make sure our elections are fair and honest. This discussion may be especially important if your children or grandchildren are in public schools where teachers or other students are promoting universal mail-in ballots. You’ll want to make sure that your children understand why universal mail-in ballots are such a grave threat to our republic. on universal mail-in voting that could help you build a firm foundation about election integrity with your kids or grandkids. | Thank you! In liberty, Jenny Beth | PAID FOR BY TEA PARTY PATRIOTS CITIZENS FUND. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE. © 2020 2295 Towne Lake Pkwy Suite 116-328 Woodstock, GA 30189 |

body:
I will give you my honest opinion.
| [](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MhcQARhq8HB10mgXGtZrurnUT3TK5kF-I-0293npEj1485LDtsmraItwZTYBl-UFD4vKs8SYXfKZi2ddLB-BHGz61SHiGOJ6x6sMyW1ZE83SzNeAQLxshXJ6hg1SMlgm5iPa0SutjvieLVbqKtUAA_S4ztP7-IcsDiayPnETUI_ck4OrYLuXo1g3TM3jsqdnAr-n4-vKrnQyB3lx65C7JQ1lMxuSz9jQ0tkKw6FIyLgHsv_V6bP_uwnT5ETyu2kv8PsuTIVdPqa-mRIVV1FemGJtr5MUg2aBQJEuXqZR20ZjRIcYCxL3Yg==&c=2bAr6g8JOtSyTAH7NnvMuRfbbYfob0vc-aT7EzCu5OSkK--TX5VvAQ==&ch=nf3AW8h6CRMjdYdCDnRW-Hkf8I3CdEdj04v8Qgztmm8dN0VlsWr9yg==)
---
Friend,
---
I keep seeing headlines about how close elections are in Texas.
---
So, I found it deeply troubling when my Treasurer informed me that we still need to raise $28,198 before the end-of-month deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M.
---
That's certainly a lot to go in such a short period of time, but I spent the last 30 minutes calling up as many loyal Texans as I could and was able to secure a 3X-MATCH for the next hour.
---
[**Please make a contribution before 11:59 P.M. TONIGHT to help us reach our final end-of-month goal before Tuesday 's election -- and your gift will be 3X-MATCHED.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MhcQARhq8HB10mgXGtZrurnUT3TK5kF-I-0293npEj1485LDtsmraItwZTYBl-UFD4vKs8SYXfKZi2ddLB-BHGz61SHiGOJ6x6sMyW1ZE83SzNeAQLxshXJ6hg1SMlgm5iPa0SutjvieLVbqKtUAA_S4ztP7-IcsDiayPnETUI_ck4OrYLuXo1g3TM3jsqdnAr-n4-vKrnQyB3lx65C7JQ1lMxuSz9jQ0tkKw6FIyLgHsv_V6bP_uwnT5ETyu2kv8PsuTIVdPqa-mRIVV1FemGJtr5MUg2aBQJEuXqZR20ZjRIcYCxL3Yg==&c=2bAr6g8JOtSyTAH7NnvMuRfbbYfob0vc-aT7EzCu5OSkK--TX5VvAQ==&ch=nf3AW8h6CRMjdYdCDnRW-Hkf8I3CdEdj04v8Qgztmm8dN0VlsWr9yg==)
---

---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50>> $200](https://secure.winred.com/michaelburgess/mf332399979c20fd7/?utm_campaign=20201031&utm_medium=email&utm_source=CI_B&utm_content=16&amount=50)**

---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001MhcQARhq8HB10mgXGtZrurnUT3TK5kF-I-0293npEj1485LDtsmraItwZTYBl-UFD4vKs8SYXfKZi2ddLB-BHGz61SHiGOJ6x6sMyW1ZE83SzNeAQLxshXJ6hg1SMlgm5iPa0SutjvieLVbqKtUAA_S4ztP7-IcsDiayPnETUI_ck4OrYLuXo1g3TM3jsqdnAr-n4-vKrnQyB3lx65C7JQ1lMxuSz9jQ0tkKw6FIyLgHsv_V6bP_uwnT5ETyu2kv8PsuTIVdPqa-mRIVV1FemGJtr5MUg2aBQJEuXqZR20ZjRIcYCxL3Yg==&c=2bAr6g8JOtSyTAH7NnvMuRfbbYfob0vc-aT7EzCu5OSkK--TX5VvAQ==&ch=nf3AW8h6CRMjdYdCDnRW-Hkf8I3CdEdj04v8Qgztmm8dN0VlsWr9yg==)**
---
I will level with you, Friend.
---
I have my doubts that the Democrats could take all of Texas in one fell swoop.
---
Rather, this is how I see it happening: they will make inroads in San Antonio, then Houston, then Austin, then Dallas until all of Texas has fallen.
---
**_This congressional district in Dallas stands as one of our last lines of defense against a blue Texas._**
---
That's why it's not even enough to win this race. We need to win it by large margins to ward off the Left's plans to steal our state and ensure that we turn out as many voters as possible to help the man at the top of the ticket: President Donald J. Trump.

clean_body: I will give you my honest opinion. | == Friend, I keep seeing headlines about how close elections are in Texas. So, I found it deeply troubling when my Treasurer informed me that we still need to raise $28,198 before the end-of-month deadline TONIGHT at 11:59 P.M. That's certainly a lot to go in such a short period of time, but I spent the last 30 minutes calling up as many loyal Texans as I could and was able to secure a 3X-MATCH for the next hour. == == I will level with you, Friend. I have my doubts that the Democrats could take all of Texas in one fell swoop. Rather, this is how I see it happening: they will make inroads in San Antonio, then Houston, then Austin, then Dallas until all of Texas has fallen. This congressional district in Dallas stands as one of our last lines of defense against a blue Texas. That's why it's not even enough to win this race. We need to win it by large margins to ward off the Left's plans to steal our state and ensure that we turn out as many voters as possible to help the man at the top of the ticket: President Donald J. Trump. == Thank you, == Rep. Michael Burgess TX-26 Paid for by Burgess for Congress P.O. Box 2334 Denton, TX 76202 | | Burgess for Congress | P.O. Box 2334, Denton, TX 76202 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativenewsalert.net powered by

Our race is in a dead heat, friends. Late in September, we had a poll showing us within the margin of error and, since then, statewide polls have shown Texas narrowing as voters are turning out to vote in droves. In fact, election forecasters declared our state a toss up. But the Texas GOP is doing everything they can to limit our ability to vote — closing polling places, restricting mail-in ballots, and trying to get ballots tossed out in court. **They’re panicking because the math is simple: With massive turnout and momentum on our side, our race is closer than ever.** We can’t get complacent now, we need to keep getting voters to the polls. **So, go vote![_And chip in to Rick’s campaign so we can help others get their ballot cast, too._](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21101464/259561696/1282836671?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201102GOTV3_TK_all_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDQxZjFhOS0yNjFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9uaxhUhI1tY--Hcu_SWO6VbscbWi-xxAv4i47eBCKFY=)** _If you've saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately:_ | | **[Donate $10 >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21101465/259561697/-1907457921?express_lane=true&amount=10&fl_email_fr_20201102GOTV3_TK_all_xx_abx10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDQxZjFhOS0yNjFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9uaxhUhI1tY--Hcu_SWO6VbscbWi-xxAv4i47eBCKFY=)**

clean_body: Our race is in a dead heat, friends. Late in September, we had a poll showing us within the margin of error and, since then, statewide polls have shown Texas narrowing as voters are turning out to vote in droves. | = Our race is in a dead heat, friends. Late in September, we had a poll showing us within the margin of error and, since then, statewide polls have shown Texas narrowing as voters are turning out to vote in droves. In fact, election forecasters declared our state a toss up. But the Texas GOP is doing everything they can to limit our ability to vote — closing polling places, restricting mail-in ballots, and trying to get ballots tossed out in court. They’re panicking because the math is simple: With massive turnout and momentum on our side, our race is closer than ever. We can’t get complacent now, we need to keep getting voters to the polls. body:

Hi Friend,

**TOMORROW is election day and we need your help today to make sure we can push the President to the finish line!** While President Trump is back in Wisconsin today boasting the accomplishments of his first term, Democrats remain motivated to do anything it takes to ensure President Trump is not re-elected. Money from East and West Coast liberals is continuing to pour into Wisconsin. Since 2018, the Democratic Party of Wisconsin has raised $58.7 million. **Between now and the time the polls close, we are trying to raise $20,000.
**

[_**Friend, we need your help to meet our goal before the polls close?
**_
](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56765290:WZjMKWKcN:m:1:2068296031:66D5B434A04C0FDC3D8978140C74D06D:r)
President Trump won't win Wisconsin unless we have the resources to activate our grassroots army and fight back. We need your help before election day so that we can ensure a victory for President Trump.

[](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56765290:WZjMKWKcN:m:1:2068296031:66D5B434A04C0FDC3D8978140C74D06D:r)

**_[Any contribution goes a long way toward achieving victory this Tuesday.
](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/56765290:WZjMKWKcN:m:1:2068296031:66D5B434A04C0FDC3D8978140C74D06D:r)_**

This election is bigger than the Republican Party of Wisconsin. If we turn control of our country over to Joe Biden, it means more chaos and lawlessness in our cities, and an America where the radical socialist agenda of the left will be in control. _**Can President Trump count on your support?**_

Four More Years,

Mark Jefferson
Executive Director, RPW

body:
| [ ](https://act.myngp.com/el/9Qh5gyuWvuJgRlj9upaLhSJV08vMwfjp1Fcu_t1_Yc4=/YDn_LomCP1ev4TfcFyg0bldISyZ_tEDd1V0kThr680Y=)
---
| Peter, Tomorrow is Election Day. Team Spanberger will spend the day doing what we've done every single day of this campaign: **connecting with Central Virginia voters. ** [_**We 've put in the hard work over the past two years, and this people-powered campaign is bigger and stronger than it's ever been. Contribute right now to help keep up our momentum through the close of polls tomorrow.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/9Qh5gyuWvuJgRlj9upaLhSJV08vMwfjp1Fcu_t1_Yc4=/YDn_LomCP1ev4TfcFyg0bldISyZ_tEDd1V0kThr680Y=) **I 've told you many times how strong the Team Spanberger community is. And if anyone doubted the grassroots strength powering this campaign - this weekend, we proved them wrong.** This weekend, we completed hundreds of volunteer shifts, **dropped thousands of pieces of literature** through our contactless canvassing program, made nearly **100,000 phone calls and sent 35,000 text messages,** and greeted voters at their early voting locations. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/9Qh5gyuWvuJgRlj9upaLhSJV08vMwfjp1Fcu_t1_Yc4=/YDn_LomCP1ev4TfcFyg0bldISyZ_tEDd1V0kThr680Y=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/9Qh5gyuWvuJgRlj9upaLhSJV08vMwfjp1Fcu_t1_Yc4=/YDn_LomCP1ev4TfcFyg0bldISyZ_tEDd1V0kThr680Y=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/9Qh5gyuWvuJgRlj9upaLhSJV08vMwfjp1Fcu_t1_Yc4=/YDn_LomCP1ev4TfcFyg0bldISyZ_tEDd1V0kThr680Y=) **We know that in a race as close as this one, we can 't take a single voter for granted. And we know that the best way to mobilize voters is through authentic person-to-person connections and making clear that Abigail is fighting for them. ** The stakes in this election are too high to stop working until the very last voter in line has cast their ballot. There is still time for you to make a difference in this race. _**[Contribute now to our people-powered campaign and help us make the most of the time we have left.](https://act.myngp.com/el/9Qh5gyuWvuJgRlj9upaLhSJV08vMwfjp1Fcu_t1_Yc4=/YDn_LomCP1ev4TfcFyg0bldISyZ_tEDd1V0kThr680Y=)**_

name: John Cornyn
subject: the last time.
body:
Friend, This is my final fundraising email of this campaign.
Trust me, I'm just as relieved as you are. It's been a long road. I can't thank you enough for your faith and support.
As I reflect back on the race big moments, ups and downs. It is very obvious that YOU have been a constant.
You have given me confidence from beginning to end. And for that I will be forever grateful.
Friend, as you're well aware, our fight is bigger than this Senate seat.
It's about preventing radicals who are ashamed of our nation from taking total control of it.
It's about protecting the well-paying Texas jobs that our communities rely on.
It's about preserving the God-given rights enshrined in our Constitution for our children and grandchildren.
Friend, we have a sacred duty to defend the state and nation we love. Right now may be our final chance to do so.
So, one final time, I wanted to ask you, one of my most reliable, dedicated, and faithful of supporters for help... Contributions to JFC shall be allocated as follows:

1. The first $2,800 from any single individuals contribution shall go to the Texans for Senator John Cornyn Inc. general election account. The next $10,000 shall go to the Republican Party of Texas. As I reflect back on the race big moments, ups and downs. It is very obvious that YOU have been a constant. You have given me confidence from beginning to end. And for that I will be forever grateful. Friend, as you're well aware, our fight is bigger than this Senate seat. It's about preventing radicals who are ashamed of our nation from taking total control of it. It's about protecting the well-paying Texas jobs that our communities rely on. It's about preserving the God-given rights enshrined in our Constitution for our children and grandchildren. Friend, we have a sacred duty to defend the state and nation we love. Will the American Dream survive this election? I've been asking myself this question recently, and the answer is clear: Republicans are fighting to save the American Dream. But if Democrats win, we will lose it to socialism.
Friend,

Will the American Dream survive this election?

I've been asking myself this question recently, and the answer is clear: **Republicans are fighting to save the American Dream. But if Democrats win, we will lose it to socialism.**

[**Friend, please help Republicans win this election and save the American Dream by donating today.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001p4iufsb8x407r9mMd9Cg84FRo2wtYCMwdfLRXDSAVwRUPE3c_pXJ0Bl6SJffdFXcYQw8q7DiT59_iHsF7mCX1NNmJAI-HUur6cfS4dZn4hS7saLJfyyjnNJP7xYv9NiJJe8ZCHDYbHZfb_CyG3oGJQ7cNaciBPN4cX2cGfv5uo23N6Hmt8mgdxfJRtotWnLFfpv6YqA56zuxkg11hFbNd_UdRx9l7DFkTDjqQtVbN-gHyL4ffJYl0gWJVMsWfz38R1F9Zj6Kf1IG0fc8eNdsioYEJc8vYBZaECcsS5p2feNsv2UjShF6ADyGrx0a3hx3sqjOX1T_4MbEopfnT8JH4_dNTXypnfY77Nfh6LbHwHP0HMPTWTGqfjC5rxIbHqCJrWllMtmiDUSeNALrU-P9Ay2OwRNqzyDXcax-hegj7KzgiGWbpjnMRYP4dPZ9CwKm&c=Y1YqJqYRgfB0n3HEveBQBhyO8MNApdnxvkV5mFJSVMIJu7lZOOC-HQ==&ch=tRde_dD77D5hUeueOk_B7t24iGfkY7Bzrg83a_goYFppBNAXMl9Xaw==)

The freedom and opportunity America represents is so dear to the hearts of many, including my family's.

Our story is one of hard work and never giving up on America's promise as we rose from picking cotton to serving in Congress in one lifetime.

Stories like these will soon end if Democrats win this election and replace the American Dream -- that is, freedom and opportunity -- with socialism.

clean_body: Will the American Dream survive this election? I've been asking myself this question recently, and the answer is clear: Republicans are fighting to save the American Dream. But if Democrats win, we will lose it to socialism. Friend, Will the American Dream survive this election? I've been asking myself this question recently, and the answer is clear: Republicans are fighting to save the American Dream. But if Democrats win, we will lose it to socialism. == The freedom and opportunity America represents is so dear to the hearts of many, including my family's. Our story is one of hard work and never giving up on America's promise as we rose from picking cotton to serving in Congress in one lifetime. Stories like these will soon end if Democrats win this election and replace the American Dream -- that is, freedom and opportunity -- with socialism. == Friend, we can save the American Dream together, but we only have a few days left to act.== == Tim Scott PAID FOR BY TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD CHARLESTON, SC 29407 == | | TIM SCOTT FOR SENATE | 1405 ASHLEY RIVER ROAD, CHARLESTON, SC 29407 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

body:
Fight for America
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_x7y7y9oS5KE6ZSzJNBMew7zasMGqaBXro2F8hsY0nU8DUm8silRcF3j_K1cKzERlLRRavNh2B-bQttcQJKanbcNlAx25E8mNDdDf3kp0zbQ_YPzPVVYncyzIbNW1ZfmqqhnR7mnKjBLgVxAyA3RsTOR_Iui4bd6Rtyan9yWsgYxiKWDBXIOHDCAIYtOttD83AY7WBINRUuxEar4ML-SIQQWXcZOaJe7RH9s4XLzZAOPkcINP9vEHf9DgMx9wZG-VS0xFddatS-ATd0oi7Nrjs8rUti8OmQwFqIchwhz57i5cn-gU-W2J02pzkEJlB2dcjDK62UXJ8RbrpFh_zpB_ptG0N4A2aTfqGNDnl3u-kzFy0ASa0aIm6l2nj61nowliHQYE48VrERwEC5jCncMdIVhUIPdoiLr&c=UHaa70M9umotB41Jw-gW0jXn2FMzfTQEhL29r4nZqiFOSDoZAVQrXQ==&ch=LMdZ3npQaZc-mfBRVRrwyJRzH7NuC6BHAj6oWyRuzXN1GJW2xYCSyw==)

Friend,

We're down to the **FINAL DAY** of this campaign before the election. Can you believe it?

We've overcome every single obstacle that's been thrown at us so far in this marathon of a race, and we've proven our doubters wrong at every step.

_**My opponent, Jon Ossoff 's false attack ads have fallen flat.

Chuck Schumer's PACs and their millions of dollars have fallen flat.

The radical Leftist mob rule has fallen flat -- and only made us stronger!**_

I couldn't possibly be any more proud of how far we've come -- but our toughest challenge is still ahead of us, and we need to keep the momentum going.

****[ DONATE TO KEEP THE SENATE RED](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_x7y7y9oS5KE6ZSzJNBMew7zasMGqaBXro2F8hsY0nU8DUm8silRcF3j_K1cKzERlLRRavNh2B-bQttcQJKanbcNlAx25E8mNDdDf3kp0zbQ_YPzPVVYncyzIbNW1ZfmqqhnR7mnKjBLgVxAyA3RsTOR_Iui4bd6Rtyan9yWsgYxiKWDBXIOHDCAIYtOttD83AY7WBINRUuxEar4ML-SIQQWXcZOaJe7RH9s4XLzZAOPkcINP9vEHf9DgMx9wZG-VS0xFddatS-ATd0oi7Nrjs8rUti8OmQwFqIchwhz57i5cn-gU-W2J02pzkEJlB2dcjDK62UXJ8RbrpFh_zpB_ptG0N4A2aTfqGNDnl3u-kzFy0ASa0aIm6l2nj61nowliHQYE48VrERwEC5jCncMdIVhUIPdoiLr&c=UHaa70M9umotB41Jw-gW0jXn2FMzfTQEhL29r4nZqiFOSDoZAVQrXQ==&ch=LMdZ3npQaZc-mfBRVRrwyJRzH7NuC6BHAj6oWyRuzXN1GJW2xYCSyw==)****

Privileged, radical Ossoff hasn't given up this fight for his socialist agenda, and with the race still being close, we can't afford to count him out right now.

On top of that, Chuck Schumer, Stacey Abrams, and Hollywood liberals haven't stopped bankrolling his campaign. They haven't taken their foot off the gas one bit -- and neither can we!

Friend, we'll be fighting back over this last day with even more ads, more emails, and even more voter contact. I am going to be honest with you, Friend, I am counting on grassroots supporters like you more than ever as we close out this race.

We are the only organization solely focused on electing Republicans to down-ballot, state-level offices. Herschel Walker emailed you.

Friend, Herschel Walker emailed you the winning strategy for the 2020 elections. Did you get the chance to read it?

We are in the home stretch of what is the most consequential election of our lifetimes, and we must fight back against the radical Left with everything we have.

If we lose this election, we won't have the same America to pass on to our children and grandchildren- and we cannot allow that to happen. [**DONATE TODAY**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001B46IRQ2HSaykVnEaCfwH5OjV_VMBqLImcZLGGoFJ1jyxbmDphsczy1JXHZrCylr5jE1f50NcCa4CrTgH0WSiWKCWdLs1uLaSw9otWlp8wR8jmKonqTrGgdl-xtmzHLrguPBte07lqdFGkJR2KGWKhaZ7zyRv3GaKW5q2dIrxrK5GO_BfRKSuo_d9-CpQfMjN2L0uA5DjmTBC78Z3R61dQoC2jtaWqSaJhdQ9oUqoof8DNsxbvKea_PAo56hsqFvyxJRLyOEZqkp_pQKv0uYVnWeu-08IFRn5One4_pApWjhjMVfs5GuSgROXnTrLB8F1uE6F8xQbRmwvLVWzKua3mB-d40M46WMnQNIiZLCc8jIxGpHFsKgSHlksBCh8s7nK2EsPfNykd3xAC2ZxTqGP1_FeKBIn02fd&c=DpgAM1wm0cb9i9RKlSzJlUoyrTPOfRrxPn62Cae0mOGQgZBokVLViw==&ch=yFi34CDhEgIZik2b8pGTseA-z33Fv_HoG-_rEIOaeFiCxqVJF2eDwA==) to ensure that we keep America GREAT.

Friend

The Democrats are determined to reverse President Trump's America-First agenda and turn our great nation BLUE. They want to take down the President's teammates, and they've set their sights on Senator David Perdue.

The far-Left has made Georgia the focal point in their offense strategy. _**They 're convinced that if they can win here - they can win anywhere. **_

Friend, we've worked hard to develop the game plan it will take to DEFEAT Joe Biden and DEFEAT Jon Ossoff...but we need your help to keep it moving downfield!

This is the most important U.S. Senate race on the ballot in 2020 - David Perdue has been our strongest conservative fighter in Washington. He has always had President Trump's back - and that makes him the TOP TARGET for the Democrats this election.

Georgia is a **BATTLEGROUND STATE** this election that can decide who will control the Senate. This is our chance to show the Democrats that _**Georgia is not up for grabs. **_

**A new poll shows that David Perdue 's race is within the margin of error...and also shows that the Left has set their sights on this seat! **

[[KEEP SUPERIOR SLOTKIN OUT OF CONGRESS, DONATE TO SEND PAUL JUNGE]](==) She even called on her supporters to PROTEST the presidential election if it was 'too close to call.' That's why we produced an ad that we need YOUR help blasting across every battleground state before the polls are closed and there's nothing left for us to do...

We have identified 2,313,184 swing voters who could vote against Biden-Harris if they learned the truth about how radically pro-abortion the Democrat ticket is.
---
These swing voters live in Florida, Arizona, North Carolina, Montana, Michigan, Pennsylvania, Texas, and Wisconsin -- states that will decide the White House and the Senate.
---
Friend, you might be SHOCKED to hear that so many voters say **_" we didn't know that"_** when our field staffers inform them that the Biden-Harris ticket supports abortion up until 9 months in the womb.
---
But that's how powerful Planned Parenthood's propaganda has become.
---
The Big Abortion Lobby has spent millions of dollars not just to hide their political puppets' extreme positions from the public, but also to turn abortion into a completely harmless procedure, or even worse, a 'right' to be celebrated.
---
_That 's why our ad is our last fighting chance to get the TRUTH out to voters on a massive scale in states and districts that will decide the fate -- not just of our country -- but of countless human **_lives_**._
---
[**So please, make a contribution to help fund our final ad blitz exposing Kamala and Joe as the most pro-abortion ticket in American history.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0014s4_iDMXx5A-urYuWIB_7l3G8CNtUzFpG1V1zhHbdRE_Pq-NZE1Ek5amEc4HFRyDcDPQ-6DdTfDzBNYvbrBTKN_E3oycyL0UH7PGboLZBcS_G11mKQROsvQgrkdRWXbk4LmgI2MgWgD7dk5P18LjP5U4SUICRY56l2B_4LstnQ1_7cuqz3YqQZ8ZghA9GvpB2fe5svaKjg5YteshUZ4pgXOYQJHwqed9a_g5TuIy8PkJ4Hs-twDHMY_3nTD4oQPstI8UDAF0EqUUrYFZK0eC_s7caiD8aY3Ud7zK49sMIRY=&c=bu3W7n3MLlxEJJSxAhhsZNI3b1qNL9Zhaj4RsgDnETCiGA5uC5YrVg==&ch=qBXdXWsEz0bc4xAl8W8W9pHJBGVxFxhcstC9s2ex5VJ2apWSmBC9AA==)

Women Speak Out PAC (WSO PAC) is a nonconnected independent expenditure-only political committee (i.e., a federal "Super PAC") that is registered with the Federal Election Commission and is exempt from federal taxation under section 527 of the Internal Revenue Code. WSO PAC's spending is independent; it does not make contributions to, or coordinate its spending with, any candidates or political parties. WSO PAC may accept unlimited contributions from any source, including individuals, political committees, and corporations, but may not accept contributions from federal contractors or foreign nationals (except individuals who are not citizens of the United States but who are lawfully admitted for permanent residence). Federal law requires WSO PAC to use its best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer of each individual whose contribution(s) exceed $200 in a calendar year. The IRS does not allow contributions to WSO PAC to be deducted as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

Is choosing life over death too sensitive for people to hear?

President Trump said the other day that he's not just running against Biden and Kamala...
---
He's running against Big Tech and the Liberal Media who have been unjustly censoring conservatives while elevating voices on the far-Left.
---
I'm engulfed in that same battle.
---
Big tech has tried to shut me down, but just like President Trump, they picked the wrong conservatives to target.
---
They should know better than to come after an Air Force veteran and our Commander in Chief, President Donald J. Trump.

clean_body: This is now the disclaimer featured on it... | == Friend, President Trump loved my latest campaign ad so much that he posted it online for 87 million people to see. But just like the Hunter Biden corruption story, it was CENSORED. == Liberals know that our grassroots campaign could take down traitor Charlie Crist, so they're censoring me online at the final hour. This means we 'll need to scour the market to book any available last-minute TV airtime to ensure voters can see our ad loved by President Trump himself. == == == I'm trying to figure out what could possibly be so "sensitive" in my ad that got it censored by Big Tech. I open the ad by saying that my mother chose life over abortion. Is choosing life over death too sensitive for people to hear? Or perhaps it's my service in the U.S. Air Force that's been deemed too sensitive for the public? After all, a photograph of me carrying a gun in honor of our Second Amendment was also censored as a "sensitive" image. == President Trump said the other day that he's not just running against Biden and Kamala... He's running against Big Tech and the Liberal Media who have been unjustly censoring conservatives while elevating voices on the far-Left. I'm engulfed in that same battle. Big tech has tried to shut me down, but just like President Trump, they picked the wrong conservatives to target. They should know better than to come after an Air Force veteran and our Commander in Chief, President Donald J. Trump. Now let's prove them -- and the entire swamp -- wrong by ushering in a major victory TOMORROW. == Thank you, == Anna Paulina Luna Air Force Veteran Official Republican Nominee for Congress (FL-13) PAID FOR BY ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS PO Box 23064, St. Petersburg, FL 33742 Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch. | | ANNA PAULINA LUNA FOR CONGRESS | PO Box 23064, St. Petersburg, FL 33742 | | Sent by mailto:action@conservativenewsalert.net powered by

body:
This is your last chance to be a part of reclaiming our voice and values in Washington. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=28f6332bed&e=5886ca081d)

---
| Dear Friend,

We’re in the final two minutes of the game. Early voting ends at noon today. Election Day polls open tomorrow at 6:00am and close at 6:00pm (local time).

Jackie Walorski, with her gerrymandered District and one million dollars in contributions from outside corporate PACs this year, assumes that she will win this race. She’s wrong. Jackie has fouled out.

---
| | [We need to raise $5K today for our full court press:](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=9e13916780&e=5886ca081d)
* [First, let’s gut the power of Jackie’s outside corporate PACs by a grassroots generosity of donations on the final day before the election that Jackie Walorski and her funders do not see coming.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=756a443745&e=5886ca081d)

* [Second, let’s sweep this District with a Blue Wave.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=037a785e60&e=5886ca081d)

* [Third, and finally, let’s make the truth and goodness of the people of this District heard with our victory on November 3.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=8af9ebae0f&e=5886ca081d)

name: Elizabeth Ahrens, MJ for Texas
subject: 🚨 They’re trying to silence Harris County voters 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We're not going to sit back and let them get away with it.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891da5/7f51f7bc/599ff6fb/4efb1913/1779410684/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | | **VOTER PROTECTION FUND
GOAL: $450,000**

**URGENT: Don 't let them silence voters!**
| [HELP FIGHT BACK](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891da5/7f51f7bc/599ff6fb/4efb1912/1779410684/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0NzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-voterfund?refcode=email_20201102.1nd__2472__&amount=10")
---
Peter -- Sen. Cornyn's political allies are stooping to a new low.

With Election Day still left to go, this is _already_ the highest-turnout election in Texas history. Texans are proving they're sick of the status quo, and that kind of enthusiasm is scaring the hell out of Sen. Cornyn and his political allies.

So now, Texas Republicans, led by one of John Cornyn's longtime donors, are **trying to silence more than 100,000 Harris County voters and challenge the votes they cast!** We won't stand for it -- that's why we're fighting back in court, **[and we need your support RIGHT NOW.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891da5/7f51f7bc/599ff6fb/4efb1912/1779410684/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0NzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-voterfund?refcode=email_20201102.1nd__2472__&amount=10")**

Donations from our best supporters are absolutely CRITICAL in these final days -- not only will they fund our massive GOTV push, they'll help us fight to make sure every Texans' vote is counted. I need you to dig deep for MJ and for democracy.

**[Those votes MATTER and we CAN'T let them silence Texas voters -- so please, support our voter protection efforts by giving right now.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891da5/7f51f7bc/599ff6fb/4efb1912/1779410684/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0NzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-voterfund?refcode=email_20201102.1nd__2472__&amount=10")**

MJ has been working for the people for years, and they are showing up to vote for her. **_We have to make sure that those voters are heard!_**

| | Unite with other believers in prayer for the elections
---

| Peter, We are a nation founded on Judeo-Christian principles. Those who came before us faithfully sought the Lord, and if we want God’s blessing on America today, we must do the same. Join us tonight, **[_November 2, at 6:30 PM ET / 3:30 PM PT_](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2zkTyI4X97qBAs0cigmSK0uDdEkTdoyvirSxYMo7nnidtgnFEWKZ6LUm5q19KKBpO4V0vOoaoSTT6vPYOwOi9YJuNO99QwQDpQrcQsaVc4NfseQGlTjNb-hCC80NAERgp0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201102com01&n=2 "RSVP for Election Eve

Worship and Prayer") **for a time or worship and prayer for our nation. The event will feature worship led by The Jordan Family Band, The Nelons, The Sound, Wes Hampton, Marlana Vahoose, Jeff Stice, and more. Prayers will be given by Dr. Jack Graham, Rev. Samuel Rodriguez, Kirk Cameron, Mike Huckabee, and Bishop Harry Jackson. RSVP by clicking the button below and join us for this vital time of prayer for the elections. [](https://www2.myfaithvotes.org/r?u=6_nuz-gPbh4AR2HufX66ialYcXT_zXlvb_7Pz58ha2zkTyI4X97qBAs0cigmSK0uDdEkTdoyvirSxYMo7nnidtgnFEWKZ6LUm5q19KKBpO4V0vOoaoSTT6vPYOwOi9YJuNO99QwQDpQrcQsaVc4NfseQGlTjNb-hCC80NAERgp0&e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=e201102com01&n=3) **Pray. Think. Vote.** Jason Yates
CEO

Friend,
---
I don't want to end this race with any regrets, so I'm asking you for a final contribution to win back this seat in Congress.
---
Pelosi bought this district in 2018 by outraising the Republican by $800,000.
---
I would just hate to think that we lose on Tuesday all because we got outraised again.
---
_I 've opened up my own wallet many times during this race because I believe that you deserve a representative who will put her money where her mouth is -- so I'm going to do it one last time._

body:
⏳ We have less than 24 hours until the polls open.
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/80286fdb2f8c5a71/d383e4043944b1a6c3d6b838967d376c/32613) Hey Fellow Conservative, You know all that’s at stake in this election – the Democrats and radical-left are determined to drag our nation down a dangerous and destructive path. **With so much on the line for Alabama and our great nation, we MUST stand united to defeat them at the ballot box!** It all comes down to tomorrow, Fellow Conservative. Take a moment right now to make your plan to VOTE FOR JERRY CARL. Then, please forward this message to at least five family members and friends. The polls will be open from 7:00 a.m. until 7:00 p.m. **[🚨Vote TOMORROW! Find your polling location 🚨](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/80286fdb2f8c5a71/9b36c73b91dbbb05c3d6b838967d376c/32613)** I’m so proud of the campaign we’ve run, and grateful for all your support along the way. Now, it’s time to close strong and get the job done. Help us score a big win tomorrow. **Please make sure to get out to vote tomorrow and share the word by forwarding on this reminder email!** \- Jerry | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/80286fdb2f8c5a71/0a4a73606a6745bcc3d6b838967d376c/32613) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/80286fdb2f8c5a71/c6921d52b2299be3c3d6b838967d376c/32613)

clean_body: ⏳ We have less than 24 hours until the polls open. Hey Fellow Conservative, You know all that’s at stake in this election – the Democrats and radical-left are determined to drag our nation down a dangerous and destructive path. With so much on the line for Alabama and our great nation, we MUST stand united to defeat them at the ballot box! It all comes down to tomorrow, Fellow Conservative. Take a moment right now to make your plan to VOTE FOR JERRY CARL. Then, please forward this message to at least five family members and friends. The polls will be open from 7:00 a.m. until 7:00 p.m. I’m so proud of the campaign we’ve run, and grateful for all your support along the way. Now, it’s time to close strong and get the job done. Help us score a big win tomorrow. Please make sure to get out to vote tomorrow and share the word by forwarding on this reminder email! \- Jerry | | | ---|--- To ensure you receive our emails, please add votecarl@jerrycarlupdates.com to your safe senders list or address book! id:2020-10-26-19:16:56:993t Paid for by Jerry Carl for Congress
