name: Susan Collins
subject: The fate of the Senate will be decided tomorrow.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Collins for Senator
body:
It all comes down to tomorrow.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DymkaijHp9dCzYtWMVksKtIel6VUbf9C1G2wjXHMjw--CKhgFwRd0gjwtOy3-l8RzfwyKJIdg1qChiKn90UfJsWLQgHVCMuPwbzTlIAbeRQIXCovLuOEfkIt36afBjYieQGuy2e20kVsRzjp4pxSwtQ3UFLU_gg9eTbI4eqn0v2IPO4CPG5-uu4TrLkSBhAeDSJHYVNAtyL3Kndc61WaAe1gC9joZiWe5UkGorTvRFGs1kruRrl0qSqYIjiDRKVJvpMZYeudiwO5LmMg3oZSoQjw7PGNfViEBxsmJdD6p_68SezcEySolXwV2VrhXwzM6piERzkKEgdiQnglcTnNhdfS1vhULXXpCYBl32a7NDt-f5yZSHCyL8Uw1D3F1o-_R1iYqSiUGk5x6c-Rm7EQ4KbRb9vX1laOMKD31PTNgHGeTEcFZiyj9XSilnf6t5pZ&c=v4Mx6DZWRuaumwp7a8NaxtGutLLse9eEBdGKCgm0TnpnsydaaZt2-g==&ch=AqvcFCn_Swv-ctFadmTCj71hzIlWTx4GrXddkMxQpDZR1Y34qigCRw==)
Dear Friend,
_The fate of the United States Senate will be decided TOMORROW._ And let me tell you, this race has been unlike anything I have ever seen.
Over a year ago, my opponent and Chuck Schumer decided that they were going to do everything in their power to remove me from office and turn the Senate blue. They launched countless false attacks against me, smearing my character and record. They backed these attacks by funneling MILLIONS of dark money dollars onto Maine's airwaves. The attacks have only gotten worse with each passing day.
**They thought they could buy Maine 's Senate seat. Chuck Schumer thought he could buy a Senate majority. But Friend -- we MUST show them they can't. **
There is only one day until Election Day. It is absolutely critical that my campaign has the resources to fight back in these final few hours before Mainers head to the polls. [**Can I count on you to make a last minute donation today and help PROTECT the Senate?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DymkaijHp9dCzYtWMVksKtIel6VUbf9C1G2wjXHMjw--CKhgFwRd0gjwtOy3-l8RzfwyKJIdg1qChiKn90UfJsWLQgHVCMuPwbzTlIAbeRQIXCovLuOEfkIt36afBjYieQGuy2e20kVsRzjp4pxSwtQ3UFLU_gg9eTbI4eqn0v2IPO4CPG5-uu4TrLkSBhAeDSJHYVNAtyL3Kndc61WaAe1gC9joZiWe5UkGorTvRFGs1kruRrl0qSqYIjiDRKVJvpMZYeudiwO5LmMg3oZSoQjw7PGNfViEBxsmJdD6p_68SezcEySolXwV2VrhXwzM6piERzkKEgdiQnglcTnNhdfS1vhULXXpCYBl32a7NDt-f5yZSHCyL8Uw1D3F1o-_R1iYqSiUGk5x6c-Rm7EQ4KbRb9vX1laOMKD31PTNgHGeTEcFZiyj9XSilnf6t5pZ&c=v4Mx6DZWRuaumwp7a8NaxtGutLLse9eEBdGKCgm0TnpnsydaaZt2-g==&ch=AqvcFCn_Swv-ctFadmTCj71hzIlWTx4GrXddkMxQpDZR1Y34qigCRw==)
[_DONATE NOW_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001DymkaijHp9dCzYtWMVksKtIel6VUbf9C1G2wjXHMjw--CKhgFwRd0gjwtOy3-l8RzfwyKJIdg1qChiKn90UfJsWLQgHVCMuPwbzTlIAbeRQIXCovLuOEfkIt36afBjYieQGuy2e20kVsRzjp4pxSwtQ3UFLU_gg9eTbI4eqn0v2IPO4CPG5-uu4TrLkSBhAeDSJHYVNAtyL3Kndc61WaAe1gC9joZiWe5UkGorTvRFGs1kruRrl0qSqYIjiDRKVJvpMZYeudiwO5LmMg3oZSoQjw7PGNfViEBxsmJdD6p_68SezcEySolXwV2VrhXwzM6piERzkKEgdiQnglcTnNhdfS1vhULXXpCYBl32a7NDt-f5yZSHCyL8Uw1D3F1o-_R1iYqSiUGk5x6c-Rm7EQ4KbRb9vX1laOMKD31PTNgHGeTEcFZiyj9XSilnf6t5pZ&c=v4Mx6DZWRuaumwp7a8NaxtGutLLse9eEBdGKCgm0TnpnsydaaZt2-g==&ch=AqvcFCn_Swv-ctFadmTCj71hzIlWTx4GrXddkMxQpDZR1Y34qigCRw==)

This is it. There are no do-overs. We MUST raise more money in these final few hours in order to win on Tuesday. I hope I can count on your support right now!
Thank you for everything. We are almost at the finish line!

Susan Collins

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Chip in for pizza for our Republican volunteers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cotton for Senate
body:
Across the country we are seeing incredible hard work from patriotic Americans who want to re-elect President Trump and elect Republicans up and down the ballot. While Joe Biden's campaign hides in the basement, our teams are out spreading our conservative message to the voters. I want to thank all my volunteers who have put in THOUSANDS of hours of work to help me win.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KgKZ2v-nby_K2PRCh6s6fyiIw5xGlR7elEiFhz-DHgfZSlsdzHxWqvryxS9La8yl_X-WLtY4ocZDLFvFVw84oiLo0DDcMs9qfYyX0hgzTbInOgPQAWmUrRPJrqCfGJyMoIdv-HBNgQENAbfaYeaeTomPaYv95fdPeEEkZaUtjKQ_9yfqeSsJB1wATTIbHFFObQybC6_80YVpd54eflNdKO0xF7B1dzwD0QKEeSLRqpy1iQmM0VeoGyDJrHyQUSQg0rcOeTXOaJeagTBu4zqxyKzgXgh2Aq2vOY4OFAkNHElh7qsNbbraqgbAo_N41xjrYrAdjEb2enh3_xAPgBiXnUsui73fylN7-4vEEGoYEWrtw8aYBJSbWEzWzuwjY2ouG9d3aQmZDDw4Xl94Afsy2EPH-72buLnTf5mvn0jDg6JXM7PL2_uTel5ibakH2pOSwl13TdYRYxE=&c=v-02VG3HQRyh8ChI-fruKmw_U_9VDXeCcvi_yS94FJXifNJ4adqydQ==&ch=5x8UIQs-DzxkiBgxuE6wIf__Ef9_5HmL9gC03f3zasoiS7DwEWZE_w==)

Friend,

Across the country we are seeing incredible hard work from patriotic Americans who want to re-elect President Trump and elect Republicans up and down the ballot.

**While Joe Biden 's campaign hides in the basement, our teams are out spreading our conservative message to the voters.**

I want to thank all my volunteers who have put in THOUSANDS of hours of work to help me win.

Whether it's putting up a yard sign, participating in a Trump parade, making phone calls, stuffing envelopes or knocking on doors--grassroots conservatives are making the difference.

I want to especially thank Brylane who knocked on 2,000 doors for our great candidates in Arkansas.

[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KgKZ2v-nby_K2PRCh6s6fyiIw5xGlR7elEiFhz-DHgfZSlsdzHxWqvryxS9La8yl_X-WLtY4ocZDLFvFVw84oiLo0DDcMs9qfYyX0hgzTbInOgPQAWmUrRPJrqCfGJyMoIdv-HBNgQENAbfaYeaeTomPaYv95fdPeEEkZaUtjKQ_9yfqeSsJB1wATTIbHFFObQybC6_80YVpd54eflNdKO0xF7B1dzwD0QKEeSLRqpy1iQmM0VeoGyDJrHyQUSQg0rcOeTXOaJeagTBu4zqxyKzgXgh2Aq2vOY4OFAkNHElh7qsNbbraqgbAo_N41xjrYrAdjEb2enh3_xAPgBiXnUsui73fylN7-4vEEGoYEWrtw8aYBJSbWEzWzuwjY2ouG9d3aQmZDDw4Xl94Afsy2EPH-72buLnTf5mvn0jDg6JXM7PL2_uTel5ibakH2pOSwl13TdYRYxE=&c=v-02VG3HQRyh8ChI-fruKmw_U_9VDXeCcvi_yS94FJXifNJ4adqydQ==&ch=5x8UIQs-DzxkiBgxuE6wIf__Ef9_5HmL9gC03f3zasoiS7DwEWZE_w==)

**Brylane and the rest of our volunteers are going to be working hard right up until the polls close on election night.**

**Friend, Will you help fund our volunteers for the final two days?** They need rides, signs, literature, and...yes--**PIZZA.**

[**Chip in $10 to our Volunteer Pizza Fund**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KgKZ2v-nby_K2PRCh6s6fyiIw5xGlR7elEiFhz-DHgfZSlsdzHxWqvryxS9La8yl_X-WLtY4ocZDLFvFVw84oiLo0DDcMs9qfYyX0hgzTbInOgPQAWmUrRPJrqCfGJyMoIdv-HBNgQENAbfaYeaeTomPaYv95fdPeEEkZaUtjKQ_9yfqeSsJB1wATTIbHFFObQybC6_80YVpd54eflNdKO0xF7B1dzwD0QKEeSLRqpy1iQmM0VeoGyDJrHyQUSQg0rcOeTXOaJeagTBu4zqxyKzgXgh2Aq2vOY4OFAkNHElh7qsNbbraqgbAo_N41xjrYrAdjEb2enh3_xAPgBiXnUsui73fylN7-4vEEGoYEWrtw8aYBJSbWEzWzuwjY2ouG9d3aQmZDDw4Xl94Afsy2EPH-72buLnTf5mvn0jDg6JXM7PL2_uTel5ibakH2pOSwl13TdYRYxE=&c=v-02VG3HQRyh8ChI-fruKmw_U_9VDXeCcvi_yS94FJXifNJ4adqydQ==&ch=5x8UIQs-DzxkiBgxuE6wIf__Ef9_5HmL9gC03f3zasoiS7DwEWZE_w==)

[**Any amount you can give will be greatly appreciated and will go towards fueling our volunteers in the final few hours of the campaign.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KgKZ2v-nby_K2PRCh6s6fyiIw5xGlR7elEiFhz-DHgfZSlsdzHxWqvryxS9La8yl_X-WLtY4ocZDLFvFVw84oiLo0DDcMs9qfYyX0hgzTbInOgPQAWmUrRPJrqCfGJyMoIdv-HBNgQENAbfaYeaeTomPaYv95fdPeEEkZaUtjKQ_9yfqeSsJB1wATTIbHFFObQybC6_80YVpd54eflNdKO0xF7B1dzwD0QKEeSLRqpy1iQmM0VeoGyDJrHyQUSQg0rcOeTXOaJeagTBu4zqxyKzgXgh2Aq2vOY4OFAkNHElh7qsNbbraqgbAo_N41xjrYrAdjEb2enh3_xAPgBiXnUsui73fylN7-4vEEGoYEWrtw8aYBJSbWEzWzuwjY2ouG9d3aQmZDDw4Xl94Afsy2EPH-72buLnTf5mvn0jDg6JXM7PL2_uTel5ibakH2pOSwl13TdYRYxE=&c=v-02VG3HQRyh8ChI-fruKmw_U_9VDXeCcvi_yS94FJXifNJ4adqydQ==&ch=5x8UIQs-DzxkiBgxuE6wIf__Ef9_5HmL9gC03f3zasoiS7DwEWZE_w==)

I know you are probably overwhelmed with emails and text messages asking for donations in these final few hours, but our grassroots volunteers are counting on you to step up and help fund our final push.
[Chip In NOW](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KgKZ2v-nby_K2PRCh6s6fyiIw5xGlR7elEiFhz-DHgfZSlsdzHxWqvryxS9La8yl_X-WLtY4ocZDLFvFVw84oiLo0DDcMs9qfYyX0hgzTbInOgPQAWmUrRPJrqCfGJyMoIdv-HBNgQENAbfaYeaeTomPaYv95fdPeEEkZaUtjKQ_9yfqeSsJB1wATTIbHFFObQybC6_80YVpd54eflNdKO0xF7B1dzwD0QKEeSLRqpy1iQmM0VeoGyDJrHyQUSQg0rcOeTXOaJeagTBu4zqxyKzgXgh2Aq2vOY4OFAkNHElh7qsNbbraqgbAo_N41xjrYrAdjEb2enh3_xAPgBiXnUsui73fylN7-4vEEGoYEWrtw8aYBJSbWEzWzuwjY2ouG9d3aQmZDDw4Xl94Afsy2EPH-72buLnTf5mvn0jDg6JXM7PL2_uTel5ibakH2pOSwl13TdYRYxE=&c=v-02VG3HQRyh8ChI-fruKmw_U_9VDXeCcvi_yS94FJXifNJ4adqydQ==&ch=5x8UIQs-DzxkiBgxuE6wIf__Ef9_5HmL9gC03f3zasoiS7DwEWZE_w==)

In service,[
](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KgKZ2v-nby_K2PRCh6s6fyiIw5xGlR7elEiFhz-DHgfZSlsdzHxWqvryxS9La8yl_X-WLtY4ocZDLFvFVw84oiLo0DDcMs9qfYyX0hgzTbInOgPQAWmUrRPJrqCfGJyMoIdv-HBNgQENAbfaYeaeTomPaYv95fdPeEEkZaUtjKQ_9yfqeSsJB1wATTIbHFFObQybC6_80YVpd54eflNdKO0xF7B1dzwD0QKEeSLRqpy1iQmM0VeoGyDJrHyQUSQg0rcOeTXOaJeagTBu4zqxyKzgXgh2Aq2vOY4OFAkNHElh7qsNbbraqgbAo_N41xjrYrAdjEb2enh3_xAPgBiXnUsui73fylN7-4vEEGoYEWrtw8aYBJSbWEzWzuwjY2ouG9d3aQmZDDw4Xl94Afsy2EPH-72buLnTf5mvn0jDg6JXM7PL2_uTel5ibakH2pOSwl13TdYRYxE=&c=v-02VG3HQRyh8ChI-fruKmw_U_9VDXeCcvi_yS94FJXifNJ4adqydQ==&ch=5x8UIQs-DzxkiBgxuE6wIf__Ef9_5HmL9gC03f3zasoiS7DwEWZE_w==)

body:
Friend,

_**The Senate standings have SHIFTED. **_

Conservatives are making a huge last-second push and we need your help to get us across the finish line.

**In the last 24 hours, several races have shifted in favor of conservatives and it 's all because of our grassroots efforts.** Conservatives are stepping up when it matters most and now we're close to turning this whole thing around.

[_**HELP CONSERVATIVES CROSS THE FINISH LINE >>>**_](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_Gm7ESMZvxrNhiD7xdthwn_OhABe8lsarUYcb42VsCcN3zEKFbPoz6Tf3Jawg97q4z9yF5MZ5HEim2Insx3IYl9dmx0sgUfkTggDquNRzE455u5FMEAS7N06b3JVwcAIoRvL7MWICGsdhR68duyxHoGHEpEAFjH2iOC45FjQGOnV_-STmm01_2nz0GpQ6iKitojw6ZreNKW6C9sdzNXuOsn6CAQloZ6zcrI1ssXrMxDo5QUVtPC_zuo0IogLYt9mozpLn3d0hvw0G4NHOSAthb5xfJRJ0SVX4vlqhGbjK0N5YDUn_vkZSA--dWdz0hdvYEg0ItznIOCkR6EvXLgbu1Un9f6-t1RESGf4t0Uxxj77yPhWImqOzzxmPhHDqk1Pb7OPwdy9wbFmB6znDfmoWYM23_wJbAuLjzlYEXFl6KLoQSx0CIF762zyswaAxbrBG60YJF48LZM=&c=wfkGvDS5KN-IMdjQdNQ8HGiu9B1-PWwqSH-Ca2ocWjswiGUfYHcy0w==&ch=OKZCXsr9y6MwU1hhAfDJsSjaQ2g67DbsF5ah7U8lXYIYl9GYLCS6pg==)

It's critical Conservatives keep this momentum going into tomorrow. [**We are on the brink of closing the gap and your support has never been as critical as it is right now. Please, Friend, can you chip in $50, $25, $10 or just $5 right now to make this comeback official?**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001_Gm7ESMZvxrNhiD7xdthwn_OhABe8lsarUYcb42VsCcN3zEKFbPoz6Tf3Jawg97q4z9yF5MZ5HEim2Insx3IYl9dmx0sgUfkTggDquNRzE455u5FMEAS7N06b3JVwcAIoRvL7MWICGsdhR68duyxHoGHEpEAFjH2iOC45FjQGOnV_-STmm01_2nz0GpQ6iKitojw6ZreNKW6C9sdzNXuOsn6CAQloZ6zcrI1ssXrMxDo5QUVtPC_zuo0IogLYt9mozpLn3d0hvw0G4NHOSAthb5xfJRJ0SVX4vlqhGbjK0N5YDUn_vkZSA--dWdz0hdvYEg0ItznIOCkR6EvXLgbu1Un9f6-t1RESGf4t0Uxxj77yPhWImqOzzxmPhHDqk1Pb7OPwdy9wbFmB6znDfmoWYM23_wJbAuLjzlYEXFl6KLoQSx0CIF762zyswaAxbrBG60YJF48LZM=&c=wfkGvDS5KN-IMdjQdNQ8HGiu9B1-PWwqSH-Ca2ocWjswiGUfYHcy0w==&ch=OKZCXsr9y6MwU1hhAfDJsSjaQ2g67DbsF5ah7U8lXYIYl9GYLCS6pg==)

_**The future of our country comes down to the next 24 hours**_ and we can't afford to take our foot off the gas. Help Senate Conservatives finish their fight against the socialist left before it's too late.

Thank you for all of your help thus far.

Best,
Marco Rubio

disclaimer_text: Paid For By Team Graham, Inc
body:
Team Graham needs your help to fight back because, as we've seen, there's nothing the Left isn't prepared to do or say to defeat us in November. _We'd hate to see you go but if you'd like to unsubscribe,[click here.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/os7Vz3WKXN)****_

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56767789:s7Vz3WKXN:m:1:2247059263:756F19477B0A0698AF2A9FACD1F40A07:r)
---
Peter - we know you've been getting a lot of emails from us, but we want to explain why **[your $5 is so important.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56767789:s7Vz3WKXN:m:1:2247059263:756F19477B0A0698AF2A9FACD1F40A07:r)**

Senator Graham's Democrat opponent has raised over $36 million this year alone.

_**Why?**_ Because the Radical Left is obsessed with defeating Senator Lindsey Graham this November. Ever since Senator Graham came to the defense of Justice Brett Kavanaugh, he's been one of the top fundraising targets for radical Super PACs, left-wing billionaires, and members of the Hollywood elite.

Senator Graham continues to stand with President Trump and confirm conservative judges, and that makes the Left even MADDER. There is no pair they want to defeat more than this duo.

Team Graham needs your help to fight back because, as we've seen, there's nothing the Left isn't prepared to do or say to defeat us in November.

This is just the beginning. Over 93% of our opponent's record-setting fundraising total was from outside South Carolina. You know the liberals are planning to top that number again. _Team Graham must look to trusted supporters like you._

**[So Peter, can we count on you to chip in $5?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56767789:s7Vz3WKXN:m:1:2247059263:756F19477B0A0698AF2A9FACD1F40A07:r)**

**[Chip in $5->](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56767790:s7Vz3WKXN:m:1:2247059263:756F19477B0A0698AF2A9FACD1F40A07:r)**
**[Chip in $10->](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56767791:s7Vz3WKXN:m:1:2247059263:756F19477B0A0698AF2A9FACD1F40A07:r)**
**[Chip in $20->](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56767792:s7Vz3WKXN:m:1:2247059263:756F19477B0A0698AF2A9FACD1F40A07:r)**
**[Or donate another amount->](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56767789:s7Vz3WKXN:m:1:2247059263:756F19477B0A0698AF2A9FACD1F40A07:r)**
The Radical Left wants to twist Senator Graham's record and eventually see him defeated. We know if you stand with Team Graham today, we'll have the resources to set the record straight and secure a victory.

Let's continue to build our momentum to a HUGE November victory!

Thank you,

[LindseyGraham.com](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56767789:s7Vz3WKXN:m:1:2247059263:756F19477B0A0698AF2A9FACD1F40A07:r)

name: Rep. Jim Jordan
subject: My closing message
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
Do you have :30 seconds to watch my final campaign ad? Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.]({{unsubscribeUrl}})

| [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/56768011:WmxHJWK7N:m:1:2247059263:ACFD6750CA5C0772BAB12B23D7934906:r)
---

Peter,

In 2006, I was elected to defend the Constitution of the United States of America; I've never let anything distract me from that mission - and it's exactly what I'll continue doing if re-elected to on November 3rd.

name: Team Franklin
subject: Do you want to volunteer tomorrow?
body:
Good afternoon,

Thank you for your interest in the Scott Franklin for Congress campaign. We are still looking for volunteers to wave signs at precincts tomorrow from **7 a.m. - 7 p.m.** in Hillsborough, Lake, and Polk Counties. Scott needs all hands on deck as we head into Election Day!

If you are interested in waving signs, **please respond to this email****** and we will coordinate a precinct location that is most convenient for you. Onward to victory!

Kind regards,
Team Franklin

subject: Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends for John Carney
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/qHSOOfdDSz4JrfuMq33PlQ==/viKaTMIqQvQnr13eHvPc1w==?midqs=4gJlY1wVT68ae09SDewk9g==)
---

**FROM THE TEAM**

**Tomorrow is Election Day. **

We are so grateful for your support throughout this campaign - but we need your help today and tomorrow to help get us over the finish line. Do you have your plan to vote? Check in with friends and family and make sure they have a plan, too.

Still have your vote-by-mail or absentee ballot? **Do not put your ballot in the mail. Drop your ballot off at a secure drop box in your county. **

If you're voting in person, find your polling place at: iwillvote.com

[**SHARE**](https://act.myngp.com/el/qHSOOfdDSz4JrfuMq33PlQ==/AtAPp7Ss5guIANDxceZtow==) and [**TWEET **](https://act.myngp.com/el/qHSOOfdDSz4JrfuMq33PlQ==/hyjjuPJiY4takSOiRJ76ow==)this message with your friends and family.

name: Ted Cruz
subject: Last email – please read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McSally for Senate, Inc
body:
Despite Martha being outraised and outspent 2:1 by the Democrat Machine, this race is STILL within the margin of error! This race could be decided by just a few thousand votes.
[](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001t4pfJPKC6-opcnzTQuh81kF10fEMAUE7HWPIJTkYsYk3J1ykqVsYTy7y0FC_Omq36AF_nqWyZFzRKVGCK9yBzu1ylymaKItpiVHN3qlRVxXFnemE2Gs42MyGYvssaK9Repj01gP9J7uttPWqnhb03IOX8I49epm0RGGKgDr4IxKCC2_fUFz5OpJjDVKTr6CKuGCCM0kQon7Gbs1BMGgI-zeEWe4Q5hzuou_Ta1QDZwAIE2H7AGahrlKLmvjxqBhdCvZ7jeFaL5ohuhTYcMRyBIsklHjYTHX7I1DLn-8Vl3Jo5rzcpoIfgj_8E0Ou0_CMp5KhAKcN8GRl_NVWrDhABtxoLgam9b0l7hFl6aK4AwmxV1rWNUTPu5yu5hpn7jYIopFve4kUSoo=&c=LKQU_NalugThO-mAXxB3OZCjJ6qamVvqDb-3r8bMdxb-uzo-7408Gg==&ch=cS9ldN1mPg0w3ArY2B93dQedComb_mh6nS5pJLKSaXZKjUNLeMmXSQ==)
Friend,

I'm reaching out to you one final time before the most consequential election of our lifetimes.

It is looking more and more like control of the Senate could come down to Arizona. Democrats are making their final push, spending MILLIONS from out of state donors to turn this battleground and our Senate Majority blue.

**Here 's the thing, despite Martha being outraised and outspent 2:1 by the Democrat Machine, this race is STILL within the margin of error!** [**Help me give Martha the surge of resources she needs to defend this must-win state. The future of our Senate ****Majority could depend on YOU!**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001t4pfJPKC6-opcnzTQuh81kF10fEMAUE7HWPIJTkYsYk3J1ykqVsYTy7y0FC_Omq36AF_nqWyZFzRKVGCK9yBzu1ylymaKItpiVHN3qlRVxXFnemE2Gs42MyGYvssaK9Repj01gP9J7uttPWqnhb03IOX8I49epm0RGGKgDr4IxKCC2_fUFz5OpJjDVKTr6CKuGCCM0kQon7Gbs1BMGgI-zeEWe4Q5hzuou_Ta1QDZwAIE2H7AGahrlKLmvjxqBhdCvZ7jeFaL5ohuhTYcMRyBIsklHjYTHX7I1DLn-8Vl3Jo5rzcpoIfgj_8E0Ou0_CMp5KhAKcN8GRl_NVWrDhABtxoLgam9b0l7hFl6aK4AwmxV1rWNUTPu5yu5hpn7jYIopFve4kUSoo=&c=LKQU_NalugThO-mAXxB3OZCjJ6qamVvqDb-3r8bMdxb-uzo-7408Gg==&ch=cS9ldN1mPg0w3ArY2B93dQedComb_mh6nS5pJLKSaXZKjUNLeMmXSQ==)

**With the Election only hours away, Martha is running out of time to close the gap.** This race could be decided by just a few thousand votes. If we don't act now to help get Martha's message out to every grassroots conservative, we could lose everything.

| | Tomorrow is the day we have been waiting for and there is no time to waste, so I’ll keep this short.

**Now is the time to invest in our campaign if you have not already.**

We are so close to flipping Illinois 16. We are running a strong campaign with an army of volunteers and we were able to keep our ads up on the air in the final weeks of the race. I’m feeling very good about our chances.

But I need your help to keep the momentum going and get us across that finish line. [Can I count on you to rush a last-minute gift to our campaign?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=d8b51e7595&e=140a9b81e7)

name: True the Vote
subject: Vote. Work. Pray.
body:
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2915)
---
| | Here we are in the final countdown. Everything we've fought for leads up to tomorrow. However, the battle for election integrity is far from over. As we head into the final hours before Election Day, we encourage you to stay focused and Vote, Work, Pray!
True the Vote is going LIVE on our YouTube channel today at 5:00 pm CT / 6:00 pm ET! Join Founder and President Catherine Engelbrecht as she dives into the latest issues around the most important election in our lifetime. Visit our YouTube page at [youtube.com/truethevote](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2924), click the notification bell to set a reminder, tune in when you get the notification, and join the conversation!

---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2924)
---
| | |
---
| | [ WATCH HERE ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2924)
---
| | |
---
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2933)
---
| | | [VOTE.](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2933) If you or someone you know hasn't voted yet, make sure to get it done tomorrow. True the Vote offers [State-by-State Voter Guides](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2933) for all 50 states with important information on when to vote, where to vote, and what to bring with you to the polls. Download, print, and share them with others! Reach out to us if you have questions!
---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2918)
---
| | | [WORK.](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2918) Our [Election Integrity Hotline](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2918) is a 24/7, bilingual resource to support election workers, poll watchers, and all voters during this unprecedented time. If you've witnessed fraud or manipulation, call our hotline at 855-702-0702 or visit truethevote.org to submit a report online. We are all citizen watchdogs, so keep this number in your phone and reach out if you have questions or need to report something. True the Vote is committed to ensuring a free and fair election for every voter, no matter their party or political ideology.

---
| | |
---
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2934)
---
| | | [PRAY.](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2934) We’re encouraging Americans to continue to pray for our leaders and for this election through [Pray the Vote](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2934), the largest interactive election prayer initiative in history. This project guides Americans to unite in prayer for the election through an engaging online experience, including an interactive map displaying ballot processing center locations across the nation. Over 5 million Americans have joined us to pray for the election so far!
---
| | |
---
| | Wherever you are, make sure you [#VoteWorkPray](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2935), and help us spread the message with other voters.

Thanks for your continued support.
Onward! The True the Vote Team

[P.S. The fight for election integrity is not over, and True the Vote is not backing down. Please consider donating or becoming a recurring giver, so we can keep pressing.](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2936)

---
| | [ PLEASE DONATE TO THE CAUSE ](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2936)
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Join the conversation on social:
---
| | | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2919) | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2920) | | [](https://truethevote.acemlnb.com/lt.php?s=8bd62f454a89069e58200a8ac4751d38&i=289A657A20A2921)

subject: GO VOTE
body:
Let your voice be heard
---

| Patriot,
Tomorrow's election is going to be one of the most important in America's history.
That's why we wanted to give our team another reminder to get out and VOTE if you haven't already!
President Trump and Kat Cammack are ready to go to work protecting our Second Amendment rights and border security, while rejecting the radical agenda of the far-left.
But in order to do so, these patriots need YOUR VOTE! Make your voice heard TOMORROW so that Kat and the President can protect our country!
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0011ZwctSHPFVqV_FgOUBv-0mTGiXIRd-aZ_mtRk3lC-oydJcW3Ae41mhmQvrs9AgNCnOxr7fkoXQhMrR6LeE7wj_sgMpKL63_wzwycz4HLKuur_diGZXmSA3UurB9L0RJlOaFnrWdt85LA0PInOWe4pSm1UflInuexQKzXacFSa4g=&c=Ac3M8vbUmPtZEa-z8bohL-hL-o_KysCZl-3DEM19zAK_oecsba26pw==&ch=LMcNLS-x8iEZqvKBCKHWn4qOInrJuA1MtZiHL0DBDo1OOZBP_cIgEw==)
---
| We appreciate all that you have done to make this campaign possible so far.
Now, the last step for our mission to Keep FL-03 Red is to VOTE in tomorrow's election!
Thank you for making your plans to do so!
For Florida and America, Team Kat

subject: Don’t left the Left steal the election

body:
Open this email to see how you can help sue the Deep State!

| |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**_Plain and simple, the Left is trying to steal the 2020 elections_** ...but Judicial Watch has exposed their strategies and we're stopping them cold in federal court!
In fact, Judicial Watch has arguably done more to preserve honest elections in the last few years than the Department of Justice has in the last few decades! This includes winning historic "accurate voter roll" successes in **Ohio,** **Indiana,** **Kentucky** and **California.** And we are currently suing **North Carolina, Pennsylvania** and**Colorado** over their failure to follow federal laws requiring states to clean their voter rolls between elections.
**_Our lawyers are fully prepared to move forcefully on Election Day and thereafter to challenge voter fraud in every form_** , which is why I'm asking you to join our fight by **_[making a tax-deductible gift to Judicial Watch now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51943&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMDIxNTA2MzI=)_**.
The attacks on election integrity laws and safeguards _cannot be ignored when they are cheered by the liberal media and candidates and financially backed by lawsuits paid for by billionaire Leftists**.**_
**_[That's why I hope you will support](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51943&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMDIxNTA2MzI=)_ our research, investigations and litigation fighting to preserve the honesty of our elections...this November 3rd and beyond!**
_America_ needs our expert legal team whose entire commitment is to uphold our election laws, keep our elections honest ... _and make sure that only eligible voters decide who wins and who loses_.
**And right now, that is Judicial Watch 's job one!**
So please, **_[join our fight by making your best tax-deductible contribution](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51943&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMDIxNTA2MzI=)_** to support our work.
Your contribution will help tremendously as we fight right up to Election Day...and probably beyond. We are deploying our full range of investigative, legal and public education tools on this issue... _and no other group has our track record of success challenging the Left 's efforts to undermine electoral safeguards_.
**_[I'm counting on you to help today!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51943&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMDIxNTA2MzI=)_**
The 2020 elections promise to be a knockdown, drag-out fight to the very end. Your gift will help thwart the Left's efforts to corrupt our elections and support all of our work. The Left right now is funding a multi-front assault on the integrity of our electoral processes - and our nation needs us as a strong, independent and principled conservative advocate standing tall for the rule of law.
Sincerely,
Thomas Fitton
President
**P.S**. Plain and simple, the Left is trying to steal this election...but we've exposed their strategies and we're stopping them cold in federal court!! _Our lawyers are fully prepared to move forcefully on Election Day and thereafter to challenge voter fraud in every form, which is_ why **_[I'm counting on you to join our fight!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51943&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMDIxNTA2MzI=)_**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51943&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMDIxNTA2MzI=)

name: Nancy Mace
subject: Can I count on you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nancy Mace for Congress |
body:
People like you are the only reason that I’ve been able to close the gap on my opponent. I only have a chance to win tomorrow because of you... | |
---
[ ](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=6de3995008504e2a898390adec1745da&_e=y3G4srLpGdYu1sKo99_ov4lKw2hcLnGxYgmcra-cfrmiqGebsX9eezj73QbPBiJRc59MVluOx12q5JMBbiSFvIMxPT4x1N2COTytDuyJPEV7Xv2awAkaBRt1kKgydapSIx75RB6m53MiuulQg2KxatSyUev7tyBLLh9DLrk3Jc9AdfW6u9ULbBSTf35BGzawZk86Yl2IZp9wnfP9Zha-g79vjO13uUChbzqgx6gMKIHqxlaU3fU-MYS-C0wgDkHC5HQ-h9pyqPBQyJdNloZCMAjzuMY_WxPZ8Q02G2d9FVQ2Y-psOB2xmsxhjsHKOUcr9RMBOU_CuXnvmZcmb3HfzeMTlgdE2KRHUCA_VDJLSEHPTbjhyYJAQVo5MIDn31x6JGTHvh28rlv4UIaGDC0Kq-LcnR_0S41tr2LqIbrkxJnrsg4XrcwtFHq8q7sgxpVlHbNzqooHeBI2s2ceHPnnwg94bEguei4JAAPyOPyRmz8%3D)
Hey friend - it’s Nancy Mace.

**Tomorrow is a monumental day. **

Tomorrow is Election Day across America, and all of the work that we have put in together over the past several months has led up to this very moment. It’s been a long road to get to this point, and I wouldn’t be here without your support.

This campaign has been exhausting at times, and exhilarating at others. It’s been one of the greatest challenges of my life and I am so thankful for all of the support I’ve received up until now.

**Friend, people like you are the only reason that I’ve been able to close the gap on my opponent. I only have a chance to win tomorrow because of you — there’s no doubt about it. **

To be honest, I don’t see myself getting a lot of sleep tonight. I’m nervous, excited, and full of hope. Tomorrow is the start of a new era of leadership for my district and I’m honored to be leading the charge.

I know I’ve asked you for a lot over the last couple of months, but I want to ask for one final favor.

This election is immensely consequential and we need all hands on deck if I’m going to win this critical House race.

**[Can I count on you to chip in one final donation of just $5 to help me finish strong and maximize my chances of winning on Election Day?](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=6de3995008504e2a898390adec1745da&_e=y3G4srLpGdYu1sKo99_ov4lKw2hcLnGxYgmcra-cfrmiqGebsX9eezj73QbPBiJRt3vOGRLschJ05nYXbx6BdTxrih-ltX5PSsJxMwTkmJXZ8EXy62gyh8_KzS0QP_LOS1NeYM_N0Lp0Kv2N4ppR986tXJNyMeZa6YlJremALwjnCbqStetvDcbxcXg1vk-HI3z4IlVQJJKMR2K-v9LO1rokolIhT6Cvmyj7LLJ79nBG9GsMhTorPNpG_6eRb_kKRJzExll1YSsL4CuhDWTvu8DGMMLzvb5FyIn0WZcOuTXdtm6NhYgTelDKPbf-YMPn0KWwi4OG0069FjBIou-ozdCYxJLrhm538VCf1Z1kipBHBwM8q-rDIqns_Sp0nzp41umswMcUxbNXnbAKkM1W9AZQ9nfOxCjQwogqrN-1Y9wbh6wIekomXc36eTIQtc254UJA9uxe6Qe97V5Jv4_xKu3LYAgt9Myv4O4vb_NCMSg%3D)**

**Donate here:[https://secure.winred.com/nancymace/action-1676409/dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://links.email.nancymace.org/u/click?_t=b7e0c98b86c6435ea03767402a51b3fc&_m=6de3995008504e2a898390adec1745da&_e=y3G4srLpGdYu1sKo99_ov4lKw2hcLnGxYgmcra-cfrmiqGebsX9eezj73QbPBiJRc59MVluOx12q5JMBbiSFvIMxPT4x1N2COTytDuyJPEV7Xv2awAkaBRt1kKgydapSIx75RB6m53MiuulQg2KxatSyUev7tyBLLh9DLrk3Jc9AdfW6u9ULbBSTf35BGzawZk86Yl2IZp9wnfP9Zha-g79vjO13uUChbzqgx6gMKIHqxlaU3fU-MYS-C0wgDkHC5HQ-h9pyqPBQyJdNloZCMFj5bUtst2ROsRUtscAZK827E3Rl4b7gXbPgU1U_e0YaKvIihpMkHWzGzlcKaphbHhRHBK71lsmasoPePKcnExs1f0X3HfT1dkz8NPNOjMToOJs9DPAdPT-23olIi-3w8ic7966c5Bg_BhXRfu2VOQCIiZY-nuPSXSBeCf3a2Nww2v7_-88rwnj78QQMmR2BAiikulbq74m6LW7eErU4jMQ%3D)**

name: Laura Loomer
subject: Special request for Patriot
body:
We’re finalizing all the last-minute things we need to pull off a big win tomorrow, and I was hoping you . . .
| | | [](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-400393-942103-5275091-3a6172f685-e2a8efebbe)
Patriot,

[](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-400393-942103-5275091-3a6172f685-e2a8efebbe) We’re finalizing all the last-minute things we need to pull off a big win tomorrow, and [**I was hoping you could come through with $15 to help us print 200 sample ballots**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-400393-942103-5275091-3a6172f685-e2a8efebbe).

[**Let me know if you can, by pitching in $15 (or even $30 or $45) right away.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-400393-942103-5275091-3a6172f685-e2a8efebbe)

This campaign has fought for months to get our message out to voters... and right now, we’re locked in a tight race.

I know the people of Florida support my message and want me fighting for them in Washington. We have to make sure we get every single one of them to the polls tomorrow.

[**Please pitch in $15 right away to help us print 200 of the sample ballots we need for tomorrow.**](https://em.lauraloomerforcongress.com/ga/click/2-561017072-4395-400393-942103-5275091-3a6172f685-e2a8efebbe)

Thanks!

Laura Loomer

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Donald Trump is making his final stop in North Carolina today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cooper for North Carolina
body:
I need your support to fight back
|
---
[ ](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200962/2fde7c66/4f4d815e/156e8b1d/2275472517/VEsH/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cooper-email-logo?refcode=logo")

| | | Peter,

Today, the last day before the most important election of our lives, Donald Trump will be holding a campaign rally in North Carolina - where no doubt he'll try and attack me in an attempt to swing the election to my extremist opponent.

[The significance here can't be understated, Peter. Last month Trump's campaign manager outlined the possible victory scenarios for a Trump win - and all of them required him to win North Carolina.](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200962/2fde7c66/4f4d815e/156e8b1c/2275472517/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-finalstretch2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110220_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

[With less than 24 hours until polls open across our state, I need your help to fight back by continuing to mobilize historic numbers of voters. Can I count on you to rush $10?](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200962/2fde7c66/4f4d815e/156e8b1c/2275472517/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-finalstretch2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110220_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

**[CHIP IN >>](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200962/2fde7c66/4f4d815e/156e8b1c/2275472517/VEsC/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-finalstretch2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110220_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")**
North Carolina is the must-win state this election. _ABC News_ said my race for governor provides one of Joe Biden's best chances for victory in the South.

But in order to bring home that win I need your help to hit our $400,000 Path to Progress Victory Fund goal.

[So far, your support has helped power North Carolina's record-breaking early voting turnout - but we have to keep fighting to get as many voters who haven't voted yet to the polls tomorrow.](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200962/2fde7c66/4f4d815e/156e8b1c/2275472517/VEsD/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-finalstretch2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110220_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

We're just $25,000 from hitting our $400,000 goal. We need to cross the finish line to have the resources we need to keep turning folks out until the polls close tomorrow.

[Donald Trump and the far-right have pulled out all the stops to try and swing this election to my extremist opponent - let's show them how fired up we are.](https://act.roycooper.com/page/m/1200962/2fde7c66/4f4d815e/156e8b1c/2275472517/VEsA/p/eyJlM3RoYzJ0OWZRPT0iOiIxMCJ9/?g=U9dOGvNIB05XNXM4nUllAw "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rc-finalstretch2020?refcode=EM_FR_B1_110220_REAC_ALL&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000")

name: Team Warner
subject: Tomorrow is Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
Derek --

Election Day is tomorrow! We're reaching out to ask one last time for your help. We need to make sure we reach every voter possible in these final hours. Our efforts aren't just to help Mark Warner. As we've seen in years past, when the Democratic Senate candidate does well, other Virginia Democrats down the ballot also get a boost. That's why we're reaching out one more time. Our team is doing everything they can to reach Virginia voters with phone calls, text messages, and digital ads in these final hours.

[**Will you pitch in to our final voter mobilization efforts so we can make sure we elect Democrats up and down the ballot in Virginia?**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9fa/53d9897e/551794e8/1c88cf3a/751781007/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjkzMSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-election-day?refcode=20201102_f_1_nd__931__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")

Thank you so much for your support -- we couldn't do this without you!

-- Team Warner

P.S. **Don't forget to vote!** If you already voted, thank you! If you're planning to vote tomorrow and aren't sure where your polling place is, visit [iwillvote.com.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85d9fa/53d9897e/551794e8/1c88cf39/751781007/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://iwillvote.com/")

name: Governor Eric Holcomb
subject: Tomorrow is the next step toward One Indiana for All
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eric Holcomb for Indiana
body:
I wanted to reach out and take a moment to talk about the stakes tomorrow, and what this election means for the future of our state. | |
---
| [](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=e0ed41fc575f4dc1bc2a31dcf8d186b2&_e=gyoy8TAvGzRRi26WQDhXtnj2vXL2nZaQ1MmJDAucp-ok9kWNU6DNCeyiZr1iiM-oZ9IBXlSM7_Lk4w3AnU_HBNDxliEwC9_ijpx_TSD6QnNFraqhKs7dF2t-P0ev67HcrZHemWxGMUvzzA5oRRx0k1vVUpifcoEb4OvAV9aeTVLs9EGX-z33VgwNOGlTQXsj-7DTf6PbRXuEHeUE5_ewe-HZI8Mo7R5OTd07bSMYJzz2nFTJLiChewfmhv6hKjLlw1vZdFE_D8gjIbPjtDAYgA2cYkqSCB6RAJq0TtycGoEVN3ebr6uG_XJw-fIg9r076Y93N5s9wp6PFVwVTLMhKb2exXOgxImNvoUUSLBOe-7I9PS2JhQ5IKSDHBqQe6dBHqpp3ahPIu22InVJKmwK81gQqBypk-MVTsTiRI6kIyHz-5dio5YOrVsau7NgTbvfpPzsh3NdB_tb0Bx1s7o5s7ZGRIH-uVQxW0BKB9YgaV8%3D) |
---|---|---
|
---
Friend - do you have a second?

I wanted to reach out and take a moment to talk about the stakes tomorrow, and what this election means for the future of our state.

All over Indiana, Hoosiers are going to be headed to the polls to decide what the future holds for our communities, our businesses, our farms, and our families.

There’s a clear choice before Hoosiers, friend — a choice that will have lasting impacts on our state and future generations of Hoosiers.

I know as Hoosiers, we will choose to continue building One Indiana for All.

**But we can’t sit back and take victory for granted — we need to go out and earn it. **

Getting the vote out is an absolutely crucial part of continuing to build One Indiana for All. In order to keep building on all of the success that we’ve had over the past four years, I need you to come through for us at the ballot box tomorrow.

**Find your polling location:**[**https://action.indiana.gop/2020/**](http://links.holcombforindiana.com/u/click?_t=60bbc6d769fe4010b248f63c6cb0e872&_m=e0ed41fc575f4dc1bc2a31dcf8d186b2&_e=gyoy8TAvGzRRi26WQDhXtsvpLYlk_GWIl6hckyqlisIi_9tdzGvR0U8gmcOSV-z2ovz2iAHUGI1nsfvE7Vi7G590-C509poLqIIDoNqR2FMVdnAgnbU6uY8PFiIqK3CM0c9F4mpV0jQsYEwz3PZwlUUhhVHLf9oe1VelhTzYhe8aunN5BAexMwdWNt5TmJILh7NTt9SywXKP8oIYOgHEoAhn1OKGT-UCVrA3TRo7zq78We2s_6dz2hW07lXJJ3xSBBNY8903ntJOYGkN1hC8dhv25VrFm4Hfwttq0pFJx3Hbq7K3jwJtJMHzWwbTCbvOvbFdRiRgoItLuuCm61HeHWhaSH5O069y1iXudh9jE6QcEUfBuivGd0MM9gwVIg-BSox_ypiCFtp3ovred9WSOfGSEaATI7hIy_HEJNuFmFPrz5TdR3Em413oCJ0_nSPbXR702Xt1SBtGhqQdRVmOJQ%3D%3D)

Best,

Governor Eric Holcomb

All over Indiana, Hoosiers are going to be headed to the polls to decide what the future holds for our communities, our businesses, our farms, and our families. There’s a clear choice before Hoosiers, friend — a choice that will have lasting impacts on our state and future generations of Hoosiers. Friends —

Something very peculiar happened on the eve of the passage of the Trump-McConnell GOP tax bill.

Susan Collins originally proposed an amendment to close a major tax loophole private equity firms and financiers had used to dodge billions of dollars in taxes.

The tax bill — universally opposed by Democrats in the Senate because it only provided tax relief to billionaires and millionaires — was stalled 50-50 because Collins wouldn’t support it unless her amendment was adopted.

**And then, after being lobbied intensively, she drops her amendment in the middle of the night and then votes after midnight for the bill, securing a 51-49 vote passing it.**

Miraculously, Mitch McConnell and private equity firms start writing her checks for $10,000, $50,000, and $100,000. She became the top recipient of private equity dark money in the Senate (and still is).

McConnell told her to confirm Brett Kavanaugh in exchange for fundraising support. She did and he has — she's one of the top recipients of McConnell-backed GOP Super PACs.

[Corrupt Collins is bought and paid for. It’s time to end her pay-to-play schemes once and for all: Donate to secure her defeat in November so we can flip the Senate!](https://action.314actionfund.org/go/283?refcode=314_EM_FR_201101_1mo_none_STD_1_corruptcollins&amount=10&t=15&akid=457%2E3423351%2E7m4PVS)

It's incredible to think how far we've come.
---
Last year, I was a complete political outsider.
---
I was simply a man who served his country and felt that our "representative" was ignoring her constituents back home while taking marching orders from Pelosi and D.C. Democrats.
---
I decided to take a stand and continue my service to our country by running for Congress.
---
Thanks to grassroots conservatives like you who believed in our campaign's core values, we won the Republican primary, got endorsed by the President of the United States, outraised our Pelosi-backed incumbent opponent, _and now have a 50/50 chance to win._
---
**[LET'S WIN](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Azj-noYSvMOB_xP94C7NyzT3ySiDJSq6BGeyQmHEf6CKotIt9Yrz8r98wMFzQvcrV0twVWDubdvFVc5yXhtJajjj3snhmj0LenIpddK2aAwVRyV1e3Hs3OO06_B9Z78qFe7wJt_KI8E6NwgaEHxTLT7qmFg3xS3OwiyijDi8j_BDhMqWzwOqcUInToBDbT4TIhAikcaGB0Cy4DzymF_wCxPrV4KBexSWnMToSl7lxDeYf8NMfdG1qmQ87PtVpRAhqopql8I6__mNxrTY2ctzsf9_79VmRx0cbe5P10xP1MYEhyfWSnZZXg==&c=VP8ZRuaTJpg12uxQth-y27D_lKpYbtYUnLCGYEqnVrGkR9svZnrwmA==&ch=XLEYtAw6HBuc0Yy0CSkjZJqFjh0d1lucUkv6LtUOP2QTvZ19NuNa1w==)**
---
With our race within the margin of error, I'm asking for your help one last time -- not for my sake, but for the sake of our country's future.
---
When I look my two beautiful daughters in the eye, I want to be confident that they get to grow up in the same America I did -- the America that allowed the great-great-grandson of a slave to go to West Point and become a Republican nominee for Congress.
---
But that future hangs in the balance 24 hours from now if the radical Left seizes the reins of our great country.
---
I don't want to have a single regret. I want to know that I did all I could to fight for America.
---
[**So please, make your final contribution to our campaign to take back the House -- and I 'll unlock a final 6X-MATCH because everything is bigger in Texas.**](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Azj-noYSvMOB_xP94C7NyzT3ySiDJSq6BGeyQmHEf6CKotIt9Yrz8r98wMFzQvcrV0twVWDubdvFVc5yXhtJajjj3snhmj0LenIpddK2aAwVRyV1e3Hs3OO06_B9Z78qFe7wJt_KI8E6NwgaEHxTLT7qmFg3xS3OwiyijDi8j_BDhMqWzwOqcUInToBDbT4TIhAikcaGB0Cy4DzymF_wCxPrV4KBexSWnMToSl7lxDeYf8NMfdG1qmQ87PtVpRAhqopql8I6__mNxrTY2ctzsf9_79VmRx0cbe5P10xP1MYEhyfWSnZZXg==&c=VP8ZRuaTJpg12uxQth-y27D_lKpYbtYUnLCGYEqnVrGkR9svZnrwmA==&ch=XLEYtAw6HBuc0Yy0CSkjZJqFjh0d1lucUkv6LtUOP2QTvZ19NuNa1w==)

clean_body: We have 24 hours left to save America. | == Friend, You're my final hope. We have less than 24 hours left to take the lead in this TOSS-UP congressional election. As a U.S. Army Captain, I have given every single battle in my lifetime 100%, so you can trust that I will not rest until victory is declared tomorrow. With your help, we will WIN BACK this Texas congressional district Pelosi bought in 2018 and teach the Democrats a lesson to NEVER mess with Texas again. == == == It's incredible to think how far we've come. Last year, I was a complete political outsider. I was simply a man who served his country and felt that our "representative" was ignoring her constituents back home while taking marching orders from Pelosi and D.C. Democrats. I decided to take a stand and continue my service to our country by running for Congress. Thanks to grassroots conservatives like you who believed in our campaign's core values, we won the Republican primary, got endorsed by the President of the United States, outraised our Pelosi-backed incumbent opponent, and now have a 50/50 chance to win. == With our race within the margin of error, I'm asking for your help one last time -- not for my sake, but for the sake of our country's future. When I look my two beautiful daughters in the eye, I want to be confident that they get to grow up in the same America I did -- the America that allowed the great-great-grandson of a slave to go to West Point and become a Republican nominee for Congress. But that future hangs in the balance 24 hours from now if the radical Left seizes the reins of our great country. I don't want to have a single regret. I want to know that I did all I could to fight for America. == Thank you, == Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Official Republican Nominee for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. name: Barbara Bollier
subject: our last goal of the campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bollier for Kansas
body:
We need to raise $75,000 by tomorrow to fund the calls to swing voters that could determine the outcome of this race. Pitch in now to help us reach the voters we need to flip this seat. |
---
| | Team, Tomorrow is Election Day -- and that means time is running out in the fight to flip this seat. **We have ONE MORE crucial goal for this team to hit. We need to raise $75,000 by tomorrow to fund the calls to swing voters that could determine the outcome of this race.** ****[Will you rush in your $5 contribution right now to help us finish this race strong?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21115890/259619806/-284493480?refcode=em201102am1i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&city=&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODE5NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MWZiNDAxZi01MjFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QiEXHFxQ6T7z6ZnVy3tWGKtbFYET1t07Pkks7gRpESI=)**** Roger Marshall and Mitch McConnell are throwing everything they’ve got at us in this final stretch. What we do right now will be the deciding factor in whether we will flip this seat. Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families.

Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources.

As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United.

**Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today?** **[DONATE](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd44/18e32a7f/4ba8edd9/7b206d5f/2055175065/VEsHAg/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/brl_email?refcode=email_footer_donate&amount=25")** We know that we send you a lot of emails. If you would like to only receive the most important updates, [_click here_](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd44/18e32a7f/4ba8edd9/7b206d5c/2055175065/VEsHDQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://secure.benrlujan.com/page/s/fewer-emails").

If you would like to unsubscribe completely, we understand. You can keep up with our campaign by visiting us on _[Facebook](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd44/18e32a7f/4ba8edd9/7b206d5d/2055175065/VEsHDA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.facebook.com/BenRayLujan/")_ or _[Twitter](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd44/18e32a7f/4ba8edd9/7b206d59/2055175065/VEsEBQ/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://twitter.com/benraylujan")_ or _[Youtube](https://act.benraylujan.com/page/m/40f6bd44/18e32a7f/4ba8edd9/7b206d5b/2055175065/VEsEBA/?g=YeDMcDpTVzRcsCgKwv9UzQ "https://www.youtube.com/c/benraylujan")_ or online at _[benraylujan.com](www.benraylujan.com)_. But I just checked ActBlue -- "" "" | "" "" "" "" I'm in the fight of my life to win this Senate race and flip the Senate for Democrats. But it's going to be incredibly close. I can't afford to let Ronchetti take even one voter from us. "" I'm humbly asking: Could you rush $10 before I empty out my bank account? | **** ""** ** ""** ** ""** ** ""** ** ""** Thank you, Ben Ray "" "" "" "" Born and raised on a small farm in Nambe, New Mexico, by a union ironworker and a public school employee, Ben Ray is running for Senate to build a better future for all families. Ben Ray knows that our communities are stronger when everyone has a fair shot. He's dedicated his career to creating good-paying jobs for hardworking New Mexicans, expanding health care, and protecting our natural resources. As Assistant Speaker in the U.S. House of Representatives, Ben Ray has worked to pass a people-first agenda that helps all Americans -- from lowering prescription drug prices to preventing gun violence, protecting our immigrant communities, improving equity in our criminal justice system, and removing the dark influence of money in politics. He is proud to be endorsed by Planned Parenthood Action Fund, NARAL Pro-Choice America, AFSCME, American Nurses Association, League of Conservation Voters, Brady Campaign to End Gun Violence, Giffords, Human Rights Campaign, Latino Victory Fund, Congressional Black Caucus PAC, Council for a Livable World, and End Citizens United. Ben Ray doesn 't take a dollar from corporate PACs. Will you pitch in to fund our people-powered movement today? ""** We know that we send you a lot of emails. name: Wesley Hunt for Congress
subject: Help Team Hunt Get Out The Vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hunt for Congress
body:
Friend,

Election Day is tomorrow and we need your help to get out the vote! **Join Wesley for a Get Out The Vote Rally with Congressman McCaul this evening at 5:30pm at Katy Park, 24927 Morton Road, 77493**. To attend, please RSVP to info@wesleyfortexas.com. We hope to see you there!

We have less than 36 hours to reach as many voters as possible in the 7th District. Help us secure victory for Wesley tomorrow by block walking, phone banking, and text banking to get voters to the polls. Our incredible Team Hunt volunteers have knocked over 250,000 doors, texted more than 600,000 voters, and placed more than 500,000 phone calls. We have made great progress so far, but there is more work to do and we need your help! _**Register to join our**fi** nal Day of Action tomorrow**_! To sign up, email info@wesleyfortexas.com or complete [this form](http://links.wesleyfortexas.com/u/click?_t=fd5d6e7aa0334e7ebb096a39dc496016&_m=792679f3ca804ac9b01d597ac557cb35&_e=kmaoAqCZAI4iEGcPFctgG1daITh9I0emoqGLYka519cBgW8URVCtETvnB7tnf9cK6pM_ZwifxYu2wu3c7nzQb6VAXmrQ5hsFtQ-SqoOISdY8w8Jc3CDgEc_ML_V59EK03hwEU7ZhblLC6K7izAD4mySQlD0c-8jBg_EYAqO2R4IaxedzNUvqGRQfRGU5rUAusvO81jJcRZ0VgVJ_CM-dMJ8UkDwDx_HXbo1EK0WrZPUSOibzhX5VeSoJ7OlZubGmBbwaoP57_UsK2cuVWp5sgrq-LaYKxPLeKooT_wXzPHnmisB0ehZHZ9IeEhwYL1WBRhgJDHLq652n3qeww16U-XkBhfymImQQrIOOhw3qemc%3D).

After polls close on Election Day, we hope you will **join Wesley and Emily Hunt to celebrate Election Night and watch the results come in at 7:00pm tomorrow at Kirby Ice House in Memorial**. To attend, please RSVP to info@wesleyfortexas.com.

We look forward to seeing you this evening and tomorrow as we make our final push to secure victory for Wesley on Election Day!

Thank you,
Team Hunt

clean_body: Friend, Election Day is tomorrow and we need your help to get out the vote! Join Wesley for a Get Out The Vote Rally with Congressman McCaul this evening at 5:30pm at Katy Park, 24927 Morton Road, 77493. To attend, please RSVP to info@wesleyfortexas.com. We hope to see you there! We have less than 36 hours to reach as many voters as possible in the 7th District. Help us secure victory for Wesley tomorrow by block walking, phone banking, and text banking to get voters to the polls. Our incredible Team Hunt volunteers have knocked over 250,000 doors, texted more than 600,000 voters, and placed more than 500,000 phone calls. We have made great progress so far, but there is more work to do and we need your help! Register to join ourfi nal Day of Action tomorrow! To sign up, email info@wesleyfortexas.com or complete . After polls close on Election Day, we hope you will join Wesley and Emily Hunt to celebrate Election Night and watch the results come in at 7:00pm tomorrow at Kirby Ice House in Memorial. To attend, please RSVP to info@wesleyfortexas.com. We look forward to seeing you this evening and tomorrow as we make our final push to secure victory for Wesley on Election Day! Thank you, Team Hunt **** Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch.

name: Tim Scott
subject: Are you following what's happening in Alaska?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alaskans for Dan Sullivan
body:
Friend,

I hope you'll take a few minutes to read this email, because what I have to tell you is critical to our nation's future.

Right now, the Democrats across the nation are working around the clock to "flip the Senate". They have a bullseye on specific states and races and right now they are zeroing in on my good friend, Senator Dan Sullivan's race in Alaska.

**As a Colonel in the U.S. Marine Corps Reserve, Senator Sullivan is no stranger to a tough fight. And that 's what is happening right now in The Last Frontier. **

If Alaska turns blue, the Senate will turn blue as well. And that would mean Chuck Schumer's in charge -- and Friend, I know I don't even need to tell you the utter destruction to our economy and nation Chuck would do.

So, I'm writing to you today because that's a scenario I refuse to let happen. And that's why I'm going to do everything I can to ensure Dan Sullivan stays in the Senate!

**[Will you join me in supporting Dan's campaign right now?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010DyWRAFBaEzeircsNaeT8KpARp9rhUGtaet7eHmsL9oDWWCZvhGclhOm5gqyuLpLKoVY-_Uv7gv44Fs1sCU6gD2QohT-1W8Mi5aiBEfxMMHelaLSZYZmgHxVM6rv0OZcm9QEBlijFc1P92x9j4OgYou_4DlNlPwQynGWAiH5FN1b7YBFAMgZqHJgeuCROWSZkuDGJjgrNM30zYaL757Jdzldqdz1RcmGDvl4peWkRV7BBZiv0yzduADQxnV8ZsHJiy6A2JFbwHO-SXazzawe09fM_x7XB-lH67lzJ0AIcVTnoLVNZ6nhaNwQ5XyjZmOTBiN1bM_MGYyVgcEehbns6i1Nsa-4wrvWt6XodCyHycUdncqlfHw-MwBjKWTYSTkmGqPZEwbK-tD6aOQRHRkSXm4KEpGtcPQjbTu3N-gEhOKKjLq2gf4T7r9W8pYPo_Jvg9taedB8btwFGo3FsUi2FTiZ8LvrV9gJ&c=si5KLrv_14K3wczBxGz3OBTMLBst5MNJxwmapNMO-ckgyQns0bL3YQ==&ch=EFf5fuNmRAGLWf010SiOANWtC1q_F4MXPWmvPh5WThc73qXQOJJtYw==)**
[DONATE TO DAN >>>](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010DyWRAFBaEzeircsNaeT8KpARp9rhUGtaet7eHmsL9oDWWCZvhGclhOm5gqyuLpLKoVY-_Uv7gv44Fs1sCU6gD2QohT-1W8Mi5aiBEfxMMHelaLSZYZmgHxVM6rv0OZcm9QEBlijFc1P92x9j4OgYou_4DlNlPwQynGWAiH5FN1b7YBFAMgZqHJgeuCROWSZkuDGJjgrNM30zYaL757Jdzldqdz1RcmGDvl4peWkRV7BBZiv0yzduADQxnV8ZsHJiy6A2JFbwHO-SXazzawe09fM_x7XB-lH67lzJ0AIcVTnoLVNZ6nhaNwQ5XyjZmOTBiN1bM_MGYyVgcEehbns6i1Nsa-4wrvWt6XodCyHycUdncqlfHw-MwBjKWTYSTkmGqPZEwbK-tD6aOQRHRkSXm4KEpGtcPQjbTu3N-gEhOKKjLq2gf4T7r9W8pYPo_Jvg9taedB8btwFGo3FsUi2FTiZ8LvrV9gJ&c=si5KLrv_14K3wczBxGz3OBTMLBst5MNJxwmapNMO-ckgyQns0bL3YQ==&ch=EFf5fuNmRAGLWf010SiOANWtC1q_F4MXPWmvPh5WThc73qXQOJJtYw==)
---

Democrats are working feverishly to turn Alaska blue, and we've got to do everything we can to ensure that doesn't happen.

Even if you don't live in Alaska -- which you know I don't!! -- this race will impact you and your family. The balance of the Senate hangs on a few races, and it's imperative we keep Alaska RED.

**[If you want a true American patriot to stay fighting for our shared conservative values in Washington, then join me in supporting Dan Sullivan!](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0010DyWRAFBaEzeircsNaeT8KpARp9rhUGtaet7eHmsL9oDWWCZvhGclhOm5gqyuLpLKoVY-_Uv7gv44Fs1sCU6gD2QohT-1W8Mi5aiBEfxMMHelaLSZYZmgHxVM6rv0OZcm9QEBlijFc1P92x9j4OgYou_4DlNlPwQynGWAiH5FN1b7YBFAMgZqHJgeuCROWSZkuDGJjgrNM30zYaL757Jdzldqdz1RcmGDvl4peWkRV7BBZiv0yzduADQxnV8ZsHJiy6A2JFbwHO-SXazzawe09fM_x7XB-lH67lzJ0AIcVTnoLVNZ6nhaNwQ5XyjZmOTBiN1bM_MGYyVgcEehbns6i1Nsa-4wrvWt6XodCyHycUdncqlfHw-MwBjKWTYSTkmGqPZEwbK-tD6aOQRHRkSXm4KEpGtcPQjbTu3N-gEhOKKjLq2gf4T7r9W8pYPo_Jvg9taedB8btwFGo3FsUi2FTiZ8LvrV9gJ&c=si5KLrv_14K3wczBxGz3OBTMLBst5MNJxwmapNMO-ckgyQns0bL3YQ==&ch=EFf5fuNmRAGLWf010SiOANWtC1q_F4MXPWmvPh5WThc73qXQOJJtYw==)**

clean_body: Friend, I hope you'll take a few minutes to read this email, because what I have to tell you is critical to our nation's future. Right now, the Democrats across the nation are working around the clock to "flip the Senate". They have a bullseye on specific states and races and right now they are zeroing in on my good friend, Senator Dan Sullivan's race in Alaska. As a Colonel in the U.S. Marine Corps Reserve, Senator Sullivan is no stranger to a tough fight. And that 's what is happening right now in The Last Frontier. If Alaska turns blue, the Senate will turn blue as well. And that would mean Chuck Schumer's in charge -- and Friend, I know I don't even need to tell you the utter destruction to our economy and nation Chuck would do. So, I'm writing to you today because that's a scenario I refuse to let happen. And that's why I'm going to do everything I can to ensure Dan Sullivan stays in the Senate! == == Democrats are working feverishly to turn Alaska blue, and we've got to do everything we can to ensure that doesn't happen. Even if you don't live in Alaska -- which you know I don't!! -- this race will impact you and your family. The balance of the Senate hangs on a few races, and it's imperative we keep Alaska RED. == == Our future is on the line. Let's take a stand today to fight for it! Sincerely, Senator Tim Scott == Paid for by Alaskans for Dan Sullivan 3705 Arctic Blvd #447 Anchorage, Alaska 99503 == == | | Alaskans for Dan Sullivan | 3705 Arctic Blvd #447, Anchorage, AK 99503 | | Sent by mailto:action@standupforliberty.net powered by

name: Bill Olson
subject: I got Huckabee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h5UX1QO08F6OuRU&b=nJuCbRehfG4i_9SDUQF.9Q

Hi Peter,

If you're taking on a Pelosi clone like Darren Soto, how do you close?

You close with the most well-known Christian Republican in Florida, Gov. Mike Huckabee!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative veteran and fighter who dominated my primary and willwin on Tuesday with the support of Mike Huckabee and Trump supporters everywhere

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h5UX1QO08F6OuRU&b=nJuCbRehfG4i_9SDUQF.9Q
!

I am proud to accept the endorsement of Mike Huckabee here in the closing days- and hundreds of residents in my district joined us at rallies today!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h5UX1QO08F6OuRU&b=nJuCbRehfG4i_9SDUQF.9Q

Here's an update on the status of our race:

-Trump has closed the gap among early voters in my district and we should pull ahead by Election Day.

-Election Day votes should be heavily pro-Trump and pro-Olson.

-I am firing up Christians around my district to go make a difference and replace a pro-abortion liberal with a pro-life veteran: me!

-All of our recent polling shows a tie or me opening up a small lead.

I am surging late just like Trump is. Help me put us both over the top here in the closing days!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h5UX1QO08F6OuRU&b=nJuCbRehfG4i_9SDUQF.9Q

I am NOT a progressive. I'm not a Pelosi leftist. I'm a pro-life, pro-gun conservative who is a normal guy, not a Swamper!

THIS RACE WILL BE CLOSE. If we win this, Trump will probably win Florida. Join my 4,000 patriots who donated to me so I can flip this district! I need your help to beat Soto and Pelosi!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h5UX1QO08F6OuRU&b=nJuCbRehfG4i_9SDUQF.9Q

Trump is in the fight of his life- and so is America! The coalition behind us is impressive. I can win this swing district because Trump is overperforming among ALL Floridians.

I need your help to deliver a BIG win on Tuesday!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h5UX1QO08F6OuRU&b=nJuCbRehfG4i_9SDUQF.9Q

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h5UX1QO08F6OuRU&b=nJuCbRehfG4i_9SDUQF.9Q
today? Our "Get out the vote" expenditures are critical. Your help will be critical toward funding those programs!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h5UX1QO08F6OuRU&b=nJuCbRehfG4i_9SDUQF.9Q

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h5UX1QO08F6OuRU&b=nJuCbRehfG4i_9SDUQF.9Q

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h5UX1QO08F6OuRU&b=nJuCbRehfG4i_9SDUQF.9Q
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=h5UX1QO08F6OuRU&b=nJuCbRehfG4i_9SDUQF.9Q
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

body:
We're making one final push to reach undecided voters, and we need your help.

|

| | Peter -- Tomorrow is Election Day, and we need to make one final push to reach undecided voters. NBC News said Texas is a toss-up (!), but we need your help to win it. We're within single digits of Sen. Cornyn, and we have to use every second left to get the job done.

Luckily, today we have our BIGGEST MATCH EVER. **All donations before tonight 's midnight deadline will be matched four times, meaning your donation will go 5 times as far!** This is a huge opportunity to make a big impact on our efforts to get as many voters to the polls as possible. | [MAKE A 4X MATCHED DONATION NOW](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891da7/7f51f7bc/59a909e7/4efb1906/4219545648/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0NDcifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-4x?refcode=email_20201102.2nd__2447__&amount=10")
---
I know you're probably exhausted and ready to win this thing once and for all -- trust me, I am too. But no one wants to wake up on Wednesday morning wishing they'd done more.

**So if you 're able, please make a matched donation now to help us get every last voter to the polls and FLIP TEXAS tomorrow night:**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

MJ

subject: Join Team Hackett for an election night watch party!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Watch with us at Howard Park or from the comfort of your own home. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=21586fe39f&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=324fce0793&e=5886ca081d)
---
|
Dear Friend,

You’re invited! Please join us to watch the results of this historic election.

This campaign started from the grassroots. Pat often says she is running for the House of Representatives because it is supposed to be the “People’s House.” It is the people of this District who have always been the center of this campaign for Dignity and Justice for All, not the Few.

The Election Night Watch Party will take place from 7:00pm - 11:00pm.

There will be several ways to join us.

1. Attend in-person at Howard Park Event Center in South Bend. This is an inside/outside event. Masks will be required and capacity will be limited to 100 people (1⁄3 normal capacity) at any given time inside for social distancing. All CDC guidelines will be followed.

2. Join our Virtual Watch party with other supporters on Zoom. Capacity will be based on Zoom limitations.

3. Join us by watching a livestream on our Facebook page or website.

Please RSVP today to let us know how you plan to join!

---
| [RSVP](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=afbe472bdc&e=5886ca081d "RSVP")
---
|
Thank you for your extraordinary commitment to reclaiming Dignity and Justice for All. Join us for a night of celebration!

Team Hackett

name: Nina Ahmad
subject: Every VOTE counts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nina for PA
body:
| | , Tomorrow is Election Day and we aren't taking anything for granted. We're meeting with voters across the Commonwealth and sharing our vision. I just left an event in Lawrence County with our nation's future First Lady Dr. Jill Biden and I can tell you that people are fired up and excited! There's a new energy sweeping across the Commonwealth because people understand what's at stake. **We are pushing to the finish line but we can 't do this without you...**
I know that many of you have already voted and many more have a plan to vote tomorrow on **Tuesday, November 3rd!!**. Please keep pushing - encourage your friends and family to vote. You can help our campaign to continue messaging to voters by making a [contribution HERE.](https://act.myngp.com/el/rieASXtLQkEjWbeYLh0tqnqj_UTaAp7VrNxVGZaRMtc=/ilLhdqRx867m1YIH_WU7GtsrzLE7og1Srayp3zT2usw=) The stakes are too high for any of us to sit on the sidelines. [Can you please help me today with $5, $10, $20.20 or $100? Can I count on you to help get my message to all of PA? ](https://act.myngp.com/el/rieASXtLQkEjWbeYLh0tqnqj_UTaAp7VrNxVGZaRMtc=/ilLhdqRx867m1YIH_WU7GtsrzLE7og1Srayp3zT2usw=) Thank you for your vote and your support Humbly Yours, Nina Learn more by visiting our website: **_[www.NinaForPA.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/rieASXtLQkEjWbeYLh0tqnqj_UTaAp7VrNxVGZaRMtc=/at8IPK6Ony351BUDGpmzYaxD-gKTG-VyxveFsCGphuc=)_** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rieASXtLQkEjWbeYLh0tqnqj_UTaAp7VrNxVGZaRMtc=/ilLhdqRx867m1YIH_WU7GtsrzLE7og1Srayp3zT2usw=) Follow us on Social Media: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rieASXtLQkEjWbeYLh0tqnqj_UTaAp7VrNxVGZaRMtc=/MhzrkRcYeebG6e956cBAPT-M_Bz3cO4SvTJZDoNB2Ds=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rieASXtLQkEjWbeYLh0tqnqj_UTaAp7VrNxVGZaRMtc=/x2X7Y4U2URQOPAGPn9H6tz3b-zU6dHFILH0tkP4YiLg=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/rieASXtLQkEjWbeYLh0tqnqj_UTaAp7VrNxVGZaRMtc=/zkXcN3213AKRA4B5nhb4wQGVSy3m-PiYDo9RCWemMOs=?hl=en)

body:
Tomorrow is Election Day. This is it. We have come a long way, and I’m sure at this point you are tired of your inbox being flooded asking for contributions.

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21118479/259629754/-1211710425?refcode=BLU-FINE-20201102-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjA2OWFmMC01YTFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XnzwhwR-8FWPXej6xhM18QpT1sT239cBJ62sme-vGes=)

| Peter,

Tomorrow is Election Day. **This is it.** We have come a long way, and I’m sure at this point you are tired of your inbox being flooded asking for contributions. But in the last hours of this campaign, I wanted to tell you why these emails are so important.

Our campaign has gained steam in the past several weeks as political experts realize just how close this race is. The most recent poll has us ahead of Brian Fitzpatrick by a single point, and the Daily Kos says this race is a toss-up.

It’s clear: our hard work is paying off, but we are not done just yet. We need to make sure every voter in PA-1 knows our message and votes before polls close— _and we need to make sure every vote is counted_. [_**Any amount you can spare will make all the difference in the last moments of this race.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21118480/259629755/-1211710425?refcode=BLU-FINE-20201102-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjA2OWFmMC01YTFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XnzwhwR-8FWPXej6xhM18QpT1sT239cBJ62sme-vGes=)

I’m ready to fight for the working-class families in our district. They deserve a leader who is ready to find solutions to our biggest problems and help our communities recover from this pandemic.**That’s why I’m running. **

I am so proud of this campaign and everything we have accomplished. But this is just the beginning. I can’t wait to fight for _you_ in Congress. [_**Will you please pitch in now, in the final hours of this race, and help me get to the finish line?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21118482/259629757/-1211710425?refcode=BLU-FINE-20201102-2-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNjA2OWFmMC01YTFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XnzwhwR-8FWPXej6xhM18QpT1sT239cBJ62sme-vGes=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: Under Trump, Americans Have Seen Their Best Wage Growth In 40 Years
body:
Many on the left refuse to admit President Trump’s populist policies have provided massive benefits to working-class American... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=6d09b4e902&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| | |
# **Under Trump, Americans Have Seen Their Best Wage Growth In 40 Years**

“Many on the left refuse to admit President Trump’s populist policies have provided massive benefits to working-class Americans . . . Yet, during the first three years of the Trump presidency, wage growth was off the charts, especially for low-income workers and African Americans,” Robb Sinn writes for _The Federalist_.

“The Obama era proved dispiriting for many African American wage earners. The first three years of the Trump administration were a comparative godsend.”

[**Click here to read more.**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=29a5591fb6&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|
---
| “An American citizen kidnapped in Niger last week was rescued in neighboring Nigeria by US special forces,” Jon Levine reports. “Our Nation salutes the courageous soldiers behind the daring nighttime rescue operation and celebrates the safe return of yet another American citizen!” President Trump tweeted. Read more in the [_New York Post_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=acdce26b24&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “A major part of the mainstream media’s strategy has been to preserve the perception of its neutrality and keep its role as hidden as possible . . . For four years, Mr. Trump has shined a piercing light on the media’s bias. He has blown the lid completely off its cover. And despite relentless attempts to discredit and destroy him in response, he has survived and even gained momentum,” Frank Pavone writes in [_The Wall Street Journal_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=93a408a92f&e=3ee4985eea).
---
|
---
| “Trump’s focus on patient-centered markets is delivering better care, more choices, and lower costs. Since the release of Trump’s drug-pricing blueprint in 2018, drug price inflation has been flat—in significant part thanks to three consecutive years of record-breaking generic drug approvals by the Food and Drug Administration,” HHS Secretary Alex Azar writes for the [_Washington Examiner_](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=ade20dcd25&e=3ee4985eea).

**MORE:**[**Melania Trump, Jim Carroll: Help Children Live Drug-Free Lives**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=d5f399d95d&e=3ee4985eea)

clean_body: Many on the left refuse to admit President Trump’s populist policies have provided massive benefits to working-class American... | | | | | | | Under Trump, Americans Have Seen Their Best Wage Growth In 40 Years “Many on the left refuse to admit President Trump’s populist policies have provided massive benefits to working-class Americans . . . Yet, during the first three years of the Trump presidency, wage growth was off the charts, especially for low-income workers and African Americans,” Robb Sinn writes for The Federalist. “The Obama era proved dispiriting for many African American wage earners. The first three years of the Trump administration were a comparative godsend.” | | “An American citizen kidnapped in Niger last week was rescued in neighboring Nigeria by US special forces,” Jon Levine reports. “Our Nation salutes the courageous soldiers behind the daring nighttime rescue operation and celebrates the safe return of yet another American citizen!” President Trump tweeted. Read more in the . | | “A major part of the mainstream media’s strategy has been to preserve the perception of its neutrality and keep its role as hidden as possible . . . For four years, Mr. Trump has shined a piercing light on the media’s bias. He has blown the lid completely off its cover. And despite relentless attempts to discredit and destroy him in response, he has survived and even gained momentum,” Frank Pavone writes in . | | “Trump’s focus on patient-centered markets is delivering better care, more choices, and lower costs. Since the release of Trump’s drug-pricing blueprint in 2018, drug price inflation has been flat—in significant part thanks to three consecutive years of record-breaking generic drug approvals by the Food and Drug Administration,” HHS Secretary Alex Azar writes for the . MORE: | | | | | | The White House 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111

body: The censorship occurring on social media has hit Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton's Twitter account. [Action] Dear Judicial Watch Supporter, Judicial Watch has become the go-to source for information regarding election integrity and clean elections. However, over the last couple weeks, Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton's tweets concerning the 2020 election have been censored by Twitter. We encourage you to look through the tweets below and see for yourself the important information Twitter is blocking from you and the American public. And please visit www.JudicialWatch.org [https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51945&L=6&F=T&drurl=aHR0cDovL3d3dy5qdWRpY2lhbHdhdGNoLm9yZy8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj1hY3Rpb24rYWxlcnQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTEwMjE3NTE0MQ==] for all the latest news and information about our work fighting for clean elections and against government corruption. body:
| | | | [ ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=769e5004bf&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| | | Dear Friends,

---
|
# **FINAL DNC AD: ‘November 3’**
Ahead of Election Day, the DNC War Room today released its final ad of the cycle, “November 3,” in both English and Spanish, to highlight what is at stake in this election and empowering voters to make a change on November 3. Please post on social and share this far and wide to your networks.
---
|
---
| “Across the country, millions of Americans have lost loved ones, contracted a deadly virus, been laid off, or are struggling to pay the bills because of this president’s failures,” said DNC War Room Senior Spokesperson and Advisor Lily Adams. “Tomorrow, the American people have the power to reject the lies, fear, hate, and division of the last four years and instead choose truth, unity, and hope. That’s what this election is all about.”
---
|
---
| [**WATCH HERE**](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=e64825b2c9&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| [ ](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=f9df3b4984&e=d6c5c7d7ec)
---
| The English version of the minute-long spot will air in Wilkes-Barre, PA; Milwaukee, WI; Grand Rapids, MI; and on cable in Washington, D.C. The Spanish version, narrated by actress Stephanie Beatriz, will air in Orlando, FL; Phoenix, AZ; and on national Spanish cable. Since June, the DNC War Room has released 17 television ads to hold Trump accountable for his failed record.

Any voter looking for information about where to vote on Election Day can visit[ iwillvote.com](https://collegedems.us12.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b3a52587106e5f265f227782b&id=6707cf4bef&e=d6c5c7d7ec) for details.
