---
Fellow American,
We all know this Tuesday is Election Day, and I'm sure that everyone has told you how important it is to vote. So, now it's my turn to encourage you.

_**This election is not like any other election we have seen before.**_ The left has waded into extremist territory on almost every issue that affects Mississippi. Socialist policies that were once taboo are now the new norm; it's terrifying if you think about it. Fighting socialism from inside our own country is what makes this election so important.

If socialists have their way, the U.S. Supreme Court will be also packed with countless more liberal judges - Democratic activists are making plans to expand the Supreme Court from 9 judges to 13 judges just so they can get a majority.

Justice Amy Coney Barrett’s confirmation has sent liberals into a tailspin, and they're vowing revenge. They cannot stand the thought of a conservative, Christian, mother speaking out for the conservative cause - and tipping the balance on court cases. They want to pack the Supreme Court with leftist judges who will attack our laws that protect **life** and **the Second Amendment**.

**Socialism is no longer a fear. It’s a reality** \- it’s the plan radical Democrats like Bernie Sanders and Kamala Harris want to implement if Joe Biden wins. So, we must stand up to politicians with socialist agendas, fight back against politicians who are puppets for the socialist movement, and ensure they never gain access to our political system.

**I am asking you to _please_ make a plan to vote, and cast your vote to advance freedom, not socialism.** If you need to find your polling place, _please click the link below._

[_**FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION >>>**_](http://mail.tateforourstate.com/u/click?_t=e163c146c72243a2a9464e8d755030ab&_m=0bb659a4733a4f4eb79aaa29892e8336&_e=iVlwTI_EBWjdReC0eZyE_tKw8BTk6-ODJg3cgUS4fPwhrK0hgJt5fflT4_7EqHAEcgcj5i3mYcgW5RG24_CAuXvChRYi8Iq8hEeZ9xAV5HACDBblB2YM_Gj1qwxeBCQCPtBoqOAWoI5u420MzfcNFf4_SmY6h-_QyPyRKh5L7F0m6d1gEZiuTJFZCAvCBMikvrnaTpIcB-kNROXRV8BovArfFC3HCVMUIMM6BqqqYqdC7gHX91XItBQefGYL7DWhuS6vJ7facWYnYgIuqtBgnitr3hwBn6fRaKMj31ccL6WmAq9SRUjEQMuxWnDaRDJe3Zfb98CuMxZzYx6ZQhjnlvKZHRPaxbKc3XeSOcjxjxJNTm-NQrfRkLAvNys_RL1wZsGSpPP07HMYTT0Na2Pz8w%3D%3D)

ELECTION COUNTDOWN: 1 DAY LEFT!
Friend,

name: Roger Misso
subject: I'm a veteran. I ran for Congress this year. I lost. Here's how we make sure others can win tomorrow.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
body:
Peter,

This is my last E-mail to you before Election Day. This one is going to be long and personal, but at the end, [I'm going to ask you to chip in what you can.](https://act.myngp.com/el/e7TMCpQXEX6hGhbLJjvItnG9XOqshxgBMwKy6t_upnA=/_bVdgw1j42ADM2ptx6dpQNvJSfI0ALkgwSHs2TvxJTc=)

It has been a tough year for all of us. But back in March, I had to deal with a unique kind of challenge: how to tell my wife and kids that we would have to end our campaign for Congress. After a full year of constant campaigning, days on the road, and barely seeing my family, it was one of the hardest conversations I've ever had to have.

A lot of people have asked me what went wrong - what could I have done to bring about a better outcome? The truth is, I'm a veteran who served more than 10 years on active duty. I am active in my community. But I could barely afford to run for office and provide for my family.

As somebody who has always hated getting E-mailed or called by political candidates asking for me, what I learned this year is that [_**fundraising can make or break candidates.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/e7TMCpQXEX6hGhbLJjvItnG9XOqshxgBMwKy6t_upnA=/_bVdgw1j42ADM2ptx6dpQNvJSfI0ALkgwSHs2TvxJTc=) I know this because it broke me.

But now, as Executive Director of Taking the Hill, it is my mission to make sure that it never breaks another veteran candidate again. We support veterans and military family members of integrity for Congress in tough races. [We have endorsed more than three dozen candidates](https://act.myngp.com/el/e7TMCpQXEX6hGhbLJjvItnG9XOqshxgBMwKy6t_upnA=/_bVdgw1j42ADM2ptx6dpQNvJSfI0ALkgwSHs2TvxJTc=) and rallied around them based on a simple premise carried over from our time in uniform: the mission is easier to accomplish when we do it together.

So one last time before Election Day, [I am asking you to help us carry our brothers and sisters in uniform across the finish line of their next mission: political public service.](https://act.myngp.com/el/e7TMCpQXEX6hGhbLJjvItnG9XOqshxgBMwKy6t_upnA=/yZMGIE88i-UWMAMnDY82hY9FCK34jPY9Q2dtiYQ2W4s=) [_**I have committed to raise a total of $200,000 for these candidates before Election Day, and I 'm still $12,795 short. I've given everything I can - the federal maximum contribution limit of $5,000 - so I am humbly asking you to give everything that you can, too.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/e7TMCpQXEX6hGhbLJjvItnG9XOqshxgBMwKy6t_upnA=/yZMGIE88i-UWMAMnDY82hY9FCK34jPY9Q2dtiYQ2W4s=)

Nobody likes fundraising asks. Nobody likes seeing these E-mails cluttering up their inboxes. But take it from me - a military veteran and dad who fought like hell but lost my race because I couldn't raise enough money - that the veterans and military family candidates of Taking the Hill will not be successful without your support. And if these candidates don't win - all of them in battleground districts for control of the House, Senate, and White House - we will be staring down another very long, disastrous four years.

[_**Please chip in as much as you can.**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/e7TMCpQXEX6hGhbLJjvItnG9XOqshxgBMwKy6t_upnA=/_bVdgw1j42ADM2ptx6dpQNvJSfI0ALkgwSHs2TvxJTc=) The finish line awaits. I might have lost my own race, but I won't rest until every, single one of my brother and sister candidates has what they need to find themselves victorious once all the votes are counted. For your generosity - for reading these E-mails and joining our mission to bring courage and decency back to Congress - from the bottom of my heart, I thank you.

Yours in service,
Roger

Roger Misso
Executive Director
[Taking the Hill](https://act.myngp.com/el/e7TMCpQXEX6hGhbLJjvItnG9XOqshxgBMwKy6t_upnA=/FtAXPfJN4T1zd5p4zJsd9XJuS83JWE8mX1G6m8EcyY8=)
[@RogerMissoCNY](https://act.myngp.com/el/e7TMCpQXEX6hGhbLJjvItnG9XOqshxgBMwKy6t_upnA=/yZMGIE88i-UWMAMnDY82hY9FCK34jPY9Q2dtiYQ2W4s=)

Paid for by Taking The Hill PAC
---
Taking The Hill PAC
PO Box 2134
Bristol PA 19007 United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please [unsubscribe](https://act.myngp.com/el/e7TMCpQXEX6hGhbLJjvItnG9XOqshxgBMwKy6t_upnA=/rRQvG4xbWXf3J6JwwA54vKBcgBrr9fzh1T7SXaluTK8=).

name: Voto Latino Elections HQ
subject: Tomorrow is election day, Peter!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTO LATINO
body:
|
#
Peter, Voting is your power! And at Voto Latino, we want to make sure your voice is heard. **The election is TOMORROW and here’s what you need to vote** :
* **[See when your polling place is open.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/21119545/259633469/2106751434?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDhmMjEzMy02MDFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5fh1OTfbh_GsArTN9ubPeuvPcE9fM6o5cUqlT-4Ah8=&emci=1965c82a-06d1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=a48f2133-601d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=1959553) **Remember, if you are in line when the polls close, you are allowed to vote.
* 🚨 Need a ride to the polls? Voto Latino Foundation is partnering with Lyft for access to a FREE ride to and from the polls! **Use code VLF2020 for a ride to the polls (*Up to $25. While supplies last. ****[Terms apply.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/21119547/259633471/-1203105506?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDhmMjEzMy02MDFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5fh1OTfbh_GsArTN9ubPeuvPcE9fM6o5cUqlT-4Ah8=&emci=1965c82a-06d1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=a48f2133-601d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=1959553))🚨**
* **Do you know where your polling place is?** [If not, you can find it here!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/21119549/259633473/-253903664?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDhmMjEzMy02MDFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5fh1OTfbh_GsArTN9ubPeuvPcE9fM6o5cUqlT-4Ah8=&emci=1965c82a-06d1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=a48f2133-601d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=1959553)
* **Do you need to bring an ID?** Some states require ID to vote. Others do not. [You can see what you need here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/21119551/259633475/-1058036399?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS83ODUyMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDhmMjEzMy02MDFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=z5fh1OTfbh_GsArTN9ubPeuvPcE9fM6o5cUqlT-4Ah8=&emci=1965c82a-06d1-ea11-9b05-00155d03bda0&emdi=a48f2133-601d-eb11-96f5-00155d03bda0&ceid=1959553)
* **Concerned about COVID-19?** Try to vote at off-peak hours, like earlier in the day. Maintain a six-foot distance from people while you wait in line, and wear a mask. You may want to bring disinfectant wipes to wipe down any polling equipment before and after you vote. And be sure to wash your hands before and after you vote!

We are expecting very high turnout tomorrow, and we want to be sure you have a chance to be heard. Don’t be left out! Make sure you use your power to vote tomorrow, or others will choose your leaders for you! \-- The Voto Latino Elections Team
---
PAID FOR BY VOTO LATINO

The election is TOMORROW and here’s what you need to vote : Remember, if you are in line when the polls close, you are allowed to vote. 🚨 Need a ride to the polls? Voto Latino Foundation is partnering with Lyft for access to a FREE ride to and from the polls! Use code VLF2020 for a ride to the polls (Up to $25. While supplies last. **)🚨 Do you know where your polling place is? Do you need to bring an ID? Some states require ID to vote. Others do not. Concerned about COVID-19?** Try to vote at off-peak hours, like earlier in the day. Maintain a six-foot distance from people while you wait in line, and wear a mask. You may want to bring disinfectant wipes to wipe down any polling equipment before and after you vote. And be sure to wash your hands before and after you vote! We are expecting very high turnout tomorrow, and we want to be sure you have a chance to be heard. Don’t be left out! Make sure you use your power to vote tomorrow, or others will choose your leaders for you! \-- The Voto Latino Elections Team PAID FOR BY VOTO LATINO Voto Latino PO Box 35608 Washington, DC 20033 United States

name: Zachary Weidlich, Campaign Manager
subject: 🚨URGENT: NEW JERRY CARL WATCH PARTY LOCATION!!!🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jerry Carl for Congress
body:
Important update inside –NEW LOCATION
Hey Fellow Conservative,
This is an important update.**If you’re planning to come out and join us for Jerry’s post-election party tomorrow night, please take note.**
Unfortunately, our planned location in Daphne sustained storm damage. We just finished making alternate arrangements.
The new location for our Team Carl Election Night Watch Party tomorrow is: **Old Majestic Brewing Company** **656 St Louis St, Mobile, AL** Just as before, the party will start at 7:00 p.m. We’ll have food and beverages available, and we’ll have TVs set up to watch the election coverage.
We hope to see you tomorrow!
\- Zach | |
---
[ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/ca7c9103847b4639/dff70f24dcdc80a4c3d6b838967d376c/32613)
Fellow Conservative,

We’re coming up fast on Election Day 2020.

We’re staying busy around the clock now working to close strong, win this race to keep south Alabama RED, and do all we can to support Coach Tuberville and President Trump.

**Today, I just wanted to drop a quick note to personally invite you to our Election Night Watch Party at Cafe del Río in Daphne.**

We’re going to have food, beverages, and TVs set up to watch the election results come in throughout the evening.

There’s no need to RSVP. Just mark your calendar for 7:00 p.m. on November 3rd and come out to join us!

Here’s the address for Cafe del Río: **1175 Battleship Parkway, Daphne, AL 36527.**

And of course, if you haven’t voted yet, please make your plan to cast your ballot now for **JERRY CARL for Congress**. Urge your family and friends to do the same!

Thank you for all your support. I hope to see you Tuesday evening!

\- Jerry
| [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/ca7c9103847b4639/552b3396c7307503c3d6b838967d376c/32613) | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/e74187f3c92098b17c94c760ea83e7c0/32613/ca7c9103847b4639/444931c69e22b24dc3d6b838967d376c/32613)
---|---
To ensure you receive our emails, please add votecarl@jerrycarlupdates.com to your safe senders list or address book!

name: Hickenlooper for Colorado
subject: I might've just cost us this election
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
Team, Senator Rosen said I could reach out on behalf of my boss, John Hickenlooper.
I wish I didn't have to send this email, but I just made a tough decision that could make-or-break this campaign.
To be blunt, we weren't expecting our fundraising to dip as much as it has. Right now, we do not have enough money to launch our final media buy of this election.
To make matters worse, we just got intel that outside Republican groups are launching another round of nasty attacks to sink our campaign in these final days.
The sheer number of attacks directed at our campaign has been alarming. So, I authorized our team to launch a new ad to fight back -- **even though we don 't have the money in our budget.**
Look, I'm willing to bet grassroots supporters like you can get us back on track and ensure we have the financial resources to fight off the GOP's attacks before it's too late. I've seen it before, and I'm counting on it now:
****[Please, split $5 or anything you can between our campaign and Jacky Rosen to help us flip Colorado's Senate seat blue. We need to raise another $15,394 by midnight.](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-201101-hickenlooper?refcode=em201101i_4721&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****
Every penny matters as we gear up for the worst attacks Republicans will throw at us.
Thank you,
M.E. Smith
Campaign Manager
Hickenlooper for Colorado

clean_body: Team, Senator Rosen said I could reach out on behalf of my boss, John Hickenlooper. I wish I didn't have to send this email, but I just made a tough decision that could make-or-break this campaign. To be blunt, we weren't expecting our fundraising to dip as much as it has. Right now, we do not have enough money to launch our final media buy of this election. To make matters worse, we just got intel that outside Republican groups are launching another round of nasty attacks to sink our campaign in these final days. The sheer number of attacks directed at our campaign has been alarming. So, I authorized our team to launch a new ad to fight back -- even though we don 't have the money in our budget. Look, I'm willing to bet grassroots supporters like you can get us back on track and ensure we have the financial resources to fight off the GOP's attacks before it's too late. I've seen it before, and I'm counting on it now: ** "=" Every penny matters as we gear up for the worst attacks Republicans will throw at us. Thank you, M.E. Smith Campaign Manager Hickenlooper for Colorado ** "="****

Friend -

Election Day is tomorrow, so I wanted to take a moment to personally thank you for helping me make it to the finish line. We’ve worked tirelessly to get here and I couldn’t have done it without you.

Now that we’re here, I just have one last favor to ask you:

_**Will you cast your vote for me, friend?**_

It might sound small, but it’s the biggest thing you can do to help me get to Washington.

**If you are voting absentee, today is the last day to drop your ballot off at your[clerk’s office](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=6533b5018b3b447ea01eeb62f733cae4&_e=50WUFCriT-GANSgzTRgOWAa0sobWRO9DycAYn4cquRTvIJjo7e8ENM-I6FWeEHCen63pr7lteblZ5uXz5pYzz0_3EeGKtqEjUEKzclgG1U1zDV83826xd-uW82mc_U2hggfg4BQeOh09RfcR4Ec3MLCYSJ4zSeHRP6faJig9HHu-Effu3Br0_kmXAtSVJo992xrh3zuBplHJz2HX9CfRn2vTSNYiRT6uV_t22msFEdLxqcMRoOKJ0SmQ_c_6WWbL4tmMXz2etLSAS3p_Q_7izLbBHKWkzTRsjSlE237uIUcc7zTCI3dShyZozQ1yI6-QPYsQrTci5lUJvFc44h4kmhLs1gzw_3sW2SpOV8ArnYyBG6cQtXH2ly0VKm7Js6OlAV8xCj_RlwIPu9mN5ttt6ZHtKROf2ffL28_Jx43bM84I68OWX3ZEloT_7ntyeVv-bDHO_hmpeideIB99fWOYYrJ3ZoOTMOVSZ1kCVCZbz8o%3D).** If you plan to vote in person tomorrow,**[find your local polling place](http://links.mowersforcongress.com/u/click?_t=40916cb2eb47469286d89e7d5b57adeb&_m=6533b5018b3b447ea01eeb62f733cae4&_e=50WUFCriT-GANSgzTRgOWAa0sobWRO9DycAYn4cquRSj5WC8vS-hAeJECcRSqs1TMz94zF3JLv6NfFdMS08b3quiJhAlmM2urrbgCm-sCfk16FQsPhBGOSUmS-OwL500zO_0ze3F0KpIQZbp_GM8iOy9FP3rzMbYKgNpru4MSM3MAC6wt78ZTdpEkycXf2pCO0KeeaU4Fug7jZ19V1zknoA7l7Ok8Ky6RIaGRWIF5ql1RW_Via5D3gr0tclR7-tanX9FAk0Nbb9p7shfCSiMSAms874GKyMrfm11Mnjva96ct8_zXfTGOqkr2MYdJRGAO-DS5A_UCLf1bGxAoTW7JXtDya6H3-x2sF5sPLyDSfZwOTlNddYm_mqTCUiRQwMlEARuB0h_w8yU36jie2gUyf9qbYO7OC-xmJdnKfhwk7qFk-dQEQF1CK45vntMJhtWfwdqqchSsRGdv5huwvTZkxAIvhvLLGsXCZfRH3Dobyo%3D) **before you head out to cast your ballot.

I firmly believe that I will be a better leader for Granite Staters than Chris Pappas, and I hope I have earned your vote these past months.

**If you think I’m the best person to represent New Hampshire’s First Congressional District, please VOTE MOWERS, then forward this email to your friends and family encouraging them to do the same.**

Thank you again for your support,
Matt

name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: U.S. Loses $19 Billion in Afghanistan Reconstruction Funds to Fraud, Waste, Abuse
body:
A staggering $19 billion spent by the U.S. government to reconstruct Afghanistan has been lost to fraud, waste, and abuse in the last decade and that only includes a portion of the money allocated by Congress for the cause.

[ ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51951&L=19477&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaGJvb2suY29tLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMDIyMDA2MjE=)
---
| | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 01, 2020
---|---|---
## Today's Top Stories
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51951&L=21052&F=H&) | **[Overwhelming Majority of MS-13 Defendants are in U.S. Illegally, DOJ Charges 127 This Year](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51951&L=21052&F=H&)** Sticking to its commitment of dismantling the nation’s deadliest street gang, the Trump administration has criminally charged 127 members of the famously violent Mara Salvatrucha (MS-13) this year and half a dozen face life in prison after being convicted. It’s a start but, shockingly, it barely puts a dent on the problem since the MS-13 has an estimated 10,000 members in the U.S. and tens of thousands more abroad, according to Department of Justice (DOJ) figures. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51951&L=21052&F=H&)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51951&L=21136&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYm9vay1kZWJ1dGVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMDIyMDA2MjE=) | **[Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton’s A REPUBLIC UNDER ASSUALT to Debut at #12 on the New York Times Hardcover Non-Fiction List](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51951&L=21136&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYm9vay1kZWJ1dGVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMDIyMDA2MjE=)** Judicial Watch announced recently that President Tom Fitton’s new book, A Republic Under Assault: The Left’s Ongoing Attack on American Freedom will debut at #12 on the New York Times Hardcover Non-Fiction List on November 8. The book will also come in at #14 on the Times’s Combined Print and E-Book Best Sellers List. Additionally, A Republic Under Assault will debut at #2 on Publishers Weekly’s Top Hardcover Frontlist Nonfiction List and #4 on Publishers Weekly’s Overall Best Sellers List on November 2. The book has only been in bookstores nationwide since October 20. [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51951&L=21136&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvYm9vay1kZWJ1dGVkLz91dG1fc291cmNlPWRlcGxveWVyJnV0bV9tZWRpdW09ZW1haWwmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPXRpcHNoZWV0JnV0bV90ZXJtPW1lbWJlcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMDExMDIyMDA2MjE=)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51951&L=21126&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvdW5tYXNraW5nLXJlY29yZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTEwMjIwMDYyMQ==) | **[Judicial Watch Sues for Unmasking Records: Biden, Top Obama Officials ‘Unmasked’ General Flynn](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51951&L=21126&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvdW5tYXNraW5nLXJlY29yZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTEwMjIwMDYyMQ==)** On May 19, Senator Grassley responded and asked for “the declassification of additional information related to the unmasking of Americans around the time of the 2016 election, but also to expand the scope of our request to include information as early as January 2016. Based on our investigation and recent press reports, we are increasingly concerned that the surveillance of U.S. persons affiliated with the Trump campaign began earlier than the opening of the FBI’s Crossfire Hurricane investigation in late July 2016.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51951&L=21126&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvcHJlc3MtcmVsZWFzZXMvdW5tYXNraW5nLXJlY29yZHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTEwMjIwMDYyMQ==)
---|---
| | | | [](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51951&L=21137&F=H&) | **[U.S. Loses $19 Billion in Afghanistan Reconstruction Funds to Fraud, Waste, Abuse](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51951&L=21137&F=H&)** A staggering $19 billion spent by the U.S. government to reconstruct Afghanistan has been lost to fraud, waste, and abuse in the last decade and that only includes a portion of the money allocated by Congress for the cause. In 90% of the cases examined in a new federal audit, the money was blown “carelessly, extravagantly, or to no purpose.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51951&L=21137&F=H&)
---|---
|
---
| |
---
### [The Daily Caller News Foundation Forces Government To Release Emails Showing WHO-Connected Accountability Group Pushed To Praise China’s COVID-19 Response ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51951&L=21138&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZGFpbHktY2FsbGVyLWZvcmNlcy1lbWFpbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTEwMjIwMDYyMQ==) The Daily Caller “These Fauci emails show how praising China was the odd priority for of WHO in the face of a novel and dangerous coronavirus” added Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “That the NIH tried to slow-rolled the release of these records emails and is still sitting on thousands more is a scandal.” [READ MORE](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=51951&L=21138&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvaW4tdGhlLW5ld3MvZGFpbHktY2FsbGVyLWZvcmNlcy1lbWFpbHMvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249dGlwc2hlZXQmdXRtX3Rlcm09bWVtYmVycyZ1dG1fY29udGVudD0yMDIwMTEwMjIwMDYyMQ==)
---

clean_body: A staggering $19 billion spent by the U.S. government to reconstruct Afghanistan has been lost to fraud, waste, and abuse in the last decade and that only includes a portion of the money allocated by Congress for the cause. = | | | Because no one is above the law! | Nov 01, 2020 ---|---|--- Today's Top Stories | | | | == | == Sticking to its commitment of dismantling the nation’s deadliest street gang, the Trump administration has criminally charged 127 members of the famously violent Mara Salvatrucha (MS-13) this year and half a dozen face life in prison after being convicted. It’s a start but, shockingly, it barely puts a dent on the problem since the MS-13 has an estimated 10,000 members in the U.S. and tens of thousands more abroad, according to Department of Justice (DOJ) figures. == ---|--- | | | | = | = Judicial Watch announced recently that President Tom Fitton’s new book, A Republic Under Assault: The Left’s Ongoing Attack on American Freedom will debut at #12 on the New York Times Hardcover Non-Fiction List on November 8. The book will also come in at #14 on the Times’s Combined Print and E-Book Best Sellers List. Additionally, A Republic Under Assault will debut at #2 on Publishers Weekly’s Top Hardcover Frontlist Nonfiction List and #4 on Publishers Weekly’s Overall Best Sellers List on November 2. The book has only been in bookstores nationwide since October 20. = ---|--- | | | | == | == On May 19, Senator Grassley responded and asked for “the declassification of additional information related to the unmasking of Americans around the time of the 2016 election, but also to expand the scope of our request to include information as early as January 2016. Based on our investigation and recent press reports, we are increasingly concerned that the surveillance of U.S. persons affiliated with the Trump campaign began earlier than the opening of the FBI’s Crossfire Hurricane investigation in late July 2016.” == ---|--- | | | | = | = A staggering $19 billion spent by the U.S. government to reconstruct Afghanistan has been lost to fraud, waste, and abuse in the last decade and that only includes a portion of the money allocated by Congress for the cause. In 90% of the cases examined in a new federal audit, the money was blown “carelessly, extravagantly, or to no purpose.” = ---|--- | | | == The Daily Caller “These Fauci emails show how praising China was the odd priority for of WHO in the face of a novel and dangerous coronavirus” added Judicial Watch President Tom Fitton. “That the NIH tried to slow-rolled the release of these records emails and is still sitting on thousands more is a scandal.” == = The Washington Times Judicial Watch has released a comparison study of Census Bureau population statistics and state voter registration data to reveal a notable disparity. The watch dog group is now warning of potential voter fraud and “dirty” voter rolls. = == Washington Examiner The full appeals court in the nation’s capital rejected Judicial Watch’s request for a rehearing on being allowed to depose Hillary Clinton after a three-judge appeals court panel overturned a district court ruling granting the conservative watchdog the ability to put the 2016 Democratic presidential nominee under oath. == == == == == | CLIPS == = TWEETS | | | | | = ---|---|--- Voter ID is a must. subject: Final Hours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc
body:
| | |
---
| | Friends,

We have entered the final hours before our country makes its most critical decision of our lifetimes. Tomorrow, we are voting to _preserve America the free nation_ and to _protect the values_ given to us by our Founding Fathers.

**I am running for Congress to be a voice for rural Kansas.** I vow to to be a champion for life, the 2nd Amendment, our ag producers, and to stand with President Trump against socialism. I am running because I believe our country is the greatest the world has ever known and is worth fighting for.

Please, _join me_ in standing for our great nation tomorrow.

_**As we inch closer to election night, here are 3 things you can do:**_
1. Call your family and friends to make sure sure they get out and vote tomorrow.
2. Post on your personal social media pages encouraging your friends to _get out and vote._ Explain why you are supporting our campaign.
3. **Pray.** Pray for our country and the results of tomorrow's election.

It has been an honor meeting thousands of people across the Big First District over the course of this campaign. Thank you for your friendship and prayers. Audrey and I have been deeply moved by the abundance of support you have given us.

And now, I humbly ask one last time to sprint with us through tomorrow. Preserving America for our children and grandchildren is worth the effort.

Yours in the fight,

Tracey
---

clean_body: | | | | | Friends, We have entered the final hours before our country makes its most critical decision of our lifetimes. Tomorrow, we are voting to preserve America the free nation and to protect the values given to us by our Founding Fathers. I am running for Congress to be a voice for rural Kansas. I vow to to be a champion for life, the 2nd Amendment, our ag producers, and to stand with President Trump against socialism. I am running because I believe our country is the greatest the world has ever known and is worth fighting for. Please, join me in standing for our great nation tomorrow. As we inch closer to election night, here are 3 things you can do: 1. Call your family and friends to make sure sure they get out and vote tomorrow. 2. Post on your personal social media pages encouraging your friends to get out and vote. Explain why you are supporting our campaign. 3. Pray. Pray for our country and the results of tomorrow's election. It has been an honor meeting thousands of people across the Big First District over the course of this campaign. Thank you for your friendship and prayers. Audrey and I have been deeply moved by the abundance of support you have given us. And now, I humbly ask one last time to sprint with us through tomorrow. Preserving America for our children and grandchildren is worth the effort. Yours in the fight, Tracey | | "DONATE" | "About Tracey" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Paid for by Mann for Congress, Inc. | Our mailing address is: P.O. It’s incredible to think how far we’ve come.
---
Last year, I was a complete political outsider.
---
I was simply a man who served his country and felt that our “representative” was ignoring her constituents back home while taking marching orders from Pelosi and D.C. Democrats.
---
I decided to take a stand and continue my service to our country by running for Congress.
---
Thanks to grassroots conservatives like you who believed in our campaign’s core values, we won the Republican primary, got endorsed by the President of the United States, outraised our Pelosi-backed incumbent opponent, _and now have a 50/50 chance to win._

With our race within the margin of error, I’m asking for your help one last time -- not for my sake, but for the sake of our country’s future.
---
When I look my two beautiful daughters in the eye, I want to be confident that they get to grow up in the same America I did -- the America that allowed the great-great-grandson of a slave to go to West Point and become a Republican nominee for Congress.
---
But that future hangs in the balance 24 hours from now if the radical Left seizes the reins of our great country.
---
I don’t want to have a single regret. I want to know that I did all I could to fight for America.
---

clean_body: We have 24 hours left to save America. | Friend, You’re my final hope. We have less than 24 hours left to take the lead in this TOSS-UP congressional election. As a U.S. Army Captain, I have given every single battle in my lifetime 100%, so you can trust that I will not rest until victory is declared tomorrow. With your help, we will WIN BACK this Texas congressional district Pelosi bought in 2018 and teach the Democrats a lesson to NEVER mess with Texas again. It’s incredible to think how far we’ve come. Last year, I was a complete political outsider. I was simply a man who served his country and felt that our “representative” was ignoring her constituents back home while taking marching orders from Pelosi and D.C. Democrats. I decided to take a stand and continue my service to our country by running for Congress. Thanks to grassroots conservatives like you who believed in our campaign’s core values, we won the Republican primary, got endorsed by the President of the United States, outraised our Pelosi-backed incumbent opponent, and now have a 50/50 chance to win. With our race within the margin of error, I’m asking for your help one last time -- not for my sake, but for the sake of our country’s future. When I look my two beautiful daughters in the eye, I want to be confident that they get to grow up in the same America I did -- the America that allowed the great-great-grandson of a slave to go to West Point and become a Republican nominee for Congress. But that future hangs in the balance 24 hours from now if the radical Left seizes the reins of our great country. I don’t want to have a single regret. I want to know that I did all I could to fight for America. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Captain, U.S. Army Aviation Branch Official Republican Nominee for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. Military images and information do not imply endorsement by DOD [Department of Defense] or any service branch. Contributions are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. Under federal law, individuals may contribute a maximum of $2800 for the primary election, $2,800 for the primary run-off election, and $2,800 for the general election. Couples may make contributions from a joint account, but each contributor must sign the check (or other written instrument) or a statement that accompanies the contribution. Qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $5,000 for the primary election and $5,000 for the general election. Non-qualified federal PACs may contribute a maximum of $2,800 for the primary election and $2,800 for the general election. Contributions from federal government contractors and corporations are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation and name of employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in an election cycle.

name: Melissa Hortman
subject: Hope for the future
disclaimer_text: paid for by the DFL House Caucus
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/wWOcxxucWJaNz5AWIkbCh0D8uKKM0yp26FH4sds6lv0=/bpyGSNvm1X_KBc3fD2Tnes5Ty-t0Z54EXyF9NUgXvHw=?refcode=110220)
| | Friend, As this election draws to a close, I have so much hope for our state and our future. This year has been indescribable and long, but through it all I have seen great kindness, determination, and momentum like never before. All of this has come in the face of so much loss: the death of George Floyd, the more than 230,000 Americans who lost their lives due to the federal mismanagement of COVID-19, and everyone across our country preparing for a socially distanced holiday season without their loved ones. Our country can and will heal, both from COVID-19 and the divisive political landscape we have seen the past four years. At the Minnesota Capitol, we showed what can be accomplished when we work together. In my first two years as Speaker we secured health care for 1.2 million Minnesotans, enacted the strongest wage theft law in the country, made strong investments in public education, and passed common-sense gun violence prevention measures off the House floor for the first time in history. Progress has been made, but the work is not done. Despite our achievements, we were also regularly thwarted by the Republican-controlled Minnesota Senate. If House DFLers are reelected to a majority tomorrow and the Minnesota Senate flips, we will work tirelessly to build a Minnesota that works better for everyone. We will:
* Continue to respond to the pandemic at the state level with science and facts;
* Tackle the rising cost of health care and prescription drugs;
* Make sure Minnesotans have the paid time needed to care for loved ones;
* Build a clean energy future and confront climate change;
* Prioritize safe communities and a fair justice system for all;
* Continue to make meaningful investments in rural communities & statewide infrastructure; and
* Make education a priority so all Minnesotans have the opportunity to achieve their dreams.

The election tomorrow isn't just an election, it's a battle for the soul of our nation, as Joe Biden says. We have an incredible opportunity. Together, we can protect and expand our House DFL Majority, flip the Minnesota Senate, and take back the White House, but it all starts with you. [Please find voting information here if you haven't voted already. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/wWOcxxucWJaNz5AWIkbCh0D8uKKM0yp26FH4sds6lv0=/ncUPeSr-4iV7e3-GS4Eonx5P7DMj83Fl-U0ZNUHk1Xc=) Thank you for your support this election cycle. I look forward to working with you more in the future as we work together to build a better future for all Minnesotans. Melissa Hortman Speaker Minnesota House of Representatives [**Donate**](https://act.myngp.com/el/wWOcxxucWJaNz5AWIkbCh0D8uKKM0yp26FH4sds6lv0=/bpyGSNvm1X_KBc3fD2Tnes5Ty-t0Z54EXyF9NUgXvHw=?refcode=110220)

Peter,
**TOMORROW IS ELECTION DAY!**

_Tomorrow, voters across the state will head to the polls, and**we need you to be one of them.**_

So mark your calendar, set an alarm, tie a string on your finger — do whatever it takes to remember to get to the polls to elect Republicans up and down the ballot.
[**CLICK _HERE_ to _FIND YOUR POLLING LOCATION_**](http://email.hawleyformo.com/u/click?_t=11a592fdc01846d4a1c728421295853d&_m=a371b3df4698415687ec64d3ddaf98ab&_e=hUsJO7Pxt43i6KQQquWkpj7x6ivgMo5roYF4s8UTC9TOk8PsiHsrLhBAWAzyT194a4DUlk7s0TIiSs25Icbb1bO0hQFb_06JpR9LNC3v86u5g91PKDgsotz8nY0sBYk58djYcA-Wv4X4QJ-miJKGUS_aJgIUCg8YGYJoAYOsAf1moCqnoCBRF8LzzMbsv_F0OikcghYoUt4yYrTbnZJDFWegdv-kD86Fmi41L3PMjqcm_zdWf57dyEmUzCmpd-VVaI-SBKL_yQflIe06wKubOPo5lo-K-ohSfogQAAm7fbcDsV5UHEmJ1WYWGKvytS63CJmA2TaICfWbeRAlgGHn1qztWo6c4lg9PINjKpBo3c1_aXMQJ2v8PClfXU6_umLfYF5ozegrVSvYSKuxNn-gIQ%3D%3D)
Your support and effort in this election mean the world to our movement to save America from socialism, _**but we aren't done yet.**_ We will be fighting till the end.

Please join us in protecting America's future.

Sincerely,

Josh Hawley
|

name: Barbara Bollier
subject: Sprinting - and I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Mitch McConnell's allied super PAC and special interest groups are spending enormous amounts of money to drag my Republican opponent Roger Marshall across the finish line. They're dumping over $25 mil
Hi there,
The Cook Political Report has been keeping a close eye on our race, they've seen the work we're putting in and the panic it's causing Republicans:
_" Republicans very much sounded the alarm... they are clearly going to have to drag Rep. Roger Marshall across the finish line..."_
Mitch McConnell's allied super PAC and special interest groups are spending enormous amounts of money to drag my Republican opponent Roger Marshall across the finish line. They're dumping over $25 million dollars into our race.
**They 're outspending us in these final days. [Will you pitch in $3 or whatever you can afford right now to flip the Kansas Senate seat?](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc609/2a380d31/203db37b/f043bb/2239019415/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Ym9sbGllciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAxMTAyX213aDRiYl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bollier?refcode=e20201102_mwh4bb_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")**
Cook also noted that we were running a "stellar campaign" -- and they're right. Thanks to grassroots donors like you, we've hit every target with a bullseye. Republicans didn't realize this campaign was such a force to be reckoned with, so they're coming in at the last second to outspend us. This massive special interest spending could be the thing that moves this tied race back in Republicans' favor.
I'm not going to be dragged across the finish line -- I'm going to sprint across it. Will you be there with me?
[**I 'm asking personally, can you chip in $3 to help us make up the difference? We're so close to flipping this seat and making history, can I count on you?**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc609/2a380d31/203db37b/f043bb/2239019415/VEsE/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Ym9sbGllciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAxMTAyX213aDRiYl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bollier?refcode=e20201102_mwh4bb_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")
It's a photo finish. Thanks for all that you do.
Barbara Bollier
> [Contribute](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc609/2a380d31/203db37b/f043bb/2239019415/VEsF/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0Ym9sbGllciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAxMTAyX213aDRiYl9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4bollier?refcode=e20201102_mwh4bb_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

_ _
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
To unsubscribe from the Maggie for NH email list, please click here: [Unsubscribe](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc609/2a380d31/203db37b/f043a4/2239019415/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "http://act.maggiehassan.com/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com")

body:
Tomorrow is the big day, friends. We’re excited to see just how many Texas get out to vote — and it’s going to be a lot.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/21125217/259670322/1282836671?refcode=fl_email_fr_20201102GOTV4_RK_all_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83NDEzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0YmQ0MTY0Yi03ODFkLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2JkYTAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WKi_-3wglkTI2oChtjgGXw1HOLGSgmSSwkS4g-XzvWs=)

Tomorrow is the big day, friends. We’re excited to see just how many Texas get out to vote — and it’s going to be a lot. We’ve already surpassed the 2018 and 2016 total votes — and Election Day is still to come. We’re working to turn out every voter we can to defeat Pete Sessions and elect Rick Kennedy. name: Gina Raimondo
subject: Two student leaders
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| Hello friend,
Last week, I talked with the co-chairs of our Young Adult Task Force, Maria del Carmen Guerrero Martinez and Matthew Mills. Maria is a senior at Brown University. She's a pre-med student studying biochemistry and molecular biology. Matthew is a fourth-semester nursing student at CCRI and works as a CNA at Rhode Island Hospital.
The Task Force was convened to develop strategies to stop the spread of COVID-19 among young people. Over the last month, the group has developed a lot of great ideas to keep their peers and fellow Rhode Islanders safe.
You can watch the video [here](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fMd-Rbh9fnoOIvvZRYo14KfOqZHTNBy0of57C7tUQkRDZlvNeeWdGJ0fBooevtbO8uHLjsd80PssGMMeTngyvArxJtnZmcn_Jbxad_TlMx6F-lN_xsKF2AyB4LFFmFOQdUx49suIxSkeA3VWSrhJYoQ1-oAMRoeeCUEiSMeGcOIg7zTSB8bIigvn5jx0TbDGx84yvSVqAb0=&c=cCmsXtZuwbLj8H9BuTREi3qFYsZGClvzcfEszOkbp1MvTOVzqr_7IA==&ch=KbGaO3l1KBxSXdJRC-nEIITQvHNgCwX82AsU-uwG2op4eif2Y1XYVw==).
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fMd-Rbh9fnoOIvvZRYo14KfOqZHTNBy0of57C7tUQkRDZlvNeeWdGJ0fBooevtbO8uHLjsd80PssGMMeTngyvArxJtnZmcn_Jbxad_TlMx6F-lN_xsKF2AyB4LFFmFOQdUx49suIxSkeA3VWSrhJYoQ1-oAMRoeeCUEiSMeGcOIg7zTSB8bIigvn5jx0TbDGx84yvSVqAb0=&c=cCmsXtZuwbLj8H9BuTREi3qFYsZGClvzcfEszOkbp1MvTOVzqr_7IA==&ch=KbGaO3l1KBxSXdJRC-nEIITQvHNgCwX82AsU-uwG2op4eif2Y1XYVw==)
---
| I was really grateful to hear directly from these wonderful student leaders about where they're seeing issues and what we can do to make things easier for young adults and all Rhode Islanders. We had a great, wide-ranging discussion about topics from COVID fatigue to how we can make it cool to wear a mask. One key thought I took away was something Maria said about the holidays: it's only a super-spreader if we let it be. We have the opportunity to turn this around if we can just slow things down and avoid social gatherings for a few weeks.
The Young Adult Task Force is doing a great job getting the word out on social media. You can see all the inventive ways they're helping their peers learn about the risks of COVID-19 at [twitter.com/YATFRI](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fMd-Rbh9fnoOIvvZRYo14KfOqZHTNBy0of57C7tUQkRDZlvNeeWdGJ0fBooevtbOw19SAJrLxYu-4zITyByVsjaKOtYymvQ_FQpv6Pz07iMH0K0Nc_B3yhM7U0vUJA7N0944Ad18gE3vkl_ez1mEPw==&c=cCmsXtZuwbLj8H9BuTREi3qFYsZGClvzcfEszOkbp1MvTOVzqr_7IA==&ch=KbGaO3l1KBxSXdJRC-nEIITQvHNgCwX82AsU-uwG2op4eif2Y1XYVw==) and [instagram.com/youngadulttaskforceri](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fMd-Rbh9fnoOIvvZRYo14KfOqZHTNBy0of57C7tUQkRDZlvNeeWdGJ0fBooevtbOUaHovbHCe3Tq6sG2WKZ-z-fuRDl3mXLG3aT_up8J6e3QBYbNbkabqyc3z--COlEvcLqCC5i4hk_H2dJTsoSWE-3dkD1N_HPCKThKbTC1wqA=&c=cCmsXtZuwbLj8H9BuTREi3qFYsZGClvzcfEszOkbp1MvTOVzqr_7IA==&ch=KbGaO3l1KBxSXdJRC-nEIITQvHNgCwX82AsU-uwG2op4eif2Y1XYVw==).
We're all in this together.
-Gina Raimondo Governor
P.S.: Information is our greatest weapon in the fight against COVID-19. If you or someone you know wants to sign up to receive these emails, you can use [this link](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fMd-Rbh9fnoOIvvZRYo14KfOqZHTNBy0of57C7tUQkRDZlvNeeWdGJ0fBooevtbOPl2RBvjxYoyQyD-mqsyCIBS98SqvDt8EZAqkvQ-NbM0baw1iG6y0UvmZSD4i4_HrkLz3JOB85k-JdbJfLBGARdBsQ5cuEmRRo8DggqIAOLrweX_DsOHC2vFhhcurr1meLQNB4JqCVtPPTBEH2Qef4wz0UB4UXIrVOUd3cssAN8rUdiP0P0KqbcKtWjXXlnj5h-8lzel5ty3VYnVMjEL5i-B7yiK8ugP1PMGr8vXlwColj6lEAZ6oM28P1kEZmpYYdMUu-rrN4bQ=&c=cCmsXtZuwbLj8H9BuTREi3qFYsZGClvzcfEszOkbp1MvTOVzqr_7IA==&ch=KbGaO3l1KBxSXdJRC-nEIITQvHNgCwX82AsU-uwG2op4eif2Y1XYVw==).

name: Preston, Team MJ
subject: this isn't over yet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
I've worked on a lot of campaigns, and none have been this close.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891da1/7f51f7bc/59a0ae3a/4efb1a40/3130399449/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | I've worked on a lot of campaigns, Peter, and it's rare to see one this close. We can win this race tomorrow -- **[but to do it, we need your support.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891da1/7f51f7bc/59a0ae3a/4efb1a47/3130399449/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjI0NDkifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-4x?refcode=email_20201102.3nd__2449__&amount=10")**

**We still need to reach undecided voters with ads to help get out the vote, but frankly, we 're running out of money.** So with just one more day to make a difference, I'm coming to you for help.

This is a single-digit race, and **NBC News has moved Texas to a "toss up"** in the presidential race. With so much momentum behind us, we can't let our foot off the gas now. name: John Kasich
subject: Election Day = Tuesday

body:
Election Day is tomorrow, Tuesday, November 3rd. If you haven't voted yet, don't miss this chance to make your voice heard. [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=0860c0a7f67b431c893a51fcd13e390e&_e=x8d93ae4IXmjQBm7qlb6MCvMMBqxMjn9jbxiQvMbWBUs3gruwuPtKT8M8bIYv0z-gTpklFouGtoQxbw3B4X2YjiFBvQGatIiSnSP6P3c9fq92U7KnR8HqqRuisspR7L0bmgboNJhgRPME_lahauLSYM78QD0fwz2PUgvxPuRFvRao61c9K1h3s9b8bqBVNMihuJlJdqn__HPh1wNTMk_fUmecnvvrnEGmI4l79OJQhHVX_HyTr1o74UaAzACl428VOfo34rOe28X4nGGC_DWsw%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter - Election Day is tomorrow, Tuesday, November 3rd. If you haven't voted yet, don't miss this chance to make your voice heard.

Generations of Americans have fought and died to ensure that we have the right to vote. Let's honor their memory by casting a ballot and helping decide the future of our great nation.

It's also incumbent on every American (especially our leaders) to urge patience and calm as we wait for the election results.

And when the result is known, it's up to each of us to remember that we are all Americans and work harder than ever to heal our country. We are so much stronger when we're together.

Thank you for your ongoing support and for being a part of the process by casting your ballot.

-John
|
---

name: The TNDP Team
subject: Tomorrow is Election Day. Make Your Plan to Vote.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, DR
body:
https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2 [https://secure.ngpvan.com/tJLKn-4F5Ee9e7tBzzVl5A2]
Dear Peter,
It's finally here! Tomorrow is Election Day.
If you’ve already voted - THANK YOU! You, your family, and your friends have already turned out in record numbers to vote early.
If you haven't voted, we won't keep you long. We're just popping in to ask if you've made your plan for tomorrow?
If not, here's a short list to help you make your plan to vote:
*
What
time
will
you
go?
In
the
morning?
After
lunch?
After
work?

*
How
will
you
get
to
the
polls?

*
Who
will
you
bring
with
you?

*
Click
here
to
find
your
polling
location.
[https://web.go-vote-tn.elections.tn.gov/]

*
Remember
to
bring
your
Photo
ID.
The

of

IDs
is

.

*
Vote

Democratic
candidates
up
and
down
the
ballot!
[https://tndp.org/2020-democratic-candidates/]

*
Save
the
TNDP
voter
protection
hotline
number
to
your
phone:
1-855-486-8386

[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP07/1/77134/images/Problems_Voting_600w.png]
HELP PROTECT THE VOTE. IF YOU SEE SOMETHING, SAY SOMETHING! This election will have long-standing consequences and we will not sit by and allow intimidation tactics to run unchallenged and undermine the vote. The Tennessee Democratic Party Voter Protection Hotline number is 1-855-4VOTETN (1-855-486-8386). If you see anything that concerns you regarding the election tomorrow, do not hesitate to call.
See ypu at the polls,
Chair Mancini & the TNDP Team

name: Team Durbin
subject: Election Day is tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Did you see Senator Durbin's message, Peter?
**[Tomorrow is Election Day -- and we need to do everything we can to keep Illinois blue and flip the Senate. Will you pitch in $5 one last time to join the fight?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201101-last-chance?refcode=em201102i_1094&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
**[Contribute](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201101-last-chance?refcode=em201102i_1094&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
\---Original Message from Dick Durbin---
Peter,
Election Day is Tuesday. Are you ready to keep Illinois blue and flip the Senate?
**[This is our last chance to make a difference in this fight. Can you rush in $5 now?](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201101-last-chance?refcode=em201102i_1094&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
When we wake up on November 4, we want to be sure that we did EVERYTHING we possibly could to not only elect Joe Biden and defeat President Trump -- but win control of the Senate.
We can't afford more of Mitch McConnell's failed leadership. So we're coming for the majority.
But first, we need to do our part in Illinois and defend this Democratic seat. Can I count on you?
**[Make your $5 contribution now to stand with me one more time before Election Day.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201101-last-chance?refcode=em201102i_1094&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
My best,
Dick Durbin

**[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-201101-last-chance?refcode=em201102i_1094&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

* * *
Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Should you want to unsubscribe, you can [click here](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4509/42ab3cf4/661864e4/135de42f/970284125/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "http://action.dickdurbin.com/page/unsubscribe?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). Join Senator Durbin in taking on powerful special interests on behalf of hard-working middle class families by [making a contribution to our campaign here.](https://act.durbinforsenate.com/page/m/45ff4509/42ab3cf4/661864e4/135de410/970284125/VEsB/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/durbin_footer")
Friends of Dick Durbin

101 W. Grand, Suite 200
Chicago, IL 60654

name: =?utf-8?Q?Larry=20Sylvester?=
subject: To the employees
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Larry Sylvester for School Board
body:
I thought it was important that I write to you all and tell you about my intentions if I’m elected tomorrow. | | | |
---
| | |
---
| To the employees of DCS:
I thought it was important that I write to you all and tell you about my intentions if I’m elected tomorrow.
The most important thing I want to tell you is that I realize the abundance of talent, resources, and perseverance among the team members at DeSoto County Schools and what an honor it would be to work along side you.
As a DCS parent and professor, I’ve interacted with many of you over the years, and so I know the hard work and dedication which is a hallmark of our school system.
Secondly, I am not looking to make any hasty changes or decisions from the board. After all, so much of DCS’s success is dependent on your hard work, dedication, and passion. If I’m fortunate enough to be hired as your next School Board member, I will make my own evaluations of our processes after I have the opportunity to meet and work with the Superintendent and as many DCS employees and parents as I can.
I want you to be confident that every deserving teacher and team member will have my full support and the opportunity at competitive wages and future growth and development.
Finally, I will always be open and transparent with each of you and I would like to motivate you to do the same in return. I want to hear your concerns, ideas, and what you believe could be done differently or better on the challenges and opportunities we face.
I am looking forward to doing a lot of listening. Hopefully you will give me the opportunity to work along side you and help raise the bar even higher.
Larry
---
|
---
|
---

subject: Get ready to WIN BIG

name: Team Fair Fight Action
subject: Georgia: tomorrow is Election Day!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fair Fight Action
body:
|
---
[](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e8/34a064cc/1a693853/702351b/2268140674/VEsH/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://fairfight.com/")

| | Friend - Election Day is tomorrow, November 3! Record numbers of Georgians have cast their ballot and demanded their voices be heard this election. They are excited about using the power of the vote to elect leaders that will fight for all Georgians. Will you join them? **Make your Election Day voting plan today!** Polls will be open in Georgia from 7:00 AM to 7:00 PM. Get there early to cast your vote. Remember-- you must vote at your designated Election Day polling location. Double check your assigned polling location by going to your "[My Voter Page](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e8/34a064cc/1a693853/7023518/2268140674/VEsE/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://www.mvp.sos.ga.gov/MVP/back2HomePage.do")", calling 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683), or visiting [IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e8/34a064cc/1a693853/7023519/2268140674/VEsF/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com"). And before you head to the polls, check to make sure you have an [acceptable form of photo ID](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e8/34a064cc/1a693853/7023526/2268140674/VEsC/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://sos.ga.gov/index.php/elections/georgia_voter_identification_requirements2"). **Returning a ballot?** It must be received by your county elections office before 7:00 PM on Tuesday, November 3. Please return your ballot to a drop box in your county or to your county elections office. Find a location to drop off your ballot by visiting [IWillVote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e8/34a064cc/1a693853/7023519/2268140674/VEsD/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://iwillvote.com"), calling 866-OUR-VOTE (866-687-8683), or contacting your [county elections office.](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e8/34a064cc/1a693853/7023527/2268140674/VEsA/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://elections.sos.ga.gov/Elections/countyelectionoffices.do") This is an historic election-- so make your voting plan now and head to the polls for the last day of voting tomorrow before 7:00 PM. If you are in line by 7:00 PM you must be allowed to vote. After you cast your ballot, tell us about your voting experience [here](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e8/34a064cc/1a693853/7023524/2268140674/VEsB/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSesRsAhJ9dBbyXI-sWwQJ2MiLWM3co9vyXSzCK0aMvvxBVu8g/viewform"). For any additional information, visit [peachvote.com](https://secure.fairfightaction.com/page/m/41efa4e8/34a064cc/1a693853/7023525/2268140674/VEsO/?g=yzW-IFH8x8VbBlZb5iRRXGA "http://peachvote.com"). Thank you for being a voter. Let's get this done. ~Team Fair Fight Action |
---|---|---

name: Team Scheller
subject: FWD: Get Out the Vote
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc
body:
I wanted to follow back up with you on an email that Lisa sent to you on Friday. TOMORROW is election day, and we’re attempting to reach every voter Peter, I wanted to follow back up with you on an email that Lisa sent to you on Friday.
TOMORROW is election day, and we’re attempting to reach every voter whether through mail, online, door-to-door, or email, all to ensure YOU have a plan to Get Out the Vote.
This is the most consequential election we’ve seen, and it’s going to take every one of us to get out and vote if we want to hold on to our conservative values. [**Get Out The Vote**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=9c0885e2c9d34773add161965fc8e219&_e=-4frZRztsJCTcxNRQpANiP2YwR6JWO424bMWGPFRaUbQ8HRNpyXXCOj4onkO-RntMnCM_fforZpJKusuF0TQQavCG0-e9Q9GCpSWYE9fZdNy5H-nF6tDxoqD19NSjFFJt9V-3_ngbQr7P-6uwpiCvO3FrsDaCzIIGGG2pIHBrSJMIJZf381HOxQ5hKzz2CimobG7IMpC9ACZT9vtkiLFTV_1McCplSaSSC-PeRQCf5uA9-SXYH4ZjKG0DLh6Nvgx) We’ve seen the way that Susan Wild and her boss Nancy Pelosi have conducted themselves and the Democratic party for the last 2 years and we all know our district and our nation can’t handle another few years.
Peter, have you voted yet? Have you done ALL you can to protect our values?

If not, please ensure you know where your polling place is so you can Get Out the Vote first thing tomorrow morning to make sure YOUR voice is heard.
We’re counting on you, Peter.
Alex Campaign Manager, Team Scheller

\-------Forwarded Message Below------- Peter, In just a matter of just days, our district will be getting out and voting in the most consequential election we have seen to date.
Socialst Susan, her DC boss Nancy Pelosi, and the radical and Far-Left Democrats believe they truly have a chance at winning the presidency, flipping the Senate, and adding even MORE seats to their ‘Squad,’ but they must be stopped.
Peter, we’re calling out voters from all across the Lehigh Valley to ensure they have done their civic duty and have gotten out the vote. [**Get Out The Vote**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=9c0885e2c9d34773add161965fc8e219&_e=-4frZRztsJCTcxNRQpANiP2YwR6JWO424bMWGPFRaUZj1Z0ewo-4Cl55idt0bPI-PfpYsLFwZfHqTxbiUnJ6UHMXxqHt2E-GZLt-zZQBdvzUqxgAoKN9XF8zpoOg2I7DJqbGQfdTJgM0j6vWtdl9ObDMQEAdEkCekaf1EVbTxKXO3qo5dV-lPlTVt9tvl2asjJAPUNeuakfgrw2uyy20vOr6F0wdHtiq4kjWmuLqMyKbrM6xZ8M8egAEcD2EPnXi) As we enter the final days of this race, we need to rally around our conservative values, and vote to defend our freedoms and rights as Americans. [**Can I count You In?**](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/u/click?_t=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_m=9c0885e2c9d34773add161965fc8e219&_e=-4frZRztsJCTcxNRQpANiP2YwR6JWO424bMWGPFRaUZzjRgRvW4121xTU-ozGhlCKj5jcSYk8g-wuCO7Bze8rkaOmjbyJCfWFsx0gugYbuGFrcMva3FDmz5EXBGdc4ijMKk4ITE978xCliJ_Rgd0-I0srM17cVu5nss3zOTc4YWRAjdmlkMy4xVe7EZKMYQAU4W7FMVNIc6dqVLxQJXGQk_zVSOR8wLFM9-iRyd3ju1LWy1j2IQjzim2CHmrPDha) We’ve seen what the Far-Left is capable of and we also know that they’re not intending to throttle back their agenda any time soon.
They must be stopped, and we need your help in doing so. Will you join me on Tuesday to ensure WE get out the vote?
We have to do everything we can in these final days to flip PA-07 RED.
There are no second chances. No do-overs. No try agains. This is it.
Can I count you in? Lisa Scheller Paid for by Scheller for Congress, Inc. [Unsubscribe](http://links.schellerforcongress.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=2618b931a0124f90ba4a51cf9fda2c48&_s=9c0885e2c9d34773add161965fc8e219&_t=IZWIj8cfbljJlJsfF9smuphZQAJL9FrSv8Cu_c0pqaLzwuKmBVTDnAQRFiK_-nawsHbJk0Jk7-l_B2v3DR7kVPBaJJsHSAAlAFDOZ4CLkAUKkCQI9r35UpimutDtvs6I3AO8rF3RCMLxW2KUIJ1JItpCBu6lgNj6W-aSkDtoUjk%3D)

subject: Last push for Joe Biden

body:
| | | Derek,
I’ve called Joe Biden my friend for more than 40 years. In all that time, I’ve never seen Joe back down from a fight. I can’t wait to see what he does as President. Tomorrow is the most important presidential election in our country's history, and I’m feeling good about Joe’s chances. But, Derek, I want to do one final push for him with so much on the line. **[I’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 for Joe Biden by midnight today so our teams have extra resources to invest in last-minute voter outreach efforts. name: Mike Lindell
subject: TOMORROW

name: Bill Olson
subject: Help me win the BIG ONE tomorrow
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS
body:
Bill Olson for Congress

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hi4sGYNdCF6OuRU&b=87rioa3.NMiTXzhCAfkX3g

Hi Peter,

If you're taking on a Pelosi clone like Darren Soto, how do you close?

You close with the most well-known Christian Republican in Florida, Gov. Mike Huckabee!

My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative veteran and fighter who dominated my primary and willwin on Tuesday with the support of Mike Huckabee and Trump supporters everywhere

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hi4sGYNdCF6OuRU&b=87rioa3.NMiTXzhCAfkX3g
!

I am proud to accept the endorsement of Mike Huckabee here in the closing days- and hundreds of residents in my district joined us at rallies today!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hi4sGYNdCF6OuRU&b=87rioa3.NMiTXzhCAfkX3g

Here's an update on the status of our race:

-Trump has closed the gap among early voters in my district and we should pull ahead by Election Day.

-Election Day votes should be heavily pro-Trump and pro-Olson.

-I am firing up Christians around my district to go make a difference and replace a pro-abortion liberal with a pro-life veteran: me!

-All of our recent polling shows a tie or me opening up a small lead.

I am surging late just like Trump is. Help me put us both over the top here in the closing days!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hi4sGYNdCF6OuRU&b=87rioa3.NMiTXzhCAfkX3g

I am NOT a progressive. I'm not a Pelosi leftist. I'm a pro-life, pro-gun conservative who is a normal guy, not a Swamper!

THIS RACE WILL BE CLOSE. If we win this, Trump will probably win Florida. Join my 4,000 patriots who donated to me so I can flip this district! I need your help to beat Soto and Pelosi!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hi4sGYNdCF6OuRU&b=87rioa3.NMiTXzhCAfkX3g

Trump is in the fight of his life- and so is America! The coalition behind us is impressive. I can win this swing district because Trump is overperforming among ALL Floridians.

I need your help to deliver a BIG win on Tuesday!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hi4sGYNdCF6OuRU&b=87rioa3.NMiTXzhCAfkX3g

Can I count on you for a donation

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hi4sGYNdCF6OuRU&b=87rioa3.NMiTXzhCAfkX3g
today? Our "Get out the vote" expenditures are critical. Your help will be critical toward funding those programs!

I'm going to make sure the radical Democrats like Biden and Soto lose BIG this year - with your help!

Let's get this done!

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hi4sGYNdCF6OuRU&b=87rioa3.NMiTXzhCAfkX3g

Bill Olson

Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars

Supports President Trump

Not a Career Politician

Hard Core Conservative Fighter

Image

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hi4sGYNdCF6OuRU&b=87rioa3.NMiTXzhCAfkX3g

P.S. I really need your help today

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hi4sGYNdCF6OuRU&b=87rioa3.NMiTXzhCAfkX3g
, so a conservative combat vet can retake this swing district that the Republicans held just earlier this decade. I can do this - WITH YOUR HELP!

https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=EOkE8&m=hi4sGYNdCF6OuRU&b=87rioa3.NMiTXzhCAfkX3g
Thank you and God bless America! - Bill.

PAID FOR BY WILLIAM OLSON FOR CONGRESS

Bill Olson is a retired member of the United States Army. Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense.

Marlton NJ 08053
USA

‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=10da0a0bedee397c56684f0274cf151e01ef0f4639b1ced40f1d0f7687649b3e537da0300c37847944495a7eef370b7b9a5819c3191fd2fc

“Ladies and gentlemen I am officially running for President of the United States, and we are going to make our Country great again. It can happen. Our Country has tremendous potential. We have tremendous people.”

- Donald J. Trump, Trump Tower June 16, 2015
We’ve come a long way together.

From the moment I announced my candidacy and took my famous escalator ride, to when I placed my hand on the bible on January 20, 2017, to be sworn in as the 45th President of the United States, to this moment, I have loved every minute of fighting for the American People.

With your help, my administration has accomplished more than anyone thought possible.

We have implemented HISTORIC tax cuts, nominated 220 Federal Judges - including THREE Supreme Court Justices, decimated ISIS, negotiated peace agreements in the Middle East, negotiated the USMCA, and we are leading a strong economic comeback.

But, all of that incredible progress will vanish if we don’t secure another VICTORY on Election Day. There is only one way to defend your dignity. There is only one way to defend your family and your Country. There is only one way to preserve, protect, and defend the American Way of Life:

subject: Your Vote Will Determine the Future of New Hampshire

| Dear Friends,
Tomorrow’s election will determine the future of New Hampshire. Will we allow the Democrats to create an income tax? Will we allow the Democrats to craft a budget next year that spends our way into broad based taxes? Will we allow the Democrats to hit struggling small businesses with more taxes, fees, and regulations? **Of course we won’t.**

---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| **We will not let the Democrats change our state forever.** That’s why it’s so important that we re-take the majority in the Senate. Governor Sununu needs a team to work with him on the challenges the state will face next year. **It’s up to you now.** Make sure you vote tomorrow and remember to **vote for Republicans** because we will never, ever vote for an income tax.
---
---
| |
---
|
---
| |
---
| Paid for by NH Senate Republicans PAC, Chuck Morse, Chairman

body:
November 2nd at 10:15AM: FINAL 2020 Election Rankings released.
|
---

| | [**November 2nd at 10:15AM: FINAL 2020 Election Rankings released.**
**Don Bacon #1 most vulnerable member of the House.
NE-02 could be the DECIDING factor in the presidential race.**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8c5/77d4c309/223e28ad/26358fe9/4217322985/VEsH/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201102_em_fr_b1_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250") Peter, I'm trying not to panic.

But with only 36 hours of this election cycle to go, final rankings show my race is going to be the CLOSEST and MOST CONSEQUENTIAL in the entire country.

So the GOP is directing ALL of their remaining resources to defeat me.

[**_I 'm begging you to rush a donation of ANY AMOUNT. Top Democrats have stepped up to SIX TIMES match every dollar donated. Because if I fail to raise $12,045 to reach Democrats with outstanding mail in ballots and fully fund my digital campaign: I WILL LOSE. Can I count on you to chip in and help me fight until the bitter end? >>_**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8c5/77d4c309/223e28ad/26358fe9/4217322985/VEsE/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201102_em_fr_b1_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

Peter, I know you've been reading these emails and if you are able to, I would really appreciate it if you could make your first donation to my campaign and keep the GOP from buying this race at the final moment.

To keep this last minute onslaught of dark money from defeating me, my team needs the resources to reach Democrats who have requested mail in ballots but haven't yet returned them.

There is still time for these crucial voters to deliver their ballot in person.

[**_But if I fail to hit this final goal, tens of thousands of Democratic ballots could be left on kitchen counters, and I will lose._**](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8c5/77d4c309/223e28ad/26358fe9/4217322985/VEsF/p/eyJlM3RoYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNSIsImUzdHpaV052Ym1SZllXMXZkVzUwZlgwPSI6IjI1IiwiZTN0MGFHbHlaRjloYlc5MWJuUjlmUT09IjoiNTAiLCJlM3RtYjNWeWRHaGZZVzF2ZFc1MGZYMD0iOiIxMDAiLCJlM3RtYVdaMGFGOWhiVzkxYm5SOWZRPT0iOiIyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=20201102_em_fr_b1_kara_90op&amount=5&amounts=25,50,100,250")

So I'm not above asking, pleading, BEGGING you one final time: Will you chip in what you can before it is too late?

Kara Eastman is running to flip Nebraska's second district from red to blue. She has dedicated her entire career to bettering her community through nonprofits and social work. She was inspired to run for office after her mom got cancer for the 5th time, and was prescribed a pill that cost $2500. Kara's mom chose to keep her house, and lost her battle with cancer after losing her life-savings to cancer drugs. As Kara watched her Republican Representative Don Bacon vote to repeal the Affordable Care Act and rob millions of their access to health care, she knew she couldn't sit on the sidelines.

If you want to support Kara's campaign for Congress, [_**please rush in a donation here. >>**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8c5/77d4c309/223e28ad/26358f90/4217322985/VEsHBg/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eastmanforcongress-em?refcode=em_footer&amount=25")

Another thing -- we know we send a lot of fundraising emails. It's because Kara has pledged not to take a cent of corporate PAC money. Unlike her Republican opponent, she relies on this grassroots community to fund her campaign. If you'd like to receive fewer emails from Kara, [_**please click here.**_](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8c5/77d4c309/223e28ad/26358f93/4217322985/VEsHAQ/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/s/receive-fewer-emails") We'd hate to lose you completely, but if you'd like to unsubscribe, [_please click here._](https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/m/17c6e8c5/77d4c309/223e28ad/26358f92/4217322985/VEsHAA/?g=SoBiD8btZKdfO2weHdUSFCA "https://act.eastmanforcongress.com/page/content/unsub-footer/")

We can't tell you how much Kara appreciates your grassroots support!

info@eastmanforcongress.com

name: =?utf-8?Q?The=20White=20House?=
subject: WATCH: The best is yet to come
body:
When President Trump took the Oath of Office, he promised an end to the empty talk of politicians and the beginning of a great national effort... | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=770ac1b415&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • November 2, 2020
---
| | |
# **WATCH: The best is yet to come**
---
| [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=f9a11e44ce&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| **When President Trump** took the Oath of Office, he promised an end to the empty talk of politicians and the beginning of a great national effort to rebuild our country:
| | _Today we are not merely transferring power from one Administration to another, or from one party to another—but we are transferring power from Washington, D.C., and giving it back to you, the American People.

For too long, a small group in our nation’s Capital has reaped the rewards of government while the people have borne the cost.

Washington flourished, but the people did not share in its wealth.

Politicians prospered, but the jobs left and the factories closed.

The establishment protected itself, but not the citizens of our country.

. . . That all changes–starting right here and right now. _ |
---|---|---

**The American story** is the story of patriots—ordinary people of every race, religion, and creed—standing up for their rights to be heard, to protect themselves, and to be free. It’s a story worth telling over and over again so that we never forget it.

**President Trump** loves America, our shared history, and our great American flag. Today, the far left’s goal is to erase that history and the culture that unites us.

**We will never** let that happen. The United States was founded on the belief that life, liberty, and the pursuit of happiness are unalienable rights. These principles form the core of our American identity. Our struggle to live up to them defines American history.

🇺🇸 [**President Trump is restoring patriotic civic education!**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=46cbff4329&e=3ee4985eea)

**President Trump** is promoting national unity by renewing the understanding of—and commitment to—these shared founding principles. Through a new Executive Order, he is establishing the President’s Advisory 1776 Commission, which will work to better educate America’s young generations about the history and principles of our nation.

**America belongs to all of us.** President Trump will always fight to protect it from those who wish to tear it down. Together, we will build it stronger each and every time.

**America’s future** is in our hands, and the best is yet to come.

🇺🇸 [**President Trump’s Inaugural Address: Our American Destiny**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e886587988&e=3ee4985eea)

🇺🇸 [**WATCH: President Trump’s Fourth of July speech from Mt. Rushmore**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=610be15a23&e=3ee4985eea)
|

[Privacy Policy](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=c3110b02c3&e=3ee4985eea) | [Contact the White House](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=829b5e7bd7&e=3ee4985eea) | [Unsubscribe](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=8cafb01033&e=3ee4985eea&c=2d6843e605)
---
| | | The White House * 1600 Pennsylvania Ave NW * Washington, DC 20500 * USA · 202-456-1111
---
